| We know there has been a LOT happening in the news this month, and we wanted to give you a full update on where we are: **FIRST****: Donald Trump’s long record of unaffordability started catching up to him**. Voters were tired of skyrocketing grocery prices and healthcare premiums. His poll numbers plummeted and Republicans panicked about their House Majority. **THEN****: Donald Trump cooked up a plan to lock in his power no matter what the voters said**. He urged red states like Texas to redraw their U.S. House maps to make it impossible for Democrats to retake the House of Representatives — giving him free reign for another two years. **[NEXT : California thwarted this election-rigging plot by passing Proposition 50. But we spent down our budget organizing in 2025, and now we need to replenish our funds and start working to flip seats in the 2026 Midterms. name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: $30M to Support Our Future Educators
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100171047.172656.486&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100171047.172656.486&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171047.172656.486&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16187)
#
# **$30M to Support Our Future Educators**
Pennsylvania's new state budget includes $30M dollars for [Pennsylvania's Student Teacher Support Program](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171047.172656.486&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16189)\- a grant program that provides up to $10,000 stipends to PA student teachers who are working toward becoming certified teachers. Senator Hughes led the creation of this program in spring of 2023. Since it launched, the program has provided **over two thousand student teachers** with a stipend. This program was created to address Pennsylvania's teacher shortage crisis. Senator Hughes wanted to remove barriers that were making it hard for college students to pursue a career in teaching. We've heard from countless student teachers about how much the stipends have helped them pay for rent, groceries, and their bills while they complete a full-time, non-paid student teacher requirement. Providing the stipend has allowed these future teachers to focus on their time in the classroom and working toward becoming the best teacher they can be. This year's budget includes a 50% increase in funding for the Student Teacher Support Program, which means more future teachers who are working toward their certification will be able to receive the stipend. We're proud to see the [Student Teacher Support Program](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100171047.172656.486&gen=1&mailing_linkid=16189) make it possible for more college students to fulfill their calling to be a teacher. Senator Hughes believes teachers have one of the most important jobs in the world. He will keep fighting for more funding for our teachers, schools, and public education system in Pennsylvania.
* * *
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes
---
| | |
---

2401 North 54th Street
Philadelphia, PA 19131

name: Team Elissa Slotkin
subject: Elissa Slotkin responds to President Trump’s death threats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
President Trump's threats have real world consequences |
#
---
Friends — We're writing to share a short clip from Elissa Slotkin on Chris Hayes' show last night, discussing President Trump's threats yesterday to arrest, prosecute, and hang her. But before we do, we're asking all supporters if they are able to make a small but meaningful donation to stand with Elissa and Jason Crow today. President Trump's threats have real world consequences. Immediately after his tweetstorm, Elissa received a tidal wave of death threats, and she is now under 24-hour security protection. But, to Elissa, this story isn't about her — it's about all of us. It's about America. President Trump wants to use fear as a weapon to silence those who disagree with him. But we know that's contrary to what's made America an exceptional nation. And nothing will stop Elissa from standing up and speaking out to protect the country we all love. **[So, your split contribution to Jason Crow and Elissa Slotkin will help Elissa support candidates in Michigan and across America who will also stand up for our country, for our Constitution, and for our way of life.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119751448/584124973/-171770090?refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251121_PM3_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWQ1NmJjZS0zYmM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4far08ta-xdU6nTA85ujnAr3O1a1VirNCXPZjNtjwvw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119751449/584124974/-171770090?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_JC_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251121_PM3_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWQ1NmJjZS0zYmM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4far08ta-xdU6nTA85ujnAr3O1a1VirNCXPZjNtjwvw=)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Common sense.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Donald Trump and Fox News love to paint Alexandria as an extremist with values straight out of the communist manifesto.
Here are Alexandria’s beliefs and philosophy. **Does this seem extreme to you?**
* That in the wealthiest nation in the history of the world, when a person gets sick, they shouldn’t go bankrupt. **Common sense.**
* A minimum wage should cover the minimum cost to live. **Common sense.**
* Alexandria believes that homes are not slot machines for investors and Wall Street to extort working families out of every last dollar that they have.

**Alexandria believes these things because she was a waitress.**
Because she’s had to work double shifts to keep the lights on. Because she’s in Congress to represent working families like hers.
We need to show widespread support for Alexandria so she can continue doing what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
[ Will you donate $5 to power our fight for progress? Alexandria doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs or curry favor with billionaires, so every donation makes a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251121.rsR7E7&refcode=em20251121-10256-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10256%2E2526796%2Epv2Cqx)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251121.rsR7E7&refcode=em20251121-10256-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10256%2E2526796%2Epv2Cqx)**
Whether or not you contribute today, thank you for being a part of this movement.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251121?refcode=em20251121-10256-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=10256_2526796_pv2Cqx&akid=10256%2E2526796%2Epv2Cqx)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251121-10256-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=10256%2E2526796%2Epv2Cqx)**

Whether or not you contribute today, thank you for being a part of this movement. In solidarity, Team AOC | ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

**⇒ REFUSED** to swear in a democratically-elected Representative from Arizona, denying thousands of voters representation in Congress.

**⇒ BLOCKED** the release of the Epstein files, at the behest of Donald Trump.

So, we’re creating a nationwide petition DEMANDING Congress FIRE Mike Johnson immediately – [**but we NEED to hit 75,000 signatures before 8 AM tomorrow in order to prove there’s widespread support to remove him.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70138?t=8&akid=23647%2E4449941%2EzvPejG)

[ADD MY NAME NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70138?t=11&akid=23647%2E4449941%2EzvPejG)

We know this is an ambitious goal.

_But we’re scared to think about where our country will be if Mike Johnson continues as House Speaker._

[**Please, we just need 8,031 more signatures. We’re so close!!!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70138?t=12&akid=23647%2E4449941%2EzvPejG)

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: Taxpayers don’t owe Donald Trump a dime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
That’s why I introduced the No Presidential Payouts Act, because your tax dollars should serve you — the people — not protect a President’s pocket or bail out a billionaire with too many court dates.
#
**BREAKING: Jasmine Crockett introduces the “No Presidential Payouts Act”**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98046?refcode=em20251121-9750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9750%2E614464%2EhIcMZP)
Y’all, it’s Jasmine Crockett.
In case Donald Trump or any of his MAGA sycophants are reading this, let me be 100% clear: **Taxpayers don’t owe Donald Trump a dime for his legal mess.**
While families across this country are stretching every dollar just to keep up with rent and grocery bills, this man is out here trying to squeeze **$230 _million_** out of the federal government to pay his own lawyers.
_You read that right._ Donald Trump wants the American people — the very folks he’s been attacking and ignoring — to cover his legal bills.
**That’s why I introduced the No Presidential Payouts Act, because your tax dollars should serve you — _the people_ — not protect a President’s pocket or bail out a billionaire with too many court dates.**
**[And that’s why I’m working overtime to win back the House for Democrats — so we can provide the check on Donald Trump’s power that our country so desperately needs right now. But to get the job done, I need your support. So please, split $10 or more between my campaign and State Democrats Committee, and let’s get to work. >>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98046?refcode=em20251121-9750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9750%2E614464%2EhIcMZP)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251121-9750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9750%2E614464%2EhIcMZP) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251121-9750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9750%2E614464%2EhIcMZP) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251121-9750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9750%2E614464%2EhIcMZP) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251121-9750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9750%2E614464%2EhIcMZP) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251121-9750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9750%2E614464%2EhIcMZP) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98047?refcode=em20251121-9750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9750%2E614464%2EhIcMZP) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98046?refcode=em20251121-9750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9750%2E614464%2EhIcMZP)
---
**I’m not afraid to call this what it is:** brazen corruption from the man who’s supposed to be leading our country. And I’ll be damned if we let him get away with it.
But the truth is that fighting people like Donald Trump takes resources and grassroots power. **And I need you in this fight with me.**
**[Every dollar you chip in helps me keep pushing back against this corruption, holding these folks accountable, and making sure our government works for the people, not the powerful. Let’s send a message loud enough for Trump to hear from his courthouse: we’re not paying your bills, and we’re not backing down.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98046?refcode=em20251121-9750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9750%2E614464%2EhIcMZP)**
Thank you,
Jasmine

name: Katie Porter
subject: Trump wants oil wells in our oceans?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40460%2E3422442%2Ea5KqTa)
Peter,
Donald Trump wants to allow new oil wells off California’s coast for the first time since 1984.
I have two words for him: **_Hell. No._**
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251121_2_ak.BSnX2y&refcode=em20251121-40460&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40460%2E3422442%2Ea5KqTa)
**[Unlike my opponents, I reject money from Big Oil. Instead, we rely on supporters like you to power this campaign. Can you chip in $5 today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251121_2_ak.BSnX2y&refcode=em20251121-40460&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40460%2E3422442%2Ea5KqTa)**
California’s coastal waters have been marred by oil spills, including one in 2021 off the coast of Orange County.
In Congress, I held a hearing to hold polluters accountable for that leak, which dumped _more than 25,000 gallons_ of oil into the ocean, where I uncovered millions in federal subsidies to the Big Oil company. The oil spill even led to criminal charges of negligence by the pipeline operator.
My opponents in this race have jumped at the chance to cash checks from Big Oil— _but I never have and never will._ I’m keeping my promise to do everything in my power to protect California from the devastating effects of climate change, and that starts by rejecting contributions from the very people who profit from pollution.
**[I’m running for governor because we cannot afford to move backwards on transitioning to clean energy that lowers electricity costs. I’ll never sell out to Big Oil—but I need your help to stand up to their influence in this race. Can you donate $5 to help me keep holding them accountable as governor?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251121_2_ak.BSnX2y&refcode=em20251121-40460&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=40460%2E3422442%2Ea5KqTa)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251121_2_ak.BSnX2y&refcode=em20251121-40460&t=24&akid=40460%2E3422442%2Ea5KqTa)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251121-40460&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=40460_3422442_a5KqTa&akid=40460%2E3422442%2Ea5KqTa)**
---

In Congress, I held a hearing to hold polluters accountable for that leak, which dumped more than 25,000 gallons of oil into the ocean, where I uncovered millions in federal subsidies to the Big Oil company. The oil spill even led to criminal charges of negligence by the pipeline operator. My opponents in this race have jumped at the chance to cash checks from Big Oil— but I never have and never will. I’m keeping my promise to do everything in my power to protect California from the devastating effects of climate change, and that starts by rejecting contributions from the very people who profit from pollution. Thank you, Katie Porter Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: GOTV PAC
subject: You’ll want to see this new poll
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
New numbers just dropped, and they’re unlike anything we’ve seen since 2017 -- the last time Democrats had a major blue wave.
A new Marist Poll shows Democrats up 14 points on the 2026 generic congressional ballot – 55-41. That’s a fundamental shift in the national landscape just one year after every pundit insisted Democrats were finished.
Here’s what’s powering it: independents are breaking for Democrats by 33 points. Even a slice of Trump’s own 2024 voters say they’d choose a Democrat for Congress today.
But none of this means anything if we don’t turn this moment into actual votes.
Can you chip in $25 or more today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11212025] to help us widen our 2026 map, reach more low-propensity voters, and capitalize on an opening the GOP never saw coming.
Donate here to fuel the work → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11212025]
Thanks for being in the fight,
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]

A new Marist Poll shows Democrats up 14 points on the 2026 generic congressional ballot – 55-41. That’s a fundamental shift in the national landscape just one year after every pundit insisted Democrats were finished. Here’s what’s powering it: independents are breaking for Democrats by 33 points. Even a slice of Trump’s own 2024 voters say they’d choose a Democrat for Congress today. But none of this means anything if we don’t turn this moment into actual votes. It’s time to build a new California. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119752637/584148731/-2131621047?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWIwYWIyMy00N2M3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQvXTSV1EbxNXHqTPR0i5mm9qm2BPadeFLnxLtemnLQ=)

Friend, I’m running for Governor because I believe it’s time to build a new California where working families can afford to get ahead and stay ahead. Because let’s be honest, what we’re doing now isn’t working. **I’ve stood up to Donald Trump and his cronies on the national stage, even while he comes for me. [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36540&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1STFB5cTR0aVJCUSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a7832c2da727b1b2a7d84e934a4a1de78b742387fde579a6d47d9089f6bfc3ab]

Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
against
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36534&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWZiaS1oaWRkZW4tcm9vbS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDQwNDcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=93811d0f9f5804a35881ffcdd110866fcc7a9c266fa0c002097c9c7e356675b6]
the U.S. Department of Justice for “hidden” records from former
FBI Director James Comey’s era that were referenced during a Fox
News interview with Deputy Director Dan Bongino (_Judicial Watch v
U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36534&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWZiaS1oaWRkZW4tcm9vbS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDQwNDcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=93811d0f9f5804a35881ffcdd110866fcc7a9c266fa0c002097c9c7e356675b6]
(No.1:25-cv-04047)).

We know Comey was spying on Donald Trump. He was the Obama
administration’s go-to guy, trying to set Trump up to be toppled
from the campaign and then from office. These hidden-room documents
may contain additional smoking guns.

Judicial Watch sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of
Columbia after the FBI failed to respond to a June 2, 2025, FOIA
request for:

> 1. All documents referenced by Deputy Director Dan Bongino as having
> been discovered in a room “hidden from us and not mentioned to
> us,” discussed in a Fox News interview at
>
https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36536&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9saWJzb2Z0aWt0b2svc3RhdHVzLzE5MjgwOTk0NTUwOTU0MjczODM7P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bf2b72d427fd8c779695c0417ee9689adcdb7f6276572a51235b79f33f636d31
>
> 2. All internal FBI communications among officials in the offices of
> FBI Director Kash Patel and FBI Deputy Director Dan Bongino related
> to the discovery of these documents; and
>
> 3. All directives sent to officials from the offices of the Director
> and/or Deputy Director regarding the handling and disposition of the
> documents.

The May 29, 2025, X post about the Fox News interview
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36537&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9saWJzb2Z0aWt0b2svc3RhdHVzLzE5MjgwOTk0NTUwOTU0MjczODM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=0eaf3ffa6e178765fd552a13dcc4503da18252bfcfa68c95db78f2975ead7d0e]
with Bongino
has the headline “The FBI just discovered that James Comey had a
whole room of secret documents! We found it in bags, hiding under Jim
Comey’s FBI, you're going to be stunned. - FBI Deputy Director Dan
Bongino.” Bongino states:

> There was a room [in FBI Headquarters], and we found stuff. A lot of
> stuff ... hidden from us at least and not mentioned to us. And then
> found stuff in there. A lot is from the Comey era. We are working
> ... right now to declassify. And just so you know, because I get the
> public—I totally understand people saying “well do it now.”
> The process is: not all of the information is ours to declassify.
> Some is other intelligence agencies’.... We literally can’t do
> it. Once that gets done ... and you read some of the stuff we
> found—that, by the way, was not processed through the normal
> procedure, digitizing and putting in FBI records. We found it in
> bags, hiding under Jim Comey’s FBI. You’re going to be stunned.

Comey was indicted in September
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36541&F=T&&hash=5f7c5ceb991424f68041c5c8a3c8c5626e0dfea52a918d6565714586a4b595cb]
on charges of making false statements and obstruction of justice
regarding the Trump-Russia investigation.

In August 2025, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=35947&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29tZXktaW52ZXN0aWdhdGlvbi1vZi10cnVtcC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=416a83411f15fd7a601490c2303c510c6a3b889164a4f3311fb58ac99add8747]
the
Justice Department for all records regarding the FBI, under
then-Director James Comey, initiating an investigation of then-2016
presidential candidate Donald Trump.

In May 2023, we recapped
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=29617&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWFqb3ItcmV2ZWxhdGlvbnMtaW4tdHJ1bXAtcnVzc2lhLXNjYW5kYWwvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=fd5e67c0028bc10f33c90953e154def8d15144a6bf195fa504802a449e44b9a9]
our investigative findings regarding the “Steele Dossier” and the
FBI’s Crossfire Hurricane investigation, which was launched during
the Obama administration in July 2016
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=27289&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVjbGFzc2lmaWNhdGlvbi1zcHlvcGVyYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3a1b43d0625d492ff6f58d513df737e96f286445766ff0ea9a6a80c8bb6c6985]
under
Comey.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES EDUCATION DEPARTMENT OVER UNIVERSITY’S CHINA
TIES

We are keeping an eye on tax-supported universities with connections
to hostile foreign governments. China in particular has been very
active in infiltrating our campuses.

In the latest development, we filed a Freedom of Information Act
(FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36507&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGVwdC1lZHVjYXRpb24tY2hpbmEtbWktY29tcGxhaW50LTAzODk1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=17a53102395f4740cfc6562bcedfcb0b43c675e994ae7dc9349e512656b9bf25]
against the U.S. Department of Education seeking records on the
University of Michigan’s connections to China, including related
communications with the U.S. Department of Justice (_Judicial Watch
Inc. v. U.S. Department of Education_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36507&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGVwdC1lZHVjYXRpb24tY2hpbmEtbWktY29tcGxhaW50LTAzODk1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=17a53102395f4740cfc6562bcedfcb0b43c675e994ae7dc9349e512656b9bf25]
(No. 1:25-cv-03895)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the Education Department failed to provide records in response to a
June 4, 2025, FOIA request for:

* All records of funding received by the University of Michigan from
the government of the People’s Republic of China, the Chinese
Communist Party, any Chinese national or associated entity, including
records created or received by the department pursuant to section 117
of the Higher Education Act of 1965 [foreign gift and contract
reporting
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36509&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2Nycy1wcm9kdWN0L0lGMTI5Mjc/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d8896d9dca070bc63c13851dc87ecd9ca24d38533a3da256a31b9874d5221dd2]].
* All records of communication between any official of the Department
of Education and any official of the Department of Justice or any
component thereof regarding the University of Michigan’s Molecular
Plant-Microbe Interaction Laboratory and Working Group, employee, or
student affiliated with the laboratory or working group.

On June 5, we narrowed the scope of the request for information on the
lab to include the following officials:

* Secretary McMahon
* Chief of Staff Oglesby
* White House Liaison Warzoha
* International Affairs Office Director Hong
* General Counsel Wheeler
* The Deputy General Counsel for Postsecondary Education
* Office of Postsecondary Education Assistant Secretary Bergeron
* International and Foreign Language Education Senior Director Gibbs

In January 2025, the university announced it was ending its
partnership
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36510&F=T&&hash=003f83b42f5339a16ca8037eab94073fcb5ceb234f9e69d21d6b592e3bbbe9ca]
with a prominent Chinese university, a few months after five Chinese
students in a joint program were charged with lying to federal
investigators regarding suspicious activities
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36511&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvY2hpbmVzZS1zdHVkZW50cy1taWNoaWdhbi1taWxpdGFyeS1jYW1wLTBmNzU3Nzg1ZWI1ZWVjYjllOTJhYzg5Zjk5ZTk2YzJkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=553cb2d570d173f7c30268664a442c8da537168e226dbad9f85f4e469fbe3315]
outside a remote military site.

In June 2025, two Chinese nationals — Yunqing Jian, a postdoctoral
researcher in the University of Michigan’s Molecular Plant‐Microbe
Interaction Laboratory, and Zunyong Liu, her partner, — were
charged with conspiring to smuggle
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36512&F=T&&hash=e2a2e1a8fe9c6d46ca030e40f364dad57e5933f05383fc408c0f92fddeb0602b]
a fungus considered to be a potential agroterrorism agent into the
U.S. Jian later pleaded guilty
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36513&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JzbmV3cy5jb20vZGV0cm9pdC9uZXdzL2NoaW5lc2UtbmF0aW9uYWxzLWd1aWx0eS1wbGVhLXNtdWdnbGluZy1kYW5nZXJvdXMtcGF0aG9nZW5zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=abc9a618da4ff2f951564af586f00612ce11ef649100a6b91e9957dd1ca58aa6]
to smuggling and making false statements and was sentenced to time
served. Liu was stopped at Detroit Metro Airport in 2024 with
concealed fungal samples and later deported. Separately, four other
Chinese nationals have been charged with smuggling biological
materials.

In January 2025, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=34395&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdW5pdmVyc2l0aWVzLW9wZXJhdGlvbnMtaW4tcWF0YXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=cac29b37b0ac5b1d6de33306106e1bfd9a772785ddd775d48c688820accf825f]
the
Education Department on behalf of the Zachor Legal Institute for
records concerning Qatar’s funding and operations of five U.S.
universities, including the University of Michigan. Qatar had given or
contracted nearly $6 billion to American universities since 2007,
according to a February 2024 report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=31774&F=T&&hash=ca53f9fc955f6ae1aeabc83cde564ccf2f7df569403b13d29cb25cfc6f057d0a].
The money was said to have “enabled Qatar to have outsized influence
in American politics and academia, efforts [that] have mainstreamed
anti-Israel propaganda and silenced criticism about Doha’s
longstanding ties to Hamas, the Iranian regime, and other terror
groups.”

We and Zachor previously had spent more than five years successfully
fighting the Qatar Foundation in Texas courts for information about
the funding of Texas A&M. The records that were produced showed that
over $522 million was given by Qatar to the state university from
January 1, 2013, to May 22, 2018, including more than $485 million
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=29443&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGV4YXMtYW0tZ3JhbnRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=02fdfe3a1225a2d22b1228065a757936628e6957d4778d0a39b2ab46fedf7d1d]
from the Qatar
Foundation. In addition, because of our court victory, Texas A&M
produced contracts that suggest
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=31431&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlZnAuY29tL3AvdGV4YXMtYS1hbmQtbS1xYXRhci1kZWFsLWlyYW4tdS1zLXNlY3JldHM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=655e4c329f61d6ca2c5ef00b66c9cb31042f195001086edaee31d8b072a72a1f]
Texas A&M provided an assignment of sensitive intellectual property to
the Qatar Foundation.

JUDICIAL WATCH FILES CLAIM FOR MONK ARRESTED BY BIDEN DOJ/FBI

Judicial Watch filed a Federal Tort Claims Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36526&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2ZlZC10b3J0LWNsYWltcy1mci1idXNoZWxsX3N0b2NrdG9uLW5vdi0yMDI1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=fca85a94120efccae419cf20ef59ec07c01e83b78bad6108c3cdc797721d76b3]
claim on behalf of a Massachusetts Greek Orthodox monk and his
monastery’s general counsel, who were maliciously arrested and
charged after a 2022 FBI raid. Our claim includes allegations of
malicious prosecution, false arrest and imprisonment, and assault and
battery.

In the early morning hours of October 13, 2022
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36527&F=T&&hash=830a744076ebbfbc1646727656cbd43d5213f0d1fbbfb8aab3de1c730b0f492d],
heavily armed federal agents raided the St. Nicholas monastic complex
in Marblehead, MA, and arrested Father Brian Andrew Bushell, 50, and
General Counsel Tracey M.A. Stockton, 66. The Biden Justice Department
accused Bushell of being a "purported" monk and alleged that he and
Stockton improperly used Covid relief funds.

The case against Bushell and Stockton fell apart
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36528&F=T&&hash=2df4f2070313f610ffc5179d838138d119276c736bb13c3cf0595b1b0841ef0a],
and the charges were dismissed on November 9, 2023. Bushell accused
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36529&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjUvMTAvMTMvdXMtbmV3cy9tb25rLXN1ZXMtZG9qLWZvci1jaGFyZ2luZy1oaW0td2l0aC1zdGVhbGluZy0zLTVtLWluLWNvdmlkLXJlbGllZi1mdW5kcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=1b79c1f2aebfec96bca0b1f1659b7fcc47a26bc271bd8044951910aecd88aee0]
former Massachusetts U.S. Attorney Rachael Rollins of weaponizing
“the DOJ, FBI and other federal agents to manufacture a pack of lies
to destroy St. Nicholas, me and intimidate God-fearing Orthodox
Christians.”

Biden appointee Rollins was publicly reprimanded
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36530&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9maW5nZngudGhvbXNvbnJldXRlcnMuY29tL2dmeC9sZWdhbGRvY3MvZ2RwemJsZHJlcHcvUm9sbGlucy1QRC5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=3145a097ca26ba9784f393094fd734c1179386de61c03ca31789f422619ca156]
by state bar regulators in 2025 for violations
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36531&F=T&&hash=61efa565ae024ed5eaab3c5ea0aeea7481a026cd1a725486b879b002b845df36]
outlined in a 2023 Justice Department report (an archived version is

APPEALS COURT: STUDENTS CAN USE TRANSGENDER CLASSMATES’ BIOLOGICAL
PRONOUNS

Parents with traditional views about gender won a victory in one Ohio
school district. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog has the details
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36524&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJhbnNnZW5kZXItY2xhc3NtYXRlcy1iaW9sb2dpY2FsLXByb25vdW5zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=41bc9adc7e3ad2645a9798333ae97f9bdb198afbe9cfc465c92f27616b30cb67].

> Is the learning environment disrupted when students in kindergarten
> through high school refer to all classmates—including those who
> identify as transgender—by their biological pronoun? A public
> school district in Ohio claims it is and a few years ago enacted an
> “anti-harassment” policy that punishes students who refuse to
> use the preferred pronouns of transgender classmates. This is widely
> known among leftists as “misgendering” and the Olentangy Local
> School District Board of Education in the northern suburbs of
> Columbus created a measure to discipline students who use language
> that inaccurately represents another person’s gender identity as
> part of a series of speech codes in support of the district’s
> preferred viewpoints. This includes prohibiting “discriminatory
> language” considered derogatory towards an individual or group
> based on, among other things, “transgender identity.” The public
> school district policies prohibit “purposely referring to another
> student by using gendered language they know is contrary to the
> other student’s identity.”
>
> With an enrollment of 24,531
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36542&F=T&&hash=2a63740c725f9995481e0a46d65b4b975ea855b8111b3a40fdfbe4834342872a]
> Olentangy is the fourth largest school district in Ohio, with 16
> elementary schools, five middle schools, and four high schools. Many
> of the students’ parents were outraged about the policies and sued
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36543&F=T&&hash=59977518468149dc88881b782a3d99a8126f49578bbe6819d7ae8e11862e1d40]
> the district, claiming they violate the First Amendment’s
> guarantees to free speech and unconstitutionally compel speech
> because they force students to alter their speech or use other
> students’ “preferred pronouns”—despite the students’
> firmly held beliefs that sex is immutable. The Policies are also
> unconstitutional because they punish students based on the viewpoint
> and content of the speech, according to the parent’s lawsuit, and
> they are overboard because they restrict a substantial amount of
> constitutionally protected speech and transgress the fundamental
> rights of parents to raise their children. A Clinton-appointed
> federal judge, Algenon L. Marbley, in the southern District of Ohio
> ruled against them
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36544&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zdG9yYWdlLmNvdXJ0bGlzdGVuZXIuY29tL3JlY2FwL2dvdi51c2NvdXJ0cy5vaHNkLjI3OTg0OC9nb3YudXNjb3VydHMub2hzZC4yNzk4NDguMjguMC5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=0879505482a12050c6627f213f2d0a186ded588df2a43f1bfe651c61a442d4ad],
> writing in a 2023 opinion that the intentional misgendering of
> students constitutes “verbal bullying” and the Constitution
> likely does not guarantee a “right to bully transgender
> students.”
>
> The parents appealed and a three-judge panel of the United States
> Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit heard the case and upheld
> Judge Marbley’s decision in the summer of 2024, ruling
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36545&F=T&&hash=7b0038d1a36dd7ea34ef9352048981f5fbf2a847c3ce2b770a44ecd8bb8766e3]
> that free speech rules for schoolchildren must take into account
> consideration of the sensibilities of fellow students and schools
> are entitled to regulate speech that “would undermine the
> school’s basic educational mission.” The three-judge panel
> agreed with the school district that speech criticizing the identity
> of specific classmates, including the use of non-preferred pronouns,
> is more likely to cause disruption than speech about social issues
> in the abstract. “The District is entitled to recognize that
> speech about specific students’ identities is particularly harmful
> and likely to disrupt the educational experience, and to regulate
> that speech accordingly,” the appellate panel wrote in its
> decision. The 55-page document also says, “studies show that
> intentional, repeated use of non-preferred pronouns is more
> disruptive than discussions about transgender issues.”
>
> The parents appealed again asking the full Sixth Circuit appellate
> court, which has 16 judges, to hear the case and the court agreed
> and held oral arguments last spring. This month the court came back
> with a lengthy ruling
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36546&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub3BuLmNhNi51c2NvdXJ0cy5nb3Yvb3BpbmlvbnMucGRmLzI1YTAzMDdwLTA2LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5a433dd114ac5cd3398a42f90460aa32cfd61017d212033ace3511d28cfa0c1b]

>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=77875&L=36547&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub3BuLmNhNi51c2NvdXJ0cy5nb3Yvb3BpbmlvbnMucGRmLzI1YTAzMDdwLTA2LnBkZl1pbj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=db784d9c183b69d7901e69d86d48cff0b1a111a78e776132afd5ef0fff313930
> favor of the parents. Students who refer to all classmates by their
> biological pronouns—whether they are transgender or not—do not
> disrupt the learning environment and cannot be forced to use
> preferred pronouns, the court ruled. In the decision the court’s
> majority determined that Olentangy public schools failed to
> demonstrate that the use of the pronouns to refer to transgender and
> nonbinary students would “materially and substantially disrupt
> school activities or infringe on the legal rights of others in the
> school community.” The appellate court also issued a preliminary
> injunction banning the school district from punishing students for
> the commonplace use of biological pronouns involving transgender
> classmates though it still allows officials to enforce other
> anti-harassment policies to protect all students, including those
> who identify as transgender. “Our society continues to debate
> whether biological pronouns are appropriate or offensive — just as
> it continues to debate many other issues surrounding transgender
> rights,” the ruling notes. “The school district may not skew
> this debate by forcing one side to change the way it conveys its
> message or by compelling it to express a different view.”

Until next week,

clean_body: Judicial Watch Sues DOJ for FBI Secret Room Records! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES JUSTICE DEPARTMENT FOR FBI RECORDS FOUND IN SECRET ROOM [] Judicial Watch filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against [] the U.S. Department of Justice for “hidden” records from former FBI Director James Comey’s era that were referenced during a Fox News interview with Deputy Director Dan Bongino (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No.1:25-cv-04047)). We know Comey was spying on Donald Trump. He was the Obama administration’s go-to guy, trying to set Trump up to be toppled from the campaign and then from office. These hidden-room documents may contain additional smoking guns. Judicial Watch sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the FBI failed to respond to a June 2, 2025, FOIA request for: 1. All documents referenced by Deputy Director Dan Bongino as having been discovered in a room “hidden from us and not mentioned to us,” discussed in a Fox News interview at 2. All internal FBI communications among officials in the offices of FBI Director Kash Patel and FBI Deputy Director Dan Bongino related to the discovery of these documents; and 3. All directives sent to officials from the offices of the Director and/or Deputy Director regarding the handling and disposition of the documents. The May 29, 2025, X post about the Fox News interview [] with Bongino has the headline “The FBI just discovered that James Comey had a whole room of secret documents! We found it in bags, hiding under Jim Comey’s FBI, you're going to be stunned. - FBI Deputy Director Dan Bongino.” Bongino states: There was a room [in FBI Headquarters], and we found stuff. A lot of stuff ... hidden from us at least and not mentioned to us. And then found stuff in there. A lot is from the Comey era. We are working ... right now to declassify. And just so you know, because I get the public—I totally understand people saying “well do it now.” The process is: not all of the information is ours to declassify. Some is other intelligence agencies’.... We literally can’t do it. Once that gets done ... and you read some of the stuff we found—that, by the way, was not processed through the normal procedure, digitizing and putting in FBI records. We found it in bags, hiding under Jim Comey’s FBI. You’re going to be stunned. Comey was indicted in September [] on charges of making false statements and obstruction of justice regarding the Trump-Russia investigation. In August 2025, we sued [] the Justice Department for all records regarding the FBI, under then-Director James Comey, initiating an investigation of then-2016 presidential candidate Donald Trump. In May 2023, we recapped [] our investigative findings regarding the “Steele Dossier” and the FBI’s Crossfire Hurricane investigation, which was launched during the Obama administration in July 2016 [] under Comey. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES EDUCATION DEPARTMENT OVER UNIVERSITY’S CHINA TIES We are keeping an eye on tax-supported universities with connections to hostile foreign governments. China in particular has been very active in infiltrating our campuses. In the latest development, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Education seeking records on the University of Michigan’s connections to China, including related communications with the U.S. Department of Justice (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Education [] (No. 1:25-cv-03895)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Education Department failed to provide records in response to a June 4, 2025, FOIA request for: All records of funding received by the University of Michigan from the government of the People’s Republic of China, the Chinese Communist Party, any Chinese national or associated entity, including records created or received by the department pursuant to section 117 of the Higher Education Act of 1965 [foreign gift and contract reporting []]. All records of communication between any official of the Department of Education and any official of the Department of Justice or any component thereof regarding the University of Michigan’s Molecular Plant-Microbe Interaction Laboratory and Working Group, employee, or student affiliated with the laboratory or working group. On June 5, we narrowed the scope of the request for information on the lab to include the following officials: Secretary McMahon Chief of Staff Oglesby White House Liaison Warzoha International Affairs Office Director Hong General Counsel Wheeler The Deputy General Counsel for Postsecondary Education Office of Postsecondary Education Assistant Secretary Bergeron International and Foreign Language Education Senior Director Gibbs In January 2025, the university announced it was ending its partnership [] with a prominent Chinese university, a few months after five Chinese students in a joint program were charged with lying to federal investigators regarding suspicious activities [] outside a remote military site. In June 2025, two Chinese nationals — Yunqing Jian, a postdoctoral researcher in the University of Michigan’s Molecular Plant‐Microbe Interaction Laboratory, and Zunyong Liu, her partner, — were charged with conspiring to smuggle [] a fungus considered to be a potential agroterrorism agent into the U.S. Jian later pleaded guilty [] to smuggling and making false statements and was sentenced to time served. Liu was stopped at Detroit Metro Airport in 2024 with concealed fungal samples and later deported. Separately, four other Chinese nationals have been charged with smuggling biological materials. In January 2025, we sued [] the Education Department on behalf of the Zachor Legal Institute for records concerning Qatar’s funding and operations of five U.S. universities, including the University of Michigan. Qatar had given or contracted nearly $6 billion to American universities since 2007, according to a February 2024 report []. The money was said to have “enabled Qatar to have outsized influence in American politics and academia, efforts [that] have mainstreamed anti-Israel propaganda and silenced criticism about Doha’s longstanding ties to Hamas, the Iranian regime, and other terror groups.” We and Zachor previously had spent more than five years successfully fighting the Qatar Foundation in Texas courts for information about the funding of Texas A&M. The records that were produced showed that over $522 million was given by Qatar to the state university from January 1, 2013, to May 22, 2018, including more than $485 million [] from the Qatar Foundation. In addition, because of our court victory, Texas A&M produced contracts that suggest [] Texas A&M provided an assignment of sensitive intellectual property to the Qatar Foundation. JUDICIAL WATCH FILES CLAIM FOR MONK ARRESTED BY BIDEN DOJ/FBI Judicial Watch filed a Federal Tort Claims Act [] claim on behalf of a Massachusetts Greek Orthodox monk and his monastery’s general counsel, who were maliciously arrested and charged after a 2022 FBI raid. Our claim includes allegations of malicious prosecution, false arrest and imprisonment, and assault and battery. In the early morning hours of October 13, 2022 [], heavily armed federal agents raided the St. Nicholas monastic complex in Marblehead, MA, and arrested Father Brian Andrew Bushell, 50, and General Counsel Tracey M.A. Stockton, 66. The Biden Justice Department accused Bushell of being a "purported" monk and alleged that he and Stockton improperly used Covid relief funds. The case against Bushell and Stockton fell apart [], and the charges were dismissed on November 9, 2023. Bushell accused [] former Massachusetts U.S. Attorney Rachael Rollins of weaponizing “the DOJ, FBI and other federal agents to manufacture a pack of lies to destroy St. Nicholas, me and intimidate God-fearing Orthodox Christians.” Biden appointee Rollins was publicly reprimanded [] by state bar regulators in 2025 for violations [] outlined in a 2023 Justice Department report (an archived version is available here []) that found Rollins improperly attended a Democratic fundraising event in her capacity as a prosecutor with then-First Lady Jill Biden. Rollins also “knowingly and willfully made a false statement” during her interview with former Inspector General Michael E. Horowitz’s office. Acting Biden U.S. Attorney Joshua S. Levy reportedly said [] that “based on evidence developed in the course of the investigation, the government determined it was in the interests of justice to dismiss the complaint.” The claim alleges: Father Brian Andrew Bushell, Tracey Stockton, the Shrine of St. Nicholas the Wonderworker, St. Paul’s Foundation, the Annunciation House, and the Marblehead Brewing Company, as victims of the acts of federal government employees acting in the scope of their official duties, suffered economic and non-economic damages as a result of the intentional acts, including ... malicious prosecution, false arrest and imprisonment, assault and battery, and intentional infliction of emotional distress ... [by] federal agents who participated in the preparation or execution of the warrants on October 13, 2022. The victims also suffered economic and non-economic damages as a result of the negligent acts, including ... negligence, negligent infliction of emotional distress, and negligent training and supervision, of ... federal agents, who participated in the preparation or execution of the warrants on October 13, 2022, as well as the negligent acts ... of the U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation, the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs Office of Inspector General, the U.S. Marshals Service, and the Council of Inspectors General for Integrity and Excellence, of which the Pandemic Response Accountability Committee and its Pandemic Response Accountability Committee Task Force is a part. St. Paul’s Foundation demands at least $1,777,124.66, representing the legal fees of Father Bushell and Ms. Stockton related to the intentional and negligent acts of the individuals and entities listed above, which the foundation covered or reimbursed because of their status as unpaid officers and employees of the religious foundation. The Shrine of St. Nicholas the Wonderworker demands at least $518,700, representing economic and non-economic damages ... We are honored to stand up for Father Andrew and Ms. Stockton for their horrendous anti-Christian mistreatment at the hands of the weaponized Biden Justice Department. APPEALS COURT: STUDENTS CAN USE TRANSGENDER CLASSMATES’ BIOLOGICAL PRONOUNS Parents with traditional views about gender won a victory in one Ohio school district. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the details []. Is the learning environment disrupted when students in kindergarten through high school refer to all classmates—including those who identify as transgender—by their biological pronoun? A public school district in Ohio claims it is and a few years ago enacted an “anti-harassment” policy that punishes students who refuse to use the preferred pronouns of transgender classmates. This is widely known among leftists as “misgendering” and the Olentangy Local School District Board of Education in the northern suburbs of Columbus created a measure to discipline students who use language that inaccurately represents another person’s gender identity as part of a series of speech codes in support of the district’s preferred viewpoints. This includes prohibiting “discriminatory language” considered derogatory towards an individual or group based on, among other things, “transgender identity.” The public school district policies prohibit “purposely referring to another student by using gendered language they know is contrary to the other student’s identity.” With an enrollment of 24,531 [] Olentangy is the fourth largest school district in Ohio, with 16 elementary schools, five middle schools, and four high schools. Many of the students’ parents were outraged about the policies and sued [] the district, claiming they violate the First Amendment’s guarantees to free speech and unconstitutionally compel speech because they force students to alter their speech or use other students’ “preferred pronouns”—despite the students’ firmly held beliefs that sex is immutable. The Policies are also unconstitutional because they punish students based on the viewpoint and content of the speech, according to the parent’s lawsuit, and they are overboard because they restrict a substantial amount of constitutionally protected speech and transgress the fundamental rights of parents to raise their children. A Clinton-appointed federal judge, Algenon L. Marbley, in the southern District of Ohio ruled against them [], writing in a 2023 opinion that the intentional misgendering of students constitutes “verbal bullying” and the Constitution likely does not guarantee a “right to bully transgender students.” The parents appealed and a three-judge panel of the United States Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit heard the case and upheld Judge Marbley’s decision in the summer of 2024, ruling [] that free speech rules for schoolchildren must take into account consideration of the sensibilities of fellow students and schools are entitled to regulate speech that “would undermine the school’s basic educational mission.” The three-judge panel agreed with the school district that speech criticizing the identity of specific classmates, including the use of non-preferred pronouns, is more likely to cause disruption than speech about social issues in the abstract. “The District is entitled to recognize that speech about specific students’ identities is particularly harmful and likely to disrupt the educational experience, and to regulate that speech accordingly,” the appellate panel wrote in its decision. The 55-page document also says, “studies show that intentional, repeated use of non-preferred pronouns is more disruptive than discussions about transgender issues.” The parents appealed again asking the full Sixth Circuit appellate court, which has 16 judges, to hear the case and the court agreed and held oral arguments last spring. This month the court came back with a lengthy ruling [] [ favor of the parents. Students who refer to all classmates by their biological pronouns—whether they are transgender or not—do not disrupt the learning environment and cannot be forced to use preferred pronouns, the court ruled. In the decision the court’s majority determined that Olentangy public schools failed to demonstrate that the use of the pronouns to refer to transgender and nonbinary students would “materially and substantially disrupt school activities or infringe on the legal rights of others in the school community.” The appellate court also issued a preliminary injunction banning the school district from punishing students for the commonplace use of biological pronouns involving transgender classmates though it still allows officials to enforce other anti-harassment policies to protect all students, including those who identify as transgender. “Our society continues to debate whether biological pronouns are appropriate or offensive — just as it continues to debate many other issues surrounding transgender rights,” the ruling notes. “The school district may not skew this debate by forcing one side to change the way it conveys its message or by compelling it to express a different view.” Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

subject: Get your property tax bill? I got mine.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN CRNKOVICH FOR JOHNSON COUNTY COMMISSION * 6709 West 119th Street * Ste
body:
I am fired up. Johnson County is being taxed out of their homes. Enough is enough.

| | | | | [|
---](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=dc709fb5b1&e=7320325a61)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | |

| |
Dear Peter,
Johnson County politicians keep insisting our new property tax hike is “just a small increase.” That’s funny, because when I opened my bill, I found a **6.1% jump** , almost **a hundred dollars more every month** that families could be spending on groceries instead of feeding a ballooning county budget. If that’s “small,” I’d hate to see what they call big.This isn’t about improving services, it’s about government spending faster than families can keep up.
---
| [HELP FIGHT AGAINST RISING PROPERTY TAXES!](https://kcforjoco.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d540da3225ec5b2797f3018d2&id=e8e4adee53&e=7320325a61)
---
| |

The county budget has exploded from $1.26 billion to $1.9 billion in just five years, and somehow we’re supposed to be grateful? Temporary COVID funds became permanent obligations, and homeowners are stuck footing the bill for decisions they never approved._**I know what responsible budgeting actually looks like**_ because I’ve spent **fifteen** **years** running a business where you can’t just raise prices every time you overspend. I am running for Commission Chair to bring common sense back to Johnson County, the kind where you live within your means, cut waste, stop pretending tax hikes are normal, and stop treating family budgets like government piggy banks.
**In order to fight back against the dirty Amber Wave PAC and prevent Mike Kelly from being re-elected I need your contribution today. Are you willing to donate $25, $50, $100 to the cause?**

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**

Now, he’s a member of the Armed Services committee in Congress, and he voted AGAINST my measure to CENSURE Ilhan Omar. Peter, I’m saying what no other Republican will: Cory Mills is the GOP’s JUDAS, and I want him GONE. It’s Nancy Mace. I’m sick and tired of these RADICAL RINOs who infiltrate our movement under the guise of being a “true patriot.” Recently, I led a measure on the House floor to CENSURE Ilhan Omar and strip her from her committees. That’s right. Cory Mills was one of them. This left me thinking: Why would an Army Combat Veteran and supposed Bronze Star recipient side with a radical Mulsim who hates America Peter, that’s when the can of worms EXPLODED. Here’s what I sent to Speaker Mike Johnson: ❌ MillsLIED about serving in elite units & rescue missions in the military❌ His “Bronze Star” recommendation was FORGED ❌ His arms company has contracts with Syria—a CLEAR conflict of interest But Peter, if that isn’t enough to convince you, here’s what really sent chills down my spine: Cory Mills was married in the same mosque linked to TERROR PLOTS. The Dar Al-Hijrah Islamic Center in Falls Church, Virginia, has been linked to several individuals engaged in terrorism-related activities, including Anwar al-Awlaki, who was a spiritual leader there for some time and later became a prominent al-Qaeda figure. Peter , I have personally spoken to NUMEROUS military officials and retired generals myself to confirm this information. This is beyond the shadow of doubt, 100% REAL. Now, it’s time to TAKE ACTION. Kicking Mills out is going to be an uphill battle that requires a TON of Republican momentum. I’m asking for 100,000 signatures before MIDNIGHT to BOOT Mills from his committee assignments FOR GOOD. I’ll say it again: Cory Mills is the GOP’s JUDAS. Use your voice to KICK CORY MILLS OFF HIS COMMITTEES! ⬇️⬇️ Hold The Line. — Nancy Mace | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR | | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492 |

I’m stepping up – [_**before I tell you my game plan, will you take 30 seconds and tell me what your three biggest priorities are by clicking here?**_](http://links.arenawins.com/u/click?_t=9a47db0c260f401cbd4df33275301297&_m=ce4a076709d24302b1eeec7a8426b398&_e=C5K66yutlKVQrcAEXcp7BUqVZQ-uj0smShpcN25_iAM9YD7R-8PMoFOTcklO2kvlrBfB4imjXQUoNYjz7xzVzBAjiRmQvejgmSEik3aBXCRqNIPgSvVmprFkZxdecvvjZfPBMU-kvInjAIY_Zju-y8T9OZ8HKSdKj90EBhkzBNLH7Dmtp1Y-iTXHmgo9VWGHxr51kcbcUlk_mDqjW8RjA9fYilfjDn5L0q0YVRFkS_ncaWjhBPZX_v4H0oSvDYnzNUkw4uPayn1oM1FU9plTA6tO03IuvJF8y_3G5APw-Mh7K0rCCKPbnegpQI3Ias1PiSfowC5vg6BOi4gMQwPzAZD45DYxx2PDXGAD93hDYoYC7UxrUut-MaAOgpbdkwshTReQxgllBdcMMXlwDhbZ9-gb-oWjOGn55g6raskwuCMY_NTw5hINzGjdKZknu8VKlY1xT4q4DRZxdvyqHUfjbjDMLp8K2n7Uhruh-HbYsZi5joQ3gQAtcis0QFE3DDuUIYgF6jv34A7XiEvtTKxWRZhyZjZrzx26Uizb_zPk1Jpn8ybIIIhlmFymxLE0Afckis1L8XwPttipn194RyI6rXiSXS5_mVffq6K0p7tXg9A%3D) THE GAME PLAN... **SECURING THE BORDER**
No more blown coverages. No more wide-open lanes for cartels, traffickers, or dangerous criminals. We lock it down — firmly and finally. **A STRONG AMERICAN ECONOMY**
Families shouldn’t be playing defense every time they go to the grocery store. It’s time to get America back on offense. **PROTECTING WOMEN’S SPORTS**
Fairness isn’t optional. As someone with a daughter who has spent years in competitive athletics, this one hits close to home: women deserve a level playing field. **RESTORING THE AMERICAN DREAM**
For too long, the promise of America has drifted out of reach. Together, we’re restoring opportunity, renewing hope, and ensuring every family has a fair shot at success. **INVESTING IN ARIZONA**
Our communities deserve more than Washington’s broken playbook. I’ll make sure Arizona gets the respect and resources it’s earned. **UNLEASHING AMERICAN ENERGY**
We should never be dependent on foreign powers just to keep the lights on. America has the talent and tools – we just need leaders willing to call the right play. subject: I am officially running for governor of New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.

You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z34hin9c8q918gvt6j3s75ai09fdm6rf8o8gfjj0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3g69oj2cph2bs)
---
**_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z19agtvk6vjm15k2fdlh4f3i7i9k21feinrp7i38_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3g69oj2cph2bs)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn’t just another election, Friend.
---
**_It’s the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ – _and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,_600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to become an official Founding Member of my gubernatorial campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul – and help unlock a 600% MATCH.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhfts5d0gg78e67r74eg3dj6pglqu36ub6hbsml8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3g69oj2cph2bs)

subject: Your gift saves lives and shares the gospel
body:
For nearly two decades, PreBorn! has been standing in the gap for mothers and babies across the nation.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zavlt6rsqhu1ndd4n43g0m50trlvi95lb6g09sl8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3g69oj6c9h2bs)

Hi Advocate for Life, For nearly two decades, **PreBorn!** has been standing in the gap for mothers and babies across the nation. We do two simple but powerful and life-changing things: We help women in crisis **see their babies and hear their heartbeats through free ultrasounds** , and we offer **gospel-centered, compassionate care** at our Network Clinics. Those two things change everything and we can’t do them without people like you. When a mother hears her child’s heartbeat for the first time, fear gives way to faith.

A tiny miracle begins the story of a mighty future.

Hope breaks through the darkness. Your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and shares the love of Christ with a woman in need. As our thank-you for your gift, you’ll receive the [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures 2026 Calendar_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z06fiv8ulbjvq88sj4ijl2sqnpdq3b590jiaeg30_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3g69oj6c9h2bs) __ filled with **scripture and a monthly prayer guide** to help you lift up mothers, babies, and the ministry of PreBorn! all year long in prayer.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfbn9a94o9nriv6iggfcvner7ibilnoak6klhau8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3g69oj6c9h2bs)

subject: Important Notice: Meat Warning
body:

View in browser
A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler.
HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming - Prepare Now!
HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2be93078b3b4d73a6de2ce282d22442e5b7ce4ca2d638e944b65f0c272962f63a3af5e936d480372d92db3f1d5413b55dd08032f3c5bdff57ed1ca5faa8fa594

The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis".

Which means 2 dangerous things for you:

1. Higher prices at the grocery store

2. Less meat available

That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile.

But there is a catch.

Not all protein is created equal.

And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis.

See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements:

It needs to:

- Last a while
- Taste great
- Store without refrigeration
- Can't break the bank
Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short!

Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars?

Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops.

Grocery store meat doesn't work either.

First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year.

But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight.

But don't worry friend.

There is a protein option that checks all four boxes:

- This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years.
- It doesn't need to be refrigerated.
- And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank.
- And most importantly, it tastes delicious!
Introducing for the first time ever...

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2be93078b3b4d73a6de2ce282d22442e5b7ce4ca2d638e944b65f0c272962f63a3af5e936d480372d92db3f1d5413b55dd08032f3c5bdff57ed1ca5faa8fa594
The BRAND NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2be93078b3b4d73a6de2ce282d22442e5b7ce4ca2d638e944b65f0c272962f63a3af5e936d480372d92db3f1d5413b55dd08032f3c5bdff57ed1ca5faa8fa594

And
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2be93078b3b4d73a6de2ce282d22442e5b7ce4ca2d638e944b65f0c272962f63a3af5e936d480372d92db3f1d5413b55dd08032f3c5bdff57ed1ca5faa8fa594
right here on this page , you can score an introductory price plus some amazing FREE gifts.

Now, there is one thing you should know.

Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT.

So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush.

I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit.

It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit,
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2be93078b3b4d73a6de2ce282d22442e5b7ce4ca2d638e944b65f0c272962f63a3af5e936d480372d92db3f1d5413b55dd08032f3c5bdff57ed1ca5faa8fa594
you need to act fast .

For starters, you get 5 meat options.

Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes.

Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it.

You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store.

Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation.

That's it!

No funky chemicals.

No artificial gunk.

The only things in your food are food.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2be93078b3b4d73a6de2ce282d22442e5b7ce4ca2d638e944b65f0c272962f63a3af5e936d480372d92db3f1d5413b55dd08032f3c5bdff57ed1ca5faa8fa594
Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!

Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process.

We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can.

That means 2 important things.

First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can.

And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way.

And guess what?

This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from.

And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2be93078b3b4d73a6de2ce282d22442e5b7ce4ca2d638e944b65f0c272962f63a3af5e936d480372d92db3f1d5413b55dd08032f3c5bdff57ed1ca5faa8fa594
Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!

Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now.

Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis.

Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option.

Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans.

And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity.

Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis.

There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then."

Disasters come out of nowhere.

And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket.

Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find.

All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family.

This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path.

When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones.

You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=2be93078b3b4d73a6de2ce282d22442e5b7ce4ca2d638e944b65f0c272962f63a3af5e936d480372d92db3f1d5413b55dd08032f3c5bdff57ed1ca5faa8fa594

To your survival,

Frank Bates

Patriot Headquarters

P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront.

Customers Love Their Ultimate

Meat Survival Food Kits!

"I buy a lot of stuff at Wal-mart, but this is gonna out-do the stuff on Wal-mart shelves, which contains all kinds of preservatives. I did a taste test even though I've never found a bad product from 4Patriots. Hamburger Helper can kiss my butt – this stuff here is good! (Maybe not as good as my wife's cooking.) This is a good buy."
