clean_body: View in browser A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler. HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming - Prepare Now! HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis". Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1. Higher prices at the grocery store 2. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to: - Last a while - Taste great - Store without refrigeration - Can't break the bank Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short! Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. There is a protein option that checks all four boxes: - This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years. - It doesn't need to be refrigerated. - And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank. - And most importantly, it tastes delicious! Introducing for the first time ever... The BRAND NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit! And right here on this page , you can score an introductory price plus some amazing FREE gifts. Now, there is one thing you should know. Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT. So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush. I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit. It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit, you need to act fast . For starters, you get 5 meat options. Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes. Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it. You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store. Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation. That's it! No funky chemicals. No artificial gunk. The only things in your food are food. Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit! Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process. We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can. That means 2 important things. First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from. And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that. Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit! Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now. Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis. Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option. Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans. And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity. Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis. There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then." Disasters come out of nowhere. And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket. Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find. All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family. This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path. When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones. You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible. Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit! To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Customers Love Their Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kits! Joseph L. "I buy a lot of stuff at Wal-mart, but this is gonna out-do the stuff on Wal-mart shelves, which contains all kinds of preservatives. I did a taste test even though I've never found a bad product from 4Patriots. Hamburger Helper can kiss my butt – this stuff here is good! (Maybe not as good as my wife's cooking.) This is a good buy." Danielle M. 4Patriots Employee "I was surprised at how good everything in the Ultimate Meat Medley really was. As an avid cook, I have high standards; I worried it might be salty or dried out. What I discovered was moist chicken and turkey that shreds easily for the fastest chicken salad ever or super fast BBQ turkey sammies. The pork and beef are in perfect chucks for adding to stews or burritos. Even the ground beef, which I could not envision being delicious, tasted just like the ground beef I typically brown and drain, but in zero time! This box is definitely going to become my "oh shoot, I forgot to thaw a meat" solution for everyday and I'll have to grab more to store." Michael M. "My family won't be asking, "where's the meat when disaster comes." I bought the Meat Medley so we have beef, pork, chicken, turkey and ground beef to supplement our food stock. I was very pleasantly surprised at the amount of meat at the price I paid. My order arrived quickly and now I know I'll have the right answer when my family ask "where's the meat"." Ernest K. "It's a must have item for your food prep. inventory. Great as a companion item for some of the other items for added protein." Get Your Brand New, Delicious Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!

subject: Trump said I should be executed.

Peter -- it's Jason Crow.
I served this country as an Army Ranger in Iraq and Afghanistan. I took an oath to defend the Constitution, and I still live by that oath today in Congress.
Now, the President of the United States, Donald Trump, is calling for me and other veterans to be imprisoned and murdered:

I won't be intimidated. I won't stay silent. But right now, I need to know you're with me.
[Can you help me fight back against these dangerous attacks and threats coming directly from President Trump by splitting a contribution between Trisha Calvarese and my campaign? Your support directly helps me defend democracy and the truth.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XeyUWuQN9Z9QwhE6J97kvq_inUnfnLAMQCPvXJmVI__2OvpqawdefR7q4smy9WfgpsM-Ot0Ltuv8TJJzvI8CEZoNKZQHj41bjflCV6UtxWyPWybRefv5ZB9V8I37FJfUn6FAJZLiIIqHcBROOFlDIaAPpkNkNS_7iYJs6xdNDOgbadGp8YyhpaYaRPpju1BS8Udarn30zAgSQM4GpPrzJD5iNDxlMJQpl0d9E3aA-k8=&c=ZQFmxpEtWCEEgaCkw3D6l80FOQIWybvjgVnjSEQylC84HwepRTlcGA==&ch=dA945BewOQUCvpKE7PVxk2PiV2JpJf8Ww8sceSbEgDfBuIfZ6lrEBg==)

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh883im6m510hsrdk0um10sfata5g4r5mpva5dvg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3i66ob6c9h2bs) [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg2ilnkkn81kqsuv56hg6in870i4uqd52o8tmi7o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3i66ob6c9h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z88ktm1d3pcitqeqcbohake7br54to2m3qj5fi3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3i66ob6c9h2bs). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu9bj7750h4u470u0326r131g6tmlqrbhbrksavg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3i66ob6c9h2bs).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6cj5n0go0tke95a8uumd5rap2lt408ajl0de1k8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3i66ob6c9h2bs).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6958p3vol8veldrm4gff4rt3othaplmraf9q32g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c3i66ob6c9h2bs)
---

name: Danielle Bethell for Governor
subject: More Mandates. No Accountability. The Tina Kotek Model.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Danielle Bethell PAC 20220 [Preferences](https://daniellebethell
body:
After decades of one-party rule, this is what Oregon gets.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,Governor Kotek has issued a sweeping new executive order directing state agencies to **rush major changes to Oregon 's energy system**, rewriting permitting rules, expanding electrification mandates, and reshaping land-use decisions without input from the Legislature or local leaders. [](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-y/) Her order forces agencies to "move faster" on solar, wind, transmission corridors, and electrification, even as Oregon families are already struggling with **some of the highest energy bills in the region** and the state faces growing budget shortfalls. It also directs counties to open more public land for large energy projects **without new funding and without accountability**.After decades of one-party rule, this is what Oregon gets: **top-down mandates, rushed timelines, no partnership, and no focus on outcomes for working families.** Instead of fixing what's broken, homelessness, behavioral health, public safety, or the cost of living, the Governor is adding new mandates and new bureaucracy that will make Oregon even more expensive. And on top of that, she's doubling down on higher gas taxes at the very moment Oregonians are showing up across the state to push back against the recently passed $4.2 billion ODOT package. Families and small businesses can't afford this, and she's not listening.This is exactly why I'm running for Governor.Oregon needs leadership that will stop governing by executive order and start fixing what's broken: permitting, public safety, homelessness, and the cost of living. We need a governor who will work with counties, not over them, and make decisions based on outcomes, not ideology. That's the kind of leadership I'll bring to this state.This is a turning point for Oregon. If we want different results, we need different leadership, serious, accountable, and focused on what actually works. I'm ready to lead that change.--Danielle Bethell
Republican for Governor**PS:** If you want to help me bring accountability back to Oregon and push back against one-party rule, your support makes a real difference. [You can click and chip in here.](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-j/) [](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-t/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-i/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-d/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-h/) [Join Oregon's Comeback](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-k/) [Donate Today](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-x/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-m/) | [ Tweet ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-c/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-li-quhkidd-hhlrhljhit-q/) | [ Forward ](https://daniellebethell.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-hhlrhljhit-E19159AE-quhkidd-l-a)

subject: 3 reasons this Democrat urgently needs your support
body:
As Tracy Chapman once said: “Give me one reason,” well... we’ll give you three.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016i4HYfjIJJD9IPdswfPyhVnG5MtKlVY2rFoEoiVjAvLht_c6BoXEZR1RQ2-yXH-DfGokTx4iwYMcmVPioYDWQtcABE1zNfLqcnl-B9j070dLVtuXm2IOMWqPgHEDtiS_SBCE8uS89aNOA6TTSW59QWanBg6nBpCg6dCy20fCg_exMFpQ9jK3ySz62yglSJ-jN_8FcKB6WXR6-itCbDrgrBXuIlxWzrZ2&c=Hx_M2VkMr3vDwb3Q_E5MbM5Qj8Jd6qyZiLGrhj-ndupv4mWpxUhfBw==&ch=DLz1hUEp09VQHDwDsZiJWwt5JEXJfAiuRg5XBj_oWiEiJwVh6TxW1w==)
---
|
Peter,
Illinois' 9th District just became ground zero in the battle for the future of the Democratic Party.
With Democrat Jan Schakowsky retiring, one of the safest Democratic seats in the entire country is suddenly open and forces outside of Illinois are scrambling to claim it--establishment DC power brokers, MAGA billionaires, AIPAC, and corporate lobbyists.
Bushra Amiwala is running to make sure that IL-9 stays a strong, unapologetically progressive seat, not a trophy for MAGA billionaires or the DC elite. As one of the top-funded campaigns in this race, she is considered a frontrunner to be the next representative for IL-9.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016i4HYfjIJJD9IPdswfPyhVnG5MtKlVY2rFoEoiVjAvLht_c6BoXEZR1RQ2-yXH-DfGokTx4iwYMcmVPioYDWQtcABE1zNfLqcnl-B9j070dLVtuXm2IOMWqPgHEDtiS_SBCE8uS89aNOA6TTSW59QWanBg6nBpCg6dCy20fCg_exMFpQ9jK3ySz62yglSJ-jN_8FcKB6WXSrwlG6gGQBH5Z4BDQ1PEYm&c=Hx_M2VkMr3vDwb3Q_E5MbM5Qj8Jd6qyZiLGrhj-ndupv4mWpxUhfBw==&ch=DLz1hUEp09VQHDwDsZiJWwt5JEXJfAiuRg5XBj_oWiEiJwVh6TxW1w==)
---
You might be wondering: why is Bushra the candidate Democrats should be supporting right now?
As Tracy Chapman once said: "Give me one reason," well... we'll give you three.
A new generation Democrat with real experience: Bushra started organizing against Trump's first administration straight out of high school and she's spent 7 years in elected office delivering for Skokie families. She's the rare candidate who brings fresh energy to the party with day-one readiness. Democrats desperately need both in 2026.
A people-first agenda that meets the moment: Bushra is fighting for the people of IL-9, not corporations and special interests. Her agenda includes:

* Universal healthcare
* Tuition free college and university
* Affordable housing and lower costs
* Ending America's blood soaked foreign policy
* Abolishing ICE and holding agents accountable for their crimes

MAGA & AIPAC are trying to buy this seat: Because they can't win IL-9 with a Republican, MAGA billionaires and AIPAC are funneling money into the campaign of one of Bushra's opponents who will fold in Congress when Trump demands it.
Bushra is going toe-to-toe with these MAGA billionaires but she desperately needs the support of Democrats across the country to ensure this seat stays in the hands of a strong Democrat who will take the fight to Trump and MAGA's extremism in Congress.
[Will you chip in $50, $25 or whatever you can spare to help Bushra Amiwala win this race and keep this deep-blue seat in the hands of a strong Democrat?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016i4HYfjIJJD9IPdswfPyhVnG5MtKlVY2rFoEoiVjAvLht_c6BoXEZR1RQ2-yXH-D1hvsqGDTpyUVd7-I3JeW3Z7iEj5jZj6F3u7yZ9lTYA3tf5ZnkAqZwAK5kvNvx-bhtqoS5DuqQ1fD6RupdiLm2u7es4BX2YpmRAR8FmRHoTLkmbw6aYBWQTvzQnstQ2mk6ihf_TyHGK0Zpek7y7SgpPmmZHg03ZGEobDapG-G5DM=&c=Hx_M2VkMr3vDwb3Q_E5MbM5Qj8Jd6qyZiLGrhj-ndupv4mWpxUhfBw==&ch=DLz1hUEp09VQHDwDsZiJWwt5JEXJfAiuRg5XBj_oWiEiJwVh6TxW1w==)
---

clean_body: As Tracy Chapman once said: “Give me one reason,” well... we’ll give you three. | | | | | == | Peter, Illinois' 9th District just became ground zero in the battle for the future of the Democratic Party. With Democrat Jan Schakowsky retiring, one of the safest Democratic seats in the entire country is suddenly open and forces outside of Illinois are scrambling to claim it--establishment DC power brokers, MAGA billionaires, AIPAC, and corporate lobbyists. Bushra Amiwala is running to make sure that IL-9 stays a strong, unapologetically progressive seat, not a trophy for MAGA billionaires or the DC elite. As one of the top-funded campaigns in this race, she is considered a frontrunner to be the next representative for IL-9. | == You might be wondering: why is Bushra the candidate Democrats should be supporting right now? As Tracy Chapman once said: "Give me one reason," well... we'll give you three. A new generation Democrat with real experience: Bushra started organizing against Trump's first administration straight out of high school and she's spent 7 years in elected office delivering for Skokie families. She's the rare candidate who brings fresh energy to the party with day-one readiness. Democrats desperately need both in 2026. A people-first agenda that meets the moment: Bushra is fighting for the people of IL-9, not corporations and special interests. Her agenda includes: Universal healthcare Tuition free college and university Affordable housing and lower costs Ending America's blood soaked foreign policy * Abolishing ICE and holding agents accountable for their crimes MAGA & AIPAC are trying to buy this seat: Because they can't win IL-9 with a Republican, MAGA billionaires and AIPAC are funneling money into the campaign of one of Bushra's opponents who will fold in Congress when Trump demands it. Bushra is going toe-to-toe with these MAGA billionaires but she desperately needs the support of Democrats across the country to ensure this seat stays in the hands of a strong Democrat who will take the fight to Trump and MAGA's extremism in Congress. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Thank you for your support, Team Bushra | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

body:
The bi-weekly collection of all things grassroots! No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-quiurtk-didthutlhu-k/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quiurtk-didthutlhu-r/) **November 21, 2025** Patriot,Last week, we saw so many wonderful events from county Republican parties honoring and celebrating our veterans. Way to go!Looking forward, local parties have begun to schedule Farm Team meetings and trainings, so be on the lookout for an event near you! The Farm Team initiative helps develop strong conservative candidates for local office, giving them the skills to make important changes to their communities and potentially run for higher offices down the road!Join the team at [wisgop.org/take-action](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quiurtk-didthutlhu-y/)!-Team WisGOP **Upcoming Events****11/24: Calumet County Conservative Citizens Meeting
11/25: UW La Crosse CR Meeting
11/29: Juneau County Pints and Politics
12/1: Barron County Member Meeting
12/1: Polk County Member Meeting
12/1: Jackson County Member Meeting
12/1: Calumet County Christmas Party
12/2: Buffalo County Member Meeting
12/2: Adams County Member Meeting
12/2: UW La Crosse CR Meeting
12/2: Waukesha County Pints and Politics
12/2: Richland County Christmas Party
12/3: Washington County Pints and Politics
12/4: Walworth County Member Meeting
12/4: St. Croix County Member Meeting
12/5: Pierce County Pizza and Politics
12/5: WIYR Inaugural 1848 Gala
12/6: Monroe Conservative Breakfast Club
12/6: Eau Claire County Member Meeting
12/6: Jackson County Member Meeting
12/6: Trempealeau County Farm Team Training
12/6: Juneau County Farm Team Training
12/7: St. Croix County Bags/Cornhole Tournament
12/8: Vilas County Party 2025 Caucus
12/9: Dunn County Christmas Party
12/9: Portage County Member Meeting
12/9: Waukesha County GOP Christmas Dinner
12/9: Buffalo County Christmas Party
12/11: Rusk County Member Meeting
12/11: Adams County Farm Team Training
12/11: Taylor County Member Meeting
12/11: Dane County Christmas Party
12/12: St. Croix County Christmas Party
12/13: Portage County Farm Team Meeting
12/15: Racine County GOP Christmas Party
12/15: Kenosha County Pints and Politics
12/15: Marathon County Member Meeting
12/16: Shawano County Member Meeting
12/16: La Crosse County Member Meeting
12/16: UW La Crosse CR Meeting
12/17: Winnebago County Christmas Party
12/18: Green County Christmas Party ****For more information, please visit:[wisgop.org/calendar/events/](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quiurtk-didthutlhu-j/) ** **Kenosha County**
Republicans in Kenosha County gathered at their headquarters to celebrate Veterans Day by honoring those who served while sharing stories and delicious food! **Monroe County**
Monroe County Republicans held a 2nd Amendment Forum in Tomah. Attendees were able to hear speeches from Hubert Hoffman, an NRA and Republican activist, as well as Chris Weaver, who serves as Monroe County Sheriff's Office Chief Deputy! **Brown County**
Republicans in Brown County held a Pints and Politics event to discuss the state of healthcare in America. Guest speakers included Dr. Dan Koster with Physicians for Freedom and Dr. Brian Woodbridge. ** Jackson County**
The Republican Party of Jackson County refreshed the look of its office in Black River Falls this week. Looking good! **Milwaukee County**
Republicans in Milwaukee County attended the Veterans Day celebration at American Legion Post 537. Republican Party of Milwaukee County Member-at-Large and veteran Phil Siemik spoke at the celebration. **Outagamie County**
The Republican Party of Outagamie County showed its support to veterans last week. Members gave out yard signs and began collecting items to help out local veterans! **Ozaukee County **
Republicans in Ozaukee County held a successful voter registration event to get ready for the upcoming elections in 2026! **Racine County**
The Republican Party of Racine County's recent membership meeting was a huge success with a packed house and a speech by Representative Robert Wittke! **St. Croix County**
Republicans in St. Croix County have been busy. The St. Croix Valley Young Republicans held their inaugural meeting with special guest Representative Shannon Zimmerman! Members also geared up for 2026 by taking part in a candidate training workshop hosted by the Leadership Institute. Members also took part in a Phone Bank for Victory event! **Walworth County**
The Republican Party of Walworth County recently moved into a new office in Elkhorn that will be open for the Elkhorn Cocoa Crawl on the 29th! They also got to hear from RPW's Regional Director, Christina Estenson, who talked about RPW's Farm Team initiative. **Washington County**
Washington County Republican Women held their annual meeting and met candidates for State Supreme Court, Attorney General, and Lt. Governor! They also organized a toy drive and collected over 100 items to go to the Washington County Salvation Army! **Waukesha County**
Waukesha County Republicans were busy as usual! They held a Pancakes and Pumpkins family event as well as a watch party for "The Dragon's Prophecy" at their headquarters last week. They also had a table at the Dousman Gun Show to discuss the 2nd Amendment and sign up new members! **Wood County**
Wood County Republicans showed up to honor and celebrate our veterans last week with a great turnout at their event with the local VFW! **Trempealeau County **
Republicans in Trempealeau County got together for a spaghetti fundraiser to help out the Trempealeau County Humane Society to support animals without a home. The event also featured a surprise appearance by Congressman Van Orden! **Juneau County **
Juneau County Republicans recently had the opportunity to attend Farm Team training with the Wisconsin Republican Party's own Christina Estenson to discuss how to build strong candidates for local elections. **Grant County **
Republicans in Grant County held their monthly membership meeting and got to hear from two candidates for Lieutenant Governor as they prepare for 2026! **Sauk County **
Representative Tony Kurtz stopped by for coffee and a conversation with Sauk County Republicans to talk about all the recent news from the State Capitol. **Green County **
The Republican Party of Green County held its monthly breakfast meeting to a capacity crowd! The guest speaker was Green County Sheriff Cody Kanable who spoke on local issues impacting the residents of Green County. [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quiurtk-didthutlhu-t/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quiurtk-didthutlhu-i/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quiurtk-didthutlhu-d/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quiurtk-didthutlhu-h/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-quiurtk-didthutlhu-u/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-quiurtk-didthutlhu-o/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-quiurtk-l-b)

name: The Flyover
subject: Trump Meets Mamdani, Bitcoin Plunges, and Algospeak Evolves
body:
The anticipated meeting between [President Trump and newly elected democratic socialist](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0b2O2zAMB_CnkTcGEuWLfYOHLt6ua0dDkehErT4MkXHqty8c9A1uIQiS-AM_8NfX8uViiuX-02WaZK1LoRcnEqG2SHvmLRMJZ5eDK_EWxddYtgU1foAxgLgEF9Ox9F2YViIk29Fkhqsd9Wdv-u4x4TjiiqMNSGa43vxN-9FpTR9GX1dvfRenM80YRGO0tXjRowvmU_ve9sMw2F71mkKU2i6_ayzyoDUddad28TV3aXqIbKzsD4WzwrkcW2U5VwrnM1jhbMzZn-XJcPoUzv9F8DYy0N-NvFAATs_7Siwgz1YYYpEKDlLd6T11DFsjjoGKALuDgauPLkUWeMWUILs_BOXwcG_khBrIwxWgnRrcaK2NFM5dm8J2Xke-DqrX9-xiemvkWy_YJ_wXAAD__1H_nUI) NYC Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani evolved into an unexpectedly warm exchange at the White House on Friday.

# Saturday, November 22, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1963, [John Fitzgerald Kennedy](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u4yAUxfHV4A4LLtgkBcU07jLtlBY21_HN8GEBE8u7H-Xp7eDVP-kc6f_nMT8cBUrP3y6ibVueE541YGtY5lb-xSMithpd9C7RQm3NlI4ZBAxcSg4we0fhmnXn7YYIqDq00ozqJu5a6m63g_ALDNrgNqBa8AaLGZ3R67AqlKOEjuxnTUoAKYVS0Iub8_IuVq20MUZppgV6arn0r0yp7biFK7-x9GuOXbB7a0dl6heDicF0nme_U225XB9nMLWdKvfu4pT4tzCYUn5jXLBwAAbTK--Jb_wvpoT-4q5WVysl19B3xfrjpBCojoZp8YyOwtd1-1Gvt4X_AQAA__8vRYA_), the 35th U.S. president, was assassinated as he rode through Dallas, in an open-top motorcade. In today's _Flyover_ , we write about a near-mint copy of the [1939 comic ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLsO3CAQRb8Gd6x42dgFRRp3mzalxcKwOwkPC_Cu9u8j8gtpRiONdM7c--t-3C1GzM-fNoHpoRwZPi1C71CPXq90JoDekk3eZnxgdwXzeQgmZso5FeLwFuP3UJM3AUCAnMBwvciVbYqr6WUYWOnXwLxdldZL0Gx-sNltK9daLmGe0Awa50JwzqQUN7ZazzfmlFRaa6mIYuCxl3r7XTD3F4T4LW-oN1fSFM2r97MR-YOInYg9f8_S-jgRsQ8wETvnYx_janTkI2KvtgJt1wk12UxdSejoo5Q_NJQre4qZOhsxlJrRUts7OtpK9DSUSoecbkMwVePPD8aIbdFEsWeyGP_91f-rzLcRfwMAAP__DGGHgw)[_Superman No. 1_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLsO3CAQRb8Gd6x42dgFRRp3mzalxcKwOwkPC_Cu9u8j8gtpRiONdM7c--t-3C1GzM-fNoHpoRwZPi1C71CPXq90JoDekk3eZnxgdwXzeQgmZso5FeLwFuP3UJM3AUCAnMBwvciVbYqr6WUYWOnXwLxdldZL0Gx-sNltK9daLmGe0Awa50JwzqQUN7ZazzfmlFRaa6mIYuCxl3r7XTD3F4T4LW-oN1fSFM2r97MR-YOInYg9f8_S-jgRsQ8wETvnYx_janTkI2KvtgJt1wk12UxdSejoo5Q_NJQre4qZOhsxlJrRUts7OtpK9DSUSoecbkMwVePPD8aIbdFEsWeyGP_91f-rzLcRfwMAAP__DGGHgw), which sold for a record $9.12 million. Discovered in a box under old newspapers, the issue is now the most valuable comic book ever sold--and a reminder that sometimes the most interesting stories are the ones hiding in the attic. If you want a head start on the season's biggest savings, today's sponsor, [Brad's Deals](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbuunDAQhp_GdF75wuFSUERa0Z20KdFgD-wkvhDbLCJPH7FZKXWU0p9H_z_65tvn9AnkKKxfweNQljgFPLLDUjBNJe1-84gle_AWAs1UTKSwTUqoDy4lV2qyQO6c6soOC6JCXeEg20Z3oq9lXT0G05m-63SvtQXRLrZGJZoPY2ynZ2ikqmi40qRUSkqhtbqJDqzshal13batrlkt0FKJ6fY9UigPXNwZn5huJvrKDY9Stsz0F6ZGpsbjOG5zApstgsvXCFPj7OLK1CgFBw-_YuBbIo98xoALlczPuHMPJw-x8B8hHhzmuBemx734Kcc9GWT6_reZ2wJMNdevR0u7Z_puKW8Ozjc24DegNTB9_8fWP1r55YSpxkxkXxn96wnm5-SjBXetk3Z8owcku0LBN63SYLeDnKPctKwWqwdyL1vlv078HNTvAAAA__-bWb08), delivers the best early Amazon picks and Prime perks straight to your inbox so you never miss a deal.

## Ukraine Faces Thanksgiving Peace Deadline
The U.S. administration has advanced a [28-point peace proposal to settle the conflict](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOqzAQheGnMV3QeOxgKFzchi633RIZPCSzsgGZ2Xjz9qvsK2x9pE86_8dtugVOvN3_h0xe1n3aqJ6JRKhMUr7ykYnkzCHHsPHMsuy8HRMCXi9aXxCnGDi9JttEvxIhmYa8dp3pYbDaNg_fL0OvBxOusBqA4OY4AzogCnNnDdiG_VvTGlFrMAZb6EPUAyzWWOecscoCRZa9tJ87b_KgNb32J5V22XOT_EPkOJX5p3BUONZa23le3pvC8X1G4Zj4SQrHpcOrq-XbgJam-HhUTonPzikL9xw4_YrypwxPjz8BAAD__8l2b0A) in Ukraine, with President Trump suggesting the deadline for Ukrainian approval is nearing Thanksgiving, Nov. 27. Russian President Vladimir Putin affirmed that the framework could serve as a [basis for a final settlement](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2K3DAURp9G7mSkK-3YU6iYENxtIISQ0lxL1zsK-kOS18zbB-8rpD7w8Z3z5319Rx98-viBkUzf85robIF6p7r2esQSiXqLGB0mv_lus09lBQFvXEoOsDr04bXqwZmdCEgNZOR0U7O4a6mHp7E4kdsQ57uy8zzf3uxm7b6BtbN1u1CDN9ealABSCqVgFDM6eRdWKz1Nk9JMC3K-5zr-zT71J-3hlT-pjjbHIZhn76Ux9WCwMFjO8xxjSxdjsFDiR2OwXFIXzDU4Bks5uk-84avxL8fGS8DEbT6C4xvxDZtvfM-VF0JL3BEGBgtW_njIn7_3lphasvWOqe_frnh0tl9Uy1CNK6cPwbfbxLT4iOjD183-X20_DfwLAAD__1Dsj80), while Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky acknowledged the diplomatic pressure but vowed to work with Washington to ensure national interests are protected. The [draft plan, which has leaked](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAUhJ_G7rD4i4kLim3cZdstrWM4Ts5eDAhIrLz9laP7BredGY3mm3-35QYUKN7_wo62bWmJeNSArWFZWnnueUdsdYfdQ6SVmksU8yK5vDAhmJSLBwrvRffebogSVY9WmFFd-aSF7h8Wr97o1Qju3HYRyhu9rU7hCMrpSU2mJ3u2CSGlEFwpOfAreDFxp5U2xijdaY6eWirD_0SxPXAL7_TCMri098E-Wsu1U386OXdyPo5jiKs7KU7_VFIJvpPz86sARezk_OFiGcEhywEiyyXlVCEwjJ6VZ60E7CfODiisuAhSX_g09sX6fFAIVEfTaX7fgcJnSPvVey8rvwMAAP__irKFLA), reportedly requires Kyiv to formally renounce future NATO membership and cede territory, including parts of the Donetsk Oblast it still controls, while implicitly recognizing Crimea, Luhansk, Kherson, and Zaporizhzhia along the line of contact as de facto Russian. In return, the proposal mandates [Ukraine limit its armed forces to 600,000 personnel](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u2zAMhZ_G3hhIlGIng4cu3m7XjgYj0zF79WNISoy8faG-wl0Igjz4gO_8-Vq-SLzE528KPNUtLZHP4rlWzkvNr3AE5loChZWiPKS6JPFYUOEVtAbEZSXxn8X267QxI5ueJz0O5qbuVtt-n5S93Q1f8TEw0aDuI13H68M8jBmUMxv2MjWa1ohaK2Pwom606rty1thxHI3trOJVasqXv0li3Xnzn_TmfHEp9H7aaz1KZ351OHc4x8-RSm2vDucG7nDWuu1tnCn7FZpih_OrwMHkGA5PEah8FyAfUqkQU90lPiFtkF-lCIFnerdLSYGBAmdxFCFtmzghX-BMceXcEns64fsjb2gBco6PClI7nPs8rccp3ksZxs6qZyDx_x3qj4p_T_gvAAD__1ksmJQ) but offers a conditional U.S.-led security guarantee against future aggression, a reconstruction fund using frozen Russian assets, and phased sanctions relief for Russia, including an invitation to rejoin the G8.
## Mamdani, Trump Meet at White House
The anticipated meeting between [President Trump and newly elected democratic socialist](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0b2O2zAMB_CnkTcGEuWLfYOHLt6ua0dDkehErT4MkXHqty8c9A1uIQiS-AM_8NfX8uViiuX-02WaZK1LoRcnEqG2SHvmLRMJZ5eDK_EWxddYtgU1foAxgLgEF9Ox9F2YViIk29Fkhqsd9Wdv-u4x4TjiiqMNSGa43vxN-9FpTR9GX1dvfRenM80YRGO0tXjRowvmU_ve9sMw2F71mkKU2i6_ayzyoDUddad28TV3aXqIbKzsD4WzwrkcW2U5VwrnM1jhbMzZn-XJcPoUzv9F8DYy0N-NvFAATs_7Siwgz1YYYpEKDlLd6T11DFsjjoGKALuDgauPLkUWeMWUILs_BOXwcG_khBrIwxWgnRrcaK2NFM5dm8J2Xke-DqrX9-xiemvkWy_YJ_wXAAD__1H_nUI) NYC Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani evolved into an unexpectedly warm exchange at the White House on Friday. **➤****A near-mint copy** of _Superman No. 1_ from 1939 just sold for $9.12 million on Thursday at an auction in Dallas, Texas, breaking the world record for the most valuable comic book ever sold. The issue was discovered by three brothers in their late mother’s attic in Northern California, tucked in a box under old newspapers. clean_body: The anticipated meeting between NYC Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani evolved into an unexpectedly warm exchange at the White House on Friday. | | | | | | Saturday, November 22, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1963, , the 35th U.S. president, was assassinated as he rode through Dallas, in an open-top motorcade. In today's Flyover , we write about a near-mint copy of the , which sold for a record $9.12 million. Discovered in a box under old newspapers, the issue is now the most valuable comic book ever sold--and a reminder that sometimes the most interesting stories are the ones hiding in the attic. If you want a head start on the season's biggest savings, today's sponsor, , delivers the best early Amazon picks and Prime perks straight to your inbox so you never miss a deal. | Ukraine Faces Thanksgiving Peace Deadline The U.S. administration has advanced a in Ukraine, with President Trump suggesting the deadline for Ukrainian approval is nearing Thanksgiving, Nov. 27. Russian President Vladimir Putin affirmed that the framework could serve as a , while Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky acknowledged the diplomatic pressure but vowed to work with Washington to ensure national interests are protected. The , reportedly requires Kyiv to formally renounce future NATO membership and cede territory, including parts of the Donetsk Oblast it still controls, while implicitly recognizing Crimea, Luhansk, Kherson, and Zaporizhzhia along the line of contact as de facto Russian. In return, the proposal mandates but offers a conditional U.S.-led security guarantee against future aggression, a reconstruction fund using frozen Russian assets, and phased sanctions relief for Russia, including an invitation to rejoin the G8. Mamdani, Trump Meet at White House The anticipated meeting between NYC Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani evolved into an unexpectedly warm exchange at the White House on Friday. President Trump repeatedly praised Mamdani, predicting the far-left politician would make New York City "greater than ever before," despite having previously derided him as "my little Communist" and threatening to withhold federal funding. . Mamdani was more measured, stating their roughly 30-minute discussion focused primarily on the shared goal of addressing affordability and crime in the city, rather than their numerous political disagreements. Trump even offered a when the mayor-elect was questioned about past statements calling the President a "fascist," and backed off his threat to deploy the National Guard. Both leaders stressed their mutual interest in the city's success following the sit-down. Potential Fed Rate Cut Lifts Markets but Not Bitcoin Odds of a in December more than doubled to 74% Friday after dovish comments from New York Fed President John Williams and Governor Stephen Miran, sparking a broad market rally. When a fire 's out of control, you don't wait. You act because hesitation means destruction. Right now, I 'm staring down a different kind of fire, and it's coming straight from Washington, D.C.. The radical Left is pouring millions into my race with one simple goal: burn down everything we've built. National Democrats and far-left donors want revenge, and they'll do whatever it takes to take me out. We can beat this fire, but only if we act now. -- Gabe Evans | | Paid for by ElectGabeEvans.com | | PO Box 350608 Westminster, CO 80035. body:
When confidence disappears, wealth follows. Find out how to protect yours before the next shock hits.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1365743/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVjRjcVFhYU5uTQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjI/LbmNsa05CU3ZBaw/qP2hpZHM9bmNYTUFTckxadFhwTVBscw/gaSGdBw/s2u0710e403)

The signs are everywhere... _yet most people aren’t paying attention_.
Dear Reader,
Trust — in government, in the dollar, in the markets — is disappearing.
We’re not just watching a crisis of confidence..._we’re living through it_.
In fact, I believe, we’ve entered a _Low-Trust Economy_... where promises mean less, and tangible assets mean everything.
You won’t hear this story on the news — not yet. But this is your window of opportunity to protect yourself and your family before confidence completely collapses.
From my experience, when trust disappears, one asset always rises.
**[Get Your Free Wealth Protection Kit](lp.noblegoldinvestments.com/trust/?affiliate_source=warroom&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1122)**
This may be the single most important step you can take to protect your wealth.
Remember, confidence is fragile... once it’s gone, it never returns the same way.
Best,
Collin Plume
CEO Noble Gold Investments

| INSIDER ALERT: Massive Survival Food Overstock - Shocking Discounts Inside! | **INSIDER ALERT:** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fb07f14ea2589d6a62bd058e161640f282d40f897600b35f5e098d5c5733e334231b110b60f38c1a9f076813efaeae40d3097c78374d884e) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fb07f14ea2589d6a62bd058e161640f282d40f897600b35f5e098d5c5733e334231b110b60f38c1a9f076813efaeae40d3097c78374d884e) **This RED HOT deal is vanishing by the minute. ACT FAST and grab yours now before it's gone:** [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these 4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fb07f14ea2589d6a62bd058e161640f282d40f897600b35f5e098d5c5733e334231b110b60f38c1a9f076813efaeae40d3097c78374d884e) If you've been watching the headlines, you already know - the threat of food shortages, blackouts, and supply chain failures is more real than ever. Our 4Patriots **4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE Survival Food Kits** have been flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. Why? Because people are waking up to the truth - you can't count on the system anymore. So we gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: **produce as many kits as humanly possible.** And wow... did he ever deliver. The result? **A tidal wave of inventory just crashed into our warehouse - more kits than we have space for.** Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your help. **This is your chance to take advantage of our mistake.** We're slashing prices and practically *giving away* these premium survival food kits - just to move them fast. When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for your family... **you're helping an American-owned company stay afloat through a supply chain nightmare.** And yes - **you'll get a 2 additional FREE BONUSES** as our thank you. [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these 4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fb07f14ea2589d6a62bd058e161640f282d40f897600b35f5e098d5c5733e334231b110b60f38c1a9f076813efaeae40d3097c78374d884e) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fb07f14ea2589d6a62bd058e161640f282d40f897600b35f5e098d5c5733e334231b110b60f38c1a9f076813efaeae40d3097c78374d884e) **2 Months Of Food, Security & Peace Of Mind - All In One Kit** This is more than just food. It's **freedom in a box.** These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. [**Click here now to stock up before our warehouse clears out.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fb07f14ea2589d6a62bd058e161640f282d40f897600b35f5e098d5c5733e334231b110b60f38c1a9f076813efaeae40d3097c78374d884e) That's right - **no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients** - just real food, crafted for real emergencies. Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, **these kits contain more food than ever.** It's a massive value - and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared. Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these 4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fb07f14ea2589d6a62bd058e161640f282d40f897600b35f5e098d5c5733e334231b110b60f38c1a9f076813efaeae40d3097c78374d884e) Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fb07f14ea2589d6a62bd058e161640f282d40f897600b35f5e098d5c5733e334231b110b60f38c1a9f076813efaeae40d3097c78374d884e) **Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude.** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fb07f14ea2589d6a62bd058e161640f282d40f897600b35f5e098d5c5733e334231b110b60f38c1a9f076813efaeae40d3097c78374d884e) **_Rory H._**_
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these 4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=fb07f14ea2589d6a62bd058e161640f282d40f897600b35f5e098d5c5733e334231b110b60f38c1a9f076813efaeae40d3097c78374d884e)

name: Gabe Evans
subject: This fire is spreading
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ElectGabeEvans
body:
Help me put it out

| | | Friend, I've fought wildfires with the Colorado National Guard. I've felt the heat, smelled the smoke, and watched flames move faster than any man could run. **When a fire 's out of control, you don't wait. You act because hesitation means destruction.** _Right now, I 'm staring down a different kind of fire, and it's coming straight from Washington, D.C.._ **The radical Left is pouring millions into my race with one simple goal: burn down everything we've built.** National Democrats and far-left donors want revenge, and they'll do whatever it takes to take me out. **[This is a five-alarm emergency, and I'm calling on you to help me stop the flames from spreading.](https://email.alert.conservativelibertywire.com/c/eJyUkU2L2zAQhn-NfHOQRo4_Dj6EOm4XusuyLd2jkKWJMyA7ZiQn9N8XtV3otdd3Ht6Zh3l_Ns-WAq3zi12wd-FhOJp0pXghRopxY7Se1tmAhGOpVAmQCSh8f2wBu7rAXjW1bpWSShfXHtuqkU6C93pqj9XkO4m1PGI3Sd02ky-oz1VKASilpVKHynUe3SS7urn4CjpRSRuQ08Hd1oh8t4nuGGhCTj8fxHhwt6UI_TWlLQp9EjAKGCO6nfHwoJXRZ0LAiAFdKmc7YYl3u8byT5zNLjRfE3K5WaHHPS0m3nZ2KPSw8S1u6BKts4A6jxLyIvTwejK4WAofqRN6-PT1vfyw-Zsv6GnP_L-ws8tmaV6FHs4_Ti_fzPj0dh6fPn_5fn4zrycBNef7OS_VQ-IdC-799qAQKNaNqOSc236bp__50r2HXwEAAP__vp-e_g)**

name: NEGOP
subject: Reminder: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY](https://feyrpzhbb
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
Will Nebraska Democrats Try Again to Impose Ranked-Choice Voting--and Permanently Tilt the Legislature Left?
Dear Nebraska Republicans,
Nebraska's officially non-partisan Unicameral is one of the reddest legislatures in America, yet Democrats have repeatedly punched above their weight. Expect Ranked-Choice Voting (RCV) to perennially resurface in the upcoming sessions, backed by the usual out-of-state dark money that fueled the 2024 abortion petitions. Why are national left-wing groups so obsessed with changing Nebraska's system? Because RCV would hand urban Democrats a structural jackpot in a state they otherwise cannot win statewide.
How would RCV rig the elections? In a red or purple district, Democrats could: Run an "independent" or No Labels-style candidate as the first choice for moderate Republicans and right-leaning independents.
Instruct their base to rank the actual Democrat second.
Watch the "independent" get eliminated and nearly all those votes flow straight to the Democrat--without moderates ever having to admit they voted D in the first round.
This is exactly how Lisa Murkowski won in Alaska and how Democrats flipped two "non-partisan" Virginia House seats in 2023 under RCV. It's fusion voting by another name, and it's a gold ticket for the minority party in a one-house legislature. Democrats already enjoy existing structural advantages in Nebraska. The Unicameral system itself is annually overwhelmed with an enormous number of bills and no second house to act as a firewall to slow the process that would allow for more public scrutiny. The low pay for legislators skews the talent pool heavily Democrat, especially in urban districts. Another structural advantage is hiding the "D" brand on non-partisan ballots and/or running effectively Democrat candidates as independents, moderates or even Republicans in some instances.
Add RCV on top of these three advantages and rural, conservative Nebraska effectively loses control of its own legislature--forever.
Nebraskans' default instinct to be polite and "give everyone a fair hearing" has already cost us in numerous instances including the structural advantages already mentioned. Being nice is a virtue--until it becomes unilateral disarmament. Nebraska Republicans need to treat any future RCV push as an existential threat and kill it early, hard, and without apology. The alternative is waking up in ten years to a permanently blue (or at least purple) Unicameral in the middle of the reddest heartland state in America.
That's not fearmongering. That's math.
Onward.
Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_SBpnyDkwvxXq_2-fR5oDuS-0lPinsdRr3AoLUEEEAU2a-jcVfkogXKMUHF7Xn3sNP6A8ywlzMQ1P0SWWcwNWdLM035EOEYqApMmLFb143SNuvx49RQJ82c_Fl4k3xEARPnwVUMfx9_GA-M95aLAHedAX2fg9drO&c=U6biyCoVBA_lTFAtSP9c8-USSVOvb2eDpEf-npVwwj6KrTicJeLw-g==&ch=KzqQ3VXMgqoN4daaH8F56w3y-xDZ6nMWgLTEfMRAgrKmaRNmtXY28w==)
---
| What's Happening:
Candidate Recruitment....
I've had dozens of people ask me the same questions lately:
"What makes a good candidate?" "Am I actually qualified to run?" "Does my background even fit the job?"
Here's the truth: Most normal, hardworking conservatives are far more qualified than they realize. (Reminder: We currently have a Supreme Court justice who can't define what a woman is. The bar is not as high as you think.)
That said, if you want to win a competitive local Republican race today--county commissioner, state representative, state senate, sheriff, city council, school board, etc.--in a red or purple area, there are six non-negotiable qualities you must bring to the table:

* Time to Campaign: Local races are won (or lost) in the trenches. Plan on a minimum of 8 months of non-stop evenings and weekends knocking on doors, attending fish fries, parade-walking, and showing up at every chamber breakfast and Rotary lunch. The candidate with a 9-to-5 job or young kids at home may get outworked by the retired businessman, the stay-at-home mom with grown kids, or the self-employed guy who can set his own hours. Be ready to view your campaign as a full-time job.

* Good Communicator: Voters at the county fair or the church fellowship hall don't want 10-point plans--They want someone who can grab a mic (or no mic) at the county fair and explain in two plain, fired-up sentences why property taxes are crushing families--and exactly what you'll do about it.

* Money to Run or the Willingness to Ask for it Relentlessly: Even a State Legislative race in a rural district can cost $250,000+, and countywide or local races in growing suburbs routinely hit 4 figures. If you can't pick up the phone and call 300 people for $500 checks, or host living-room fundraisers every week, you'll be outspent on mail, radio, and digital ads.

* Pre-established Relationships in the Community: The first endorsements, the first volunteers, and the first big checks always go to the person that the farm bureau, the home-school leaders, the pastors, the volunteer fire department, and the big ranching families have known and trusted for 10-20 years--not the newcomer with slick flyers. Local activists and donors back people, not resumes.

* Foundational alignment with the Republican platform: This is the non-negotiable entry ticket. This is your entry ticket. At the Lincoln-Reagan dinner nobody quizzes you on guns, life, taxes, school choice, or parental rights--they already know because they've watched you fight those battles for years. You showed up to stop the tax increase, spoke against porn in school libraries, marched for life, and kept your Thin Blue Line flag flying. A spotless, long-term track record means no one wastes time wondering if you'll fold once elected.

* Genuinely Authentic and Approachable Personality: This is the multiplier. People will give up their Saturdays and put signs in their yards only for someone they genuinely like and trust--the candidate who remembers their name and their wife's cancer battle, asks about their grandkids' Little League game, and shows up in muddy boots looking like the neighbor who'd help change your tire--not some polished, distant figure who radiates Wall Street or country-club elitism. If you can't connect on a human level, if you come across as stiff, superior, or transactional, volunteers vanish and turnout drops. In low-turnout local primaries, that personal warmth and relatability isn't optional--it's the margin of victory.

Miss even one of these six, and you'll almost certainly finish second to the candidate who has them all.
If you're that person, or you know someone who is, and they'd like to talk it through, have them reach out to me anytime at political@ne.gop. I'm happy to grab coffee or jump on a call and walk through the next steps--no pressure, just honest conversation.

Nebraska's future isn't going to be saved in Washington -- it's going to be saved one county courthouse, one school board, and one legislative seat at a time. We don't need perfect people; we need principled fighters who are willing to show up, speak plain truth, and outwork everyone else. If that sounds like you -- or like your neighbor, your pastor, your kid's coach, or the farmer down the road -- then 2026 is your year. Reach out today, and let's get to work taking our state back. The bench is deeper than you think... and the clock is ticking.
In Liberty, Joe Hagerty Political Director Nebraska Republican Party political@ne.gop
---

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Federal Judge Blasts Ruling, $9M Superman Find, and a Cold Case Arrest
body:
Federal judge Jerry Smith, the [lone dissenter in Tuesday’s 2-1 ruling](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO2zAQRL-G6tYQV7ItFSrSsLu0KYUVuZSZ0OSBXJ3svw-kIF9w3QI7mMG8-fUxf1CIIa0_6cmTvHyeE-81sgiX2bPjQvH35lZeIlWpZTvE44wtXkFrQJwdhfie-8ZNS-tG3fCk77du0Djcr81jIr8MzuuR23HAse9u7a3z9jry4Bd399yE6TDTGlFjq9vh0lFP2g6DH60nv6DqW3ZBcrnIg4VfVH185y8uF5ufTZweIp9VdT8UGoVm3_eLjcH-wUfequR0qBSao5ZCE7OlqNAcmQqN1uet0ORNCq2ctwo2J7dZARdq5SQhrXAigJDgzIfCLlQpwZ5PS5Wh0rvCPzywU4UnOYaFfS783whs3qKDhWEvQYSTQtOUyX3uIcZQb3fVt-uTQjyLyffm-JrwbwAAAP__OYyjIA) blocking the redraw of Texas’ congressional map, released his opinion a day after the ruling, sharply criticizing the court’s other two judges in a break from typical judicial decorum.

# Saturday, November 22, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1849, [Austin College](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1ygzAQRk8jOhhp-S9UpKFz2pTMwq5AGRk80tqY22fwFVK95vte8X5u4w198NvyjXe28nb7uPGRAotwHB0TRwy_T1p4Cpgkxec17kfQUOfG5AAjoQ_nWGVkJ029ydiatik7A11bZ6slaFutoe8r45Cx0VRODYFuauKp5jnz9pIZA2BAG90VJVZo5q5z_ezQTaAqzeRlj4WsLPzG5MK5vzgW837Pgl1FHkmVXwoGBcNxHIWkFfct-I2LPS4Khs8rJzzz6bygYOBN4sW-NFm09Dh8CD41rar0ckcfPnL5X5KXhb8AAAD__97dddY) was incorporated in Huntsville on land donated by the family of Stephen F. Austin. Republic of Texas presidents Sam Houston and Anson Jones were charter members of the board of trustees. In 1876, the Presbyterian liberal arts school moved to Sherman. Dallas-based Heritage Auctions just sold a [Superman comic book](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OpDAMh58mdBnFBgYoUlxDN9deiUzizOQ2EJSE-fP2q-wrbGNZsvV99u_fbbmRD36__6WNdXm7uOz8yoFL4bQ4tpwo_D_tnddAueR01uVpQYW9BJCIiyUfPkvXWL0qO0HDGoZrOwKOQ988tGodKTCDbWlSNPXTiuNKivvO9R0BN15XGAAioAI1XlrqCMw4usk4ciuKTrH1JaZLeXDhN2UXPvHJ6WLi1gT9KOXIov0jcBY4758j5lJHAudKFjgD1L6WM8v6n8A5UWKZz4PTRrs0cfNGrjF-SRfP3Uq_S0PBu5h2T5JK8UbmGKx0Mckql1MVNEnb4-VD8Pk6iE7dN_Lh567yuzSfGr8DAAD__zY5iUU) for $9.12 million, shattering the previous record comic book auction sale. Not too shabby for the three brothers who made the rare find in their late mom's attic. If you love Texas history—or know someone who does—the [Texas State Historical Association’s](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz7FuwyAQgOGngS0Wd9jGHhi6ZEvXjugMh0NF4ghInLx9lbxC90-_9P-c3IlSTtf1my5s2zNu7sp7zdwaFxc5cKH8ew8rL5lqq-X-xrNDhcMB4IDoAqX8cr0MdlFhBskWzKgnwMkM8mxHmtlrNRhllPELBMYQQI8zLGEYjJbJvmMAiIAK1NRp6gn8NMXZR4oLil5xSG0rXTtz4yfVmF_bg0vnt4vM9tzarQr9JfAo8Ljve5d5Jf_a4ge_lcCjLDbc9pRzqqMRvVovlPKn0P73_bD4FwAA___iS2yf) early Black Friday sale is the perfect chance to grab beloved Texas books, maps, and gifts at the lowest prices of the year.

**We're Nearly There** Over the last 12 days, we’ve been sprinting toward one goal: **reaching 2,000 reader-investors**. Today, I want to be fully transparent—we fell short. As I write this, we’re about 147 investors away. Falling short never feels good. And yet, I’m enormously grateful. 1,853 of you have already stepped up [to become owners of _The Flyover_](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtu3DAQRb-G6lbgQ8-CRYCNuo0bA0lHjMShRIMiF-Ro1_77QIkDpHd7z52Dmfl5Mzfwwcf1B-yo6d0lE_FZAhJhNg4tZghvh11xDlCo5OMsj0Zy2V6EuEhpLPjwYZrK6pnbUVSoRd-pQcihb6tNczEuXLWjamYBnQDVt04hKCWdUL3lldenTAgpheSCD7WCBsQyDG5cHLhZsoaj9ZRyTRsSvkNx4SM9MNdL2qugN6J7YeobkxOTk48PLFS_JR9pw_-aJ1bTQbsp6cgLMnX9bj35FJnsznhH64-dqevLM6K93NB6-EQL7Hfwa2TqOv01_gMpEkY6h16nz4wwn5bXX9OLOc-SbZW1vT99CL50PWv4uoMPf7anr_38oeXvAAAA__8fbZbL). You’ve placed your trust, your belief, and your investment behind what we’re building. Because of that support, we’ve accomplished more in the last few months than at any point in our history. This morning alone, we delivered to a record 3.7 million readers, and our revenue is up 24% month-over-month. That’s because of you. _The Flyover_ is building something different: a newsroom for common-sense Americans. A home for people who stopped watching the news because they couldn’t trust it. A publication committed to honesty, fairness, and fact-first reporting. To keep building this movement, reaching 2,000 investors truly matters. So today, I’m being straight with you: we’re close, but [we need your help](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtu3DAQRb-G6lbgQ8-CRYCNuo0bA0lHjMShRIMiF-Ro1_77QIkDpHd7z52Dmfl5Mzfwwcf1B-yo6d0lE_FZAhJhNg4tZghvh11xDlCo5OMsj0Zy2V6EuEhpLPjwYZrK6pnbUVSoRd-pQcihb6tNczEuXLWjamYBnQDVt04hKCWdUL3lldenTAgpheSCD7WCBsQyDG5cHLhZsoaj9ZRyTRsSvkNx4SM9MNdL2qugN6J7YeobkxOTk48PLFS_JR9pw_-aJ1bTQbsp6cgLMnX9bj35FJnsznhH64-dqevLM6K93NB6-EQL7Hfwa2TqOv01_gMpEkY6h16nz4wwn5bXX9OLOc-SbZW1vT99CL50PWv4uoMPf7anr_38oeXvAAAA__8fbZbL). If you’ve considered investing—whether small or large—today would be the day. If _The Flyover_ has earned your trust, we hope you’ll take that final step and become an investor. **[Invest in _The Flyover_](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtu3DAQRb-G6lbgQ8-CRYCNuo0bA0lHjMShRIMiF-Ro1_77QIkDpHd7z52Dmfl5Mzfwwcf1B-yo6d0lE_FZAhJhNg4tZghvh11xDlCo5OMsj0Zy2V6EuEhpLPjwYZrK6pnbUVSoRd-pQcihb6tNczEuXLWjamYBnQDVt04hKCWdUL3lldenTAgpheSCD7WCBsQyDG5cHLhZsoaj9ZRyTRsSvkNx4SM9MNdL2qugN6J7YeobkxOTk48PLFS_JR9pw_-aJ1bTQbsp6cgLMnX9bj35FJnsznhH64-dqevLM6K93NB6-EQL7Hfwa2TqOv01_gMpEkY6h16nz4wwn5bXX9OLOc-SbZW1vT99CL50PWv4uoMPf7anr_38oeXvAAAA__8fbZbL)**

## Dissenting Redistricting Case Judge Lashes Out
Federal judge Jerry Smith, the [lone dissenter in Tuesday’s 2-1 ruling](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO2zAQRL-G6tYQV7ItFSrSsLu0KYUVuZSZ0OSBXJ3svw-kIF9w3QI7mMG8-fUxf1CIIa0_6cmTvHyeE-81sgiX2bPjQvH35lZeIlWpZTvE44wtXkFrQJwdhfie-8ZNS-tG3fCk77du0Djcr81jIr8MzuuR23HAse9u7a3z9jry4Bd399yE6TDTGlFjq9vh0lFP2g6DH60nv6DqW3ZBcrnIg4VfVH185y8uF5ufTZweIp9VdT8UGoVm3_eLjcH-wUfequR0qBSao5ZCE7OlqNAcmQqN1uet0ORNCq2ctwo2J7dZARdq5SQhrXAigJDgzIfCLlQpwZ5PS5Wh0rvCPzywU4UnOYaFfS783whs3qKDhWEvQYSTQtOUyX3uIcZQb3fVt-uTQjyLyffm-JrwbwAAAP__OYyjIA) blocking the redraw of Texas’ congressional map, released his opinion a day after the ruling, sharply criticizing the court’s other two judges in a break from typical judicial decorum. Smith (a Reagan appointee) took offense at the majority opinion being released before he finished his dissent and alleged “pernicious judicial misbehavior” on the part of Judge Jeffrey Brown (a Trump appointee), who wrote the majority decision. “This is the most outrageous conduct by a judge that I have ever encountered,” Smith wrote in his 104-page document, which repeated the phrase “[I dissent](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uhDAQBOCnMR0nvPgMFC7S0F3alGixF3C0_Mhe7ufto7tXSD2jb6T5uQ03jBy3-RtXcvKc9mGjR2YSoTRMFCgh_55hppExS07nu9wNUMG11LoEGAJGfg2mCG6sQqcLcrqxdauhba7F4ozB0HiyMBkAb2091r41FkKHBj3YIro3pjWAhkpX7aVGg9q37dT5CacRlKkoRNnTRRYSemKe-LXfKV38vhbsFpEjq_pLQa-gl4WWyPzOFPSJ5pNR4r4p6P1-JilHFGHKCvqr1XXTQjnvR7niUfoFmWmbKZSfGQV9kVw4HpE5ZtsoU80rxo9dyP_eujv4CwAA__94aX7n)” 15 times and referred to Brown as “a legislator/activist jurist” and “an unskilled magician” who “prefers living in fantasyland.” Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito on Friday [temporarily reinstated Texas’ new congressional map](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OgzAQhJ_GdET2AgEXLq6hy7VXorW9Bp9MQPaSn7c_JXmEq7_RfJr5uUwXjCle529cyfAjbNOV7iURM-UpkKeM6ffwM9mEhUs-XmE9gYSuVqoGmDzG9JzayhsrvVYVGdWfm0HB0HfVYjrsei1716J2vbRW-zZIVN5h01kEV0XzKlMKQIFUcjg12KJywxC0CxgsiFaSj7zlEy_E9MAS0nO7UT65ba2SWZj3IpovAaOAkRdaYkovJmDMNB8JOW5XAaPbjsy1ReZERcDYndXQKF2XY8-0Uv3hb0O94l5_xgoYq2z8fo8pxXLuRSvnFePbUPH_PrsZ-AsAAP__OCSCCw), pausing a lower court ruling that blocked it as a likely racial gerrymander. The map could net Republicans up to five new House seats.
## Residents Seek Higher Ground Amid Flooding
Heavy rains battered Texas Hill Country on Thursday afternoon and evening, causing [flash floods](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOpB3MQEKF39Dl7-9Ei14DT4ZHNmbkLz9iXuF60aa0Yzm-7pPd_LBH-t_2tnI28Xp4DMHFuE0ObacKHw_7cpzoCw5Pa_wMKHCtgKoECdLPnwmXVozKztAyQa6W9MD9l1bbmaxCJqshhYVD50eHDkHulezbWdY5tKbqwwAEVCB6uuGNMHS925YHLkZC63Yeomplo2F35Rd-MQXp3qJexnMJvLIRfOvwLHA8TzP-kNbjJdb4HjdKXB8ecvxEik-D5urLDHtuZqTP9bKhRhtJVtikgpUA9gDqHqTPZTJ2MfpQ_D51hVarTv58Dssf8P1MvgTAAD__3rBf88) in the region and prompting a flash flood emergency warning from the National Weather Service. Dallas also reported almost 4 inches of rain on Thursday, contributing to what is now the wettest November on record for the state. Menard County saw more than [9 inches](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SgyAURp9GOxx-jGBBsU26bLulc5ULskHJAIbk7XfMK2x_5nzznZ_bdAMf_O6-YUNdXjZOO9YcsBRMk0WDCcLvYRzOAXLJ6TjhceKUXwhjhPPJgA_vqW-NnqkZWYuayUEoxpW8tKtepJiBKhyosFYYnOWMUlzGcRkGKY1tvT5ljHHOOGVUdQJ6YItSdlws2Jk3PUXjS0xdWbHgC7IN7_jE1C1xa4NeS3nkRnw1_Nrwa621Oy9UxPsJNPx6JId7IRXS7ndHbIC8EhtiNOSjIxnxTlbvVkzEpXjshjBGVU_Z2CZtHtWH4PMgm566DXz4DJf_5Xpq_hcAAP__IVOAww) of rain, forcing people out of an RV park and directing them to higher ground as floodwaters made roads impassable. Rains dissipated Friday morning, and no casualties have been reported from the flash flooding. You can watch a video of the [flooding here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykULuSozAQ_BqRyYWGd6DgEjJfeiE1oBnQ1YBckmzsv9-yN9gP2LS7q1__rtMVvfhj_Ys72fzkMB10JqGcKU5MjiLK_7tbaRZMOcX7WzxMUEKjjdEAk0Mvr6kunJ1LN5iCrOnaqjfQd02x2YrIMLRAbT83DggHHhh75oEXbrqm8PZtZgyAgdKU_aXCGs3S9zwsjDyDqktyPod4yRtlemJieYUHxcsS9kLslvMtqeqPglHBeBLm7ZtTML7H_IAKxod3FBSMLJg2zRKC88eq04n7LekcziNpf-hPjN68iF7C_cjxVUTrbqcX8antVF2uO3r5NMi_--1h4SsAAP__VDaFZg).
## New Golf Course Makes Top 100 List
Childress Hall’s Upper Course in the Texas Panhandle landed at No. 73 in _Golf_ ’s [top 100 courses](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQxfGnMR2RZwzBFC5uQ5fbbokGPAavhjiyna-3X2VfYetz9Cv-X5f5QlHidftPB7v6Cmm-8rMI18p5Duw5k3zf_caLUKkl3z_ncUaNfQvQIs6eorznrvFu0X6Ehh0MZ2MB7dA3u1sX7jtrwgC-t-CNGXTQYKBbwjgihSa6DwaACKhB25OhjmC1NoxroLCg6jT7WFM-1Z0rv6gEeacH59OajkbcXuutKPNP4aRw2pKEz6BwqpkeLAqndY_iM5fS7iTSXvm5poNzW9OtBa0VTk12_vaMIrGcB9Xp7aAov379W5WHw58AAAD__91idmw) worldwide for 2025-26, marking the state’s only representation on the coveted list. The Upper Course, which opened for preview play in December 2024, was designed by famed architect Tom Doak, who boasts multiple courses on the top 100 list. _Golf_ ’s write-up on the course says its “persistent demand for choices is what makes it so compelling,” adding that its “strategic variety” elevated it to the list. You can see the full [top 100 list here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO8zAQg08jdw4040fkQsXfuMvfbmmMrJGjxSQKJOV1-4WDvcG2HwkS5NdpOVGUeN3-04VtfYW0XPlZhGvlvAT2nEm-735jJ1RqyffdPC2ocWgBWsTFU5T30jfeOu0naNjCcewMoDkOzdmOxntyFEYYJgjUDQMNZuo0MHfOOGii3cMAEAE1aHPoqCdYjQnTGig4VL1mH2vKh3rmyi8qQd7pwfmwpksj9lzrrajun8JZ4bwlCbugcK6ZHiwK5zXdc-Gyo3RrQev2l7TPlMW3nzU4KpybbP3tGUViGY-q19uFonx66t_eeVj8CQAA__9gX3gz).

On this day in 1849, was incorporated in Huntsville on land donated by the family of Stephen F. Austin. Republic of Texas presidents Sam Houston and Anson Jones were charter members of the board of trustees. In 1876, the Presbyterian liberal arts school moved to Sherman. Dallas-based Heritage Auctions just sold a for $9.12 million, shattering the previous record comic book auction sale. Not too shabby for the three brothers who made the rare find in their late mom's attic. If you love Texas history—or know someone who does—the early Black Friday sale is the perfect chance to grab beloved Texas books, maps, and gifts at the lowest prices of the year. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | We're Nearly There Over the last 12 days, we’ve been sprinting toward one goal: reaching 2,000 reader-investors. Today, I want to be fully transparent—we fell short. As I write this, we’re about 147 investors away. Falling short never feels good. And yet, I’m enormously grateful. 1,853 of you have already stepped up . You’ve placed your trust, your belief, and your investment behind what we’re building. Because of that support, we’ve accomplished more in the last few months than at any point in our history. This morning alone, we delivered to a record 3.7 million readers, and our revenue is up 24% month-over-month. That’s because of you. The Flyover is building something different: a newsroom for common-sense Americans. A home for people who stopped watching the news because they couldn’t trust it. A publication committed to honesty, fairness, and fact-first reporting. To keep building this movement, reaching 2,000 investors truly matters. So today, I’m being straight with you: we’re close, but . If you’ve considered investing—whether small or large—today would be the day. If The Flyover has earned your trust, we hope you’ll take that final step and become an investor. | Dissenting Redistricting Case Judge Lashes Out Federal judge Jerry Smith, the blocking the redraw of Texas’ congressional map, released his opinion a day after the ruling, sharply criticizing the court’s other two judges in a break from typical judicial decorum. Smith (a Reagan appointee) took offense at the majority opinion being released before he finished his dissent and alleged “pernicious judicial misbehavior” on the part of Judge Jeffrey Brown (a Trump appointee), who wrote the majority decision. “This is the most outrageous conduct by a judge that I have ever encountered,” Smith wrote in his 104-page document, which repeated the phrase “” 15 times and referred to Brown as “a legislator/activist jurist” and “an unskilled magician” who “prefers living in fantasyland.” Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito on Friday , pausing a lower court ruling that blocked it as a likely racial gerrymander. The map could net Republicans up to five new House seats. Residents Seek Higher Ground Amid Flooding Heavy rains battered Texas Hill Country on Thursday afternoon and evening, causing in the region and prompting a flash flood emergency warning from the National Weather Service. Dallas also reported almost 4 inches of rain on Thursday, contributing to what is now the wettest November on record for the state. Menard County saw more than of rain, forcing people out of an RV park and directing them to higher ground as floodwaters made roads impassable. Rains dissipated Friday morning, and no casualties have been reported from the flash flooding. You can watch a video of the . New Golf Course Makes Top 100 List Childress Hall’s Upper Course in the Texas Panhandle landed at No. 73 in Golf ’s worldwide for 2025-26, marking the state’s only representation on the coveted list. The Upper Course, which opened for preview play in December 2024, was designed by famed architect Tom Doak, who boasts multiple courses on the top 100 list. Golf ’s write-up on the course says its “persistent demand for choices is what makes it so compelling,” adding that its “strategic variety” elevated it to the list. This holiday season, we’re slashing prices to bring you Texas-sized savings on our Texas history books, incredible, detailed Texas Maps from the General Land Office, and unique Texas-themed art and stocking stuffers. () ➤ Statewide: The Texas Alcoholic Beverage Commission has proposed rules to implement Gov. Greg Abbott’s executive order regulating THC products despite a federal ban scheduled to take effect next year. () ➤ Arlington: Police arrested Janie Perkins, 63, for the 1991 murder of Cynthia Gonzalez after students enrolled in a UT Arlington criminology course prompted investigators to question her further. "When we launched our cold case partnership with UTA, we always hoped we’d get an outcome like this one day," said Chief of Police Al Jones. () ➤ Plano: Two North Texas men have been indicted for an alleged plot to invade an island off Haiti. Gavin Weisenburg, 21, and Tanner Thomas, 20, allegedly planned to murder the male inhabitants and kidnap the women and children. ()** ➤ Harris County: A pilot was forced to crash-land his small airplane near Grand Parkway late Thursday night shortly after takeoff from West Houston Airport. The pilot was alone on the plane and not hurt in the incident. subject: Treasury Moves to Block Tax Credits for Illegal Immigrants in Sweeping New Rule
body:

The rule reclassifies the refundable portions of the Earned Income Tax Credit, Additional Child Tax [...]

body:
Only read if you can handle the cold-hard TRUTH

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bx27/?__vbtrk=MzM1MTAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1MTAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)Oh my gosh, Friend. You’re too kind. Just by opening this email, you’re doing me a huge favor. _Only about 25% of folks will show me that kindness. _
Can you do me one more favor and just hear me out through the end? It would make my day.
**[However, only read if you can handle the cold-hard TRUTH:](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bx27/?__vbtrk=MzM1MTAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1MTAzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
I’m Ashley Hinson. I’m NOT some career politician who thinks DC is the end-all-be-all.
I used to be a local reporter in what coastal elites would call “flyover country,” and it was my job to tell the stories of my community.
I’m also a mom of two boys.
I saw the woke indoctrination in their schools and saw political correctness become more important than making sure they grew up in a country with a thriving economy and new opportunities.
**Now is the hard part... _the TRUTH:_ **
I’ve been to the belly of the beast, and I can tell you – so many _DC politicians don’t care about the American people_. They just care about getting more power for themselves.
That’s why I announced I’m running for Senate. **We need a pro-Trump mom in the Senate** to give the establishment the swift kick in the butt they deserve![SUPPORT ASHLEY HINSON

clean_body: Only read if you can handle the cold-hard TRUTH my gosh, Friend. You’re too kind. Just by opening this email, you’re doing me a huge favor. Only about 25% of folks will show me that kindness. Can you do me one more favor and just hear me out through the end? It would make my day. I’m Ashley Hinson. I’m NOT some career politician who thinks DC is the end-all-be-all. I used to be a local reporter in what coastal elites would call “flyover country,” and it was my job to tell the stories of my community. I’m also a mom of two boys. I saw the woke indoctrination in their schools and saw political correctness become more important than making sure they grew up in a country with a thriving economy and new opportunities. Now is the hard part... the TRUTH: I’ve been to the belly of the beast, and I can tell you – so many DC politicians don’t care about the American people. They just care about getting more power for themselves. That’s why I announced I’m running for Senate. We need a pro-Trump mom in the Senate to give the establishment the swift kick in the butt they deserve you for taking the time out of your day to read this email all the way to the end. Even if you cannot make a donation today, it means the world to me that out of all the emails you get in a day, you chose to hear me out. name: Haley Stevens
subject: We're made in MI. And we're proud of it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
The full force of the GOP and their megadonors are coming after Haley as a TOP target for defeat.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb39a9669-9a27-4e3a-9c9f-bf22c76d2749/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hi Peter – it’s Haley. I can’t wait to tell you all about the first leg of my Made in Michigan tour. But first, I need to ask: [Will you chip in $3 right now – split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – to help us hit tonight’s $50,000 fundraising goal?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0d5e676-5ccf-48e1-a5f1-5651ab58c0c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $3](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1587dd63-f35d-44cb-893d-f32512d60a24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’ve got to tell you, Peter – nothing makes me prouder to be from Michigan than meeting the people who make this state what it is: Hardworking, tough-as-nails, and full of heart. We were made in Michigan. And we’re proud of it. I grew up surrounded by grit and grease – my family ran a landscaping business, and my dad was a teacher in Detroit public schools. That’s where I learned the values of hard work, perseverance, and to always fight for what’s right. I’ve fought for Michiganders my whole career – from helping lead the auto rescue that helped save over 200,000 Michigan jobs, to flipping a red seat blue in 2018, to delivering for working families in Congress. Now, I’m running for Senate, and we’re facing our biggest challenge yet: Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers. And a GOP super PAC has already raised $5 million to support him. The Hill even named Michigan one of the top five Senate seats most likely to flip, and experts say Senate control could be decided by our battleground race. I know the stakes. But I was raised the Michigan way – I don’t back down from a fight. I need you with me to win, Peter. Polls show I’m leading Rogers, but only by a little. I truly can’t do it without the support of this grassroots team. [Will you split $3 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now to help us hit our $50,000 goal and keep Michigan blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5f8d3ef-f83a-4652-9aee-181ea8e79433/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $3](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2cb93a6-6c03-46bd-add2-407c1f953706/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57c2ff2e-961e-4810-add2-382c50e4d185/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T403d690b-0b8e-40c2-9eef-c71c608b5a0c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks for standing with me. Made in Michigan, Haley Stevens [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d5abdfe-a5bb-409a-8652-cfb28e91ec92/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te04a1f41-2411-45f8-802f-e6a2460faf08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
