name: =?utf-8?b?SmFtZXMgT+KAmUtlZWZl?=
subject: Dark Nightmares
body:
I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement."

| | [****](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkTGPnDAQhX-N6UB4Brxs4SISoru0KdGsPctah21kG_L3I290SpPiupn33jzp0_z6WD_I7S5sP8mzNpdbU14tpc_gtlfxlDiv0MPYStkCVFM2VhurEBrW8qZwkngDbF6arbGM_cOoaewBn2ZgC-M0KFRs6Gkbp2uTlAAS5CinbgKytn_Q3SDC_U5i6M_DUuHcmRgyp4uKu9iFEOsUQ2eib3b9KuXIAn8IWAQsmc2ZuKPANpaaELDET-Yne7aOthTPo0p-aytY-4-s9Y_2iAcJXM7i1xzPZFjg_J-oAFUjtfH0Auf32V_NkD_IbUHg_MX35cRQOBSBs7mcAEU-nu8VxiZpe_x2--6yuomh3zy5_Y1XvvmFS8OfAAAA__9luZQ8) [****](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkTGPnDAQhX-N6UB4Brxs4SISoru0KdGsPctah21kG_L3I290SpPiupn33jzp0_z6WD_I7S5sP8mzNpdbU14tpc_gtlfxlDiv0MPYStkCVFM2VhurEBrW8qZwkngDbF6arbGM_cOoaewBn2ZgC-M0KFRs6Gkbp2uTlAAS5CinbgKytn_Q3SDC_U5i6M_DUuHcmRgyp4uKu9iFEOsUQ2eib3b9KuXIAn8IWAQsmc2ZuKPANpaaELDET-Yne7aOthTPo0p-aytY-4-s9Y_2iAcJXM7i1xzPZFjg_J-oAFUjtfH0Auf32V_NkD_IbUHg_MX35cRQOBSBs7mcAEU-nu8VxiZpe_x2--6yuomh3zy5_Y1XvvmFS8OfAAAA__9luZQ8) Dear Patriot,

I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed.

In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was **some demon** , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "**I'm in your basement.** "

I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone.

Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. **These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before**.

The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that **it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation.**

I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help.

First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you."

Secondly, [**your support is needed**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkTGPnDAQhX-N6UB4Brxs4SISoru0KdGsPctah21kG_L3I290SpPiupn33jzp0_z6WD_I7S5sP8mzNpdbU14tpc_gtlfxlDiv0MPYStkCVFM2VhurEBrW8qZwkngDbF6arbGM_cOoaewBn2ZgC-M0KFRs6Gkbp2uTlAAS5CinbgKytn_Q3SDC_U5i6M_DUuHcmRgyp4uKu9iFEOsUQ2eib3b9KuXIAn8IWAQsmc2ZuKPANpaaELDET-Yne7aOthTPo0p-aytY-4-s9Y_2iAcJXM7i1xzPZFjg_J-oAFUjtfH0Auf32V_NkD_IbUHg_MX35cRQOBSBs7mcAEU-nu8VxiZpe_x2--6yuomh3zy5_Y1XvvmFS8OfAAAA__9luZQ8). [**Any amount that you can contribute is appreciated**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkTGPnDAQhX-N6UB4Brxs4SISoru0KdGsPctah21kG_L3I290SpPiupn33jzp0_z6WD_I7S5sP8mzNpdbU14tpc_gtlfxlDiv0MPYStkCVFM2VhurEBrW8qZwkngDbF6arbGM_cOoaewBn2ZgC-M0KFRs6Gkbp2uTlAAS5CinbgKytn_Q3SDC_U5i6M_DUuHcmRgyp4uKu9iFEOsUQ2eib3b9KuXIAn8IWAQsmc2ZuKPANpaaELDET-Yne7aOthTPo0p-aytY-4-s9Y_2iAcJXM7i1xzPZFjg_J-oAFUjtfH0Auf32V_NkD_IbUHg_MX35cRQOBSBs7mcAEU-nu8VxiZpe_x2--6yuomh3zy5_Y1XvvmFS8OfAAAA__9luZQ8).

This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. [**Please, donate whatever you can today**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyMkTGPnDAQhX-N6UB4Brxs4SISoru0KdGsPctah21kG_L3I290SpPiupn33jzp0_z6WD_I7S5sP8mzNpdbU14tpc_gtlfxlDiv0MPYStkCVFM2VhurEBrW8qZwkngDbF6arbGM_cOoaewBn2ZgC-M0KFRs6Gkbp2uTlAAS5CinbgKytn_Q3SDC_U5i6M_DUuHcmRgyp4uKu9iFEOsUQ2eib3b9KuXIAn8IWAQsmc2ZuKPANpaaELDET-Yne7aOthTPo0p-aytY-4-s9Y_2iAcJXM7i1xzPZFjg_J-oAFUjtfH0Auf32V_NkD_IbUHg_MX35cRQOBSBs7mcAEU-nu8VxiZpe_x2--6yuomh3zy5_Y1XvvmFS8OfAAAA__9luZQ8).

Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth, James O'Keefe

clean_body: I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon, the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement." | | Dear Patriot, I've been having nightmares recently that are dark beyond description. Terrifying. One occurred at 3:30 in the morning on the day that Charlie was killed. In one nightmare, a landline phone next to my bed rang. I answered, and on the other end was some demon , the most haunting voice I've heard in my life, saying, "I'm in your basement. " I sat up immediately, not knowing if it was real or a dream. My hands ran alongside my bed to feel the fabric in the darkness. It took some time to recognize that I was awake. I looked at my nightstand, and there was no phone. Those who know much more about God and the Devil than I do say that this is an example of spiritual warfare. They tell me that it's meant to terrify me, to make me question myself and my own sanity. These nightmares, this evil, come just before a story OMG will be breaking that I believe will expose evil in a way we've never seen before. The story was placed on hold due to the shock and grief we've all felt for Charlie Kirk. I used to run stories by Charlie to get his feedback. I relayed our next release to Charlie before he was shot. It was the last text Charlie Kirk ever sent me. I prefer to keep the message private, but he understood the significance of the story and that it strikes at the heart of evil in our nation. I'm reluctant to "hype" stories anymore. That's not my intent. But I am asking for your help. First, I'm humbly asking for your prayers for me and OMG's staff. If you're a believer, I don't need to say anything else, other than "thank you." Secondly, . . This story was one of our least expensive to produce, and you'll see why when it comes out. But it will open the floodgates of truth, and we need to be prepared for that. This story has the potential to change the world, but that's not up to me. OMG, reports the truth, the world decides. But I would be negligent in my duties if we're not prepared to deal with a flood of high-level whistleblowers after this release. And that's where your support is needed. . Thank you again for all that you do and, as always, stay tuned. In Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | THIS RFK Jr shocker is so outrageous... it could get him impeached: . Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. Peter -- As I sat down at my desk to review our membership rolls, I couldn't help but notice your name is missing. **Your Membership with the State GOP has expired** , and I'm left wondering if we'll ever see your name on our list again.
I remember the day you joined us like it was yesterday. We shared a passion for conservative values, a passion for making our state a better place. And now, it seems like that's all being torn apart.
I know life gets busy and sometimes things fall through the cracks. But the thought of losing you and not having your voice or your support, is a hard pill to swallow. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, one last time.

| Following MAGA's blowout defeat in the critical Pennsylvania Supreme Court the right has found themselves in an existential crisis.
Recently, at a meeting of the Federalist Society (the far-right organization focused on judicial capture and responsible for the GOP majority on the US Supreme Court), Chad Mizelle, a former Trump DOJ appointee laid out a new approach to winning judicial fights in the aftermath of PA:
Putting down Justices like "stray cats."
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011JpR0WVZGAnRgv5d-UxVQsIqpiXkN3vPsEiHBCANHoyyfX7Fep3156IGslXNwznYeBx3DA5DaMuRIhBy9i9Raalk0vNtqT27-9nmDfQRuKeiCH2GSkHdll-mwFt-ekGxdx1KREGM-393WzXIxZnLvcHrs8oJcppKDEpIiOvvr9drd47VOfjIkVYd4bqas9vJwNNbpXF98pmMc_lofgqc26oQ6GJe0_fE&c=4io7W3ZwNOfWF5qj1-qC529V-hTevAPYxoSe6Qqskie5aRiPjK85zw==&ch=UAILI4LBwpKNIKSw4S7NbBKGF7-2uI5g83iVlJ-G0XjUWcGzme2PGA==)
---
This is the new strategy that many on the extreme-right, including those in positions of power, are adopting: "If you can't beat em kill em."
Already we've seen this strategy begin to play out. Just last month a South Carolina Supreme Court judge who ruled against Trump had her home burn down in a suspicious massive explosion that many suspected was arson.
The reason why they are resorting to this is because the left is making a comeback in the fight for our nation's courts. On Tuesday, Defend our Courts, helped orchestrate a landslide victory that will all but guarantee Democratic control for the next decade. It sent a resounding message to MAGA: Don't f*** with our courts.
MAGA can't win these judicial fights when voters are educated on the stakes of what right-wing capture of our judiciary entails. They can try to circumvent the voters' will and win through violence but in the long run that strategy will only alienate them with the American people.
These courts are the only thing standing in the way of the full implementation of Trump's agenda and if we can keep up the pressure and keep pulling off victories in supreme court races like we just did in Pennsylvania - we will survive these next three years of Trump and reclaim America.
Winning the fight in PA required going for broke, literally, and we owe tens of thousands of dollars to our hardworking staff. [To move on to the coming judicial fights in MI, AZ, and GA, we need to close the books on PA. Can you please make a donation of $50, $25, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to help us pay our team? ](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011JpR0WVZGAnRgv5d-UxVQsIqpiXkN3vPsEiHBCANHoyyfX7Fep3156IGslXNwznYeBx3DA5DaMuRIhBy9i9Raalk0vNtqT27-9nmDfQRuKeiCH2GSkHdll-mwFt-ekGxdx1KREGM-393WzXIxZnLvcHrs8oJcppKDEpIiOvvr9drd47VOfjIkVYd4bqas9vJwNNbpXF98pk85MRx_t5sIK4GSXOHq-fP&c=4io7W3ZwNOfWF5qj1-qC529V-hTevAPYxoSe6Qqskie5aRiPjK85zw==&ch=UAILI4LBwpKNIKSw4S7NbBKGF7-2uI5g83iVlJ-G0XjUWcGzme2PGA==)

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Trouble on the Right – why conservatives need to be wary
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/bewary?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
I only recently learned what a “groyper” is - you may or may not be familiar with the term?

>From what I can tell, a groyper is a hardline white nationalist. Often anti-Semitic, groypers are hostile to mainstream conservatives. To the extent they have a coherent agenda, groypers seem more national socialism than free-market capitalism.

Having been involved in the conservative movement for three decades, I’d hesitate to call anyone with such views conservative. Indeed, I’d argue people that think like that are essentially hardline leftists.

A generation or two ago, what it meant to be conservative tended to be defined by a small circle of influential thinkers. Figures like William F. Buckley Jr. and Russell Kirk articulated what it meant to be one of us.

Today, of course, it’s more complicated. One of the consequences of the digital revolution we’re living through is that anyone can define (and brand) themselves however they like.

If a small but loud group of groypers - whose ideas are as ugly as the green frog meme they inexplicably rally around - insist on calling themselves “conservative,” there’s a real risk that they end up shaping, in the public mind, what conservatism actually means.

Things aren’t helped by the fact that as in the early days of the printing press, when pamphleteers produced all sorts of scurrilous tracts, the digital revolution is still in the phase of rewarding all sorts of attention-seeking drivel.

Look at the mess that the left has got into in recent years, as it has been forced into taking indefensible positions. From denying basic biology (no, a man cannot become a woman) to calls for defunding the police, progressive politics in both America and Britain has increasingly been shaped by its most extreme and unrepresentative activists.

The groypers might turn out to be little more than a passing meme, but here’s why I worry about the long term direction of politics in America and the wider West.

The world we live in is the product of the idea that all people are created equal.

That’s not to say that we are all the same. But it does mean that we are all of equal worth, and that we should be treated equally under the law.

When Thomas Jefferson penned the Declaration of Independence, the principle that “all men are created equal” was a radical, revolutionary idea.

By the time Martin Luther King Jr. dreamed of a color-blind society where people are judged “not by the color of their skin, but by the content of their character,” that same principle had become the established moral orthodoxy.

Somewhere between Martin Luther King Jr.’s 1963 speech and the present day, the political left abandoned the ideal of equality before the law. In its place emerged a new framework: one that measures a person’s intrinsic worth by their position in an ever-shifting hierarchy of victimhood. Under this neo-Marxist lens, immutable characteristics - race, sex, sexuality - now determine moral value, assigning guilt to the so-called oppressors and virtue to the so-called oppressed.

This is what spawned leftwing ‘woke’ ideology. Critical race theory, critical gender theory, and related doctrines took root in academia, then seeped into corporate HR departments, government bureaucracies, and the public sector at large.

That is why, for years, American university admissions offices and major corporations have openly discriminated on the basis of race - often under the banner of “diversity” or “equity.” It is also why, in my native England - the country that gave the world the ideal of common law (a law that is genuinely common to all) - the legal system now explicitly grants preferential treatment to individuals with certain “protected characteristics.”

What if we are now witnessing the emergence of a mirror-image, right-wing “woke” ideology? What if voices on the right begin to say, “Very well - if we are no longer permitted to believe that all are created equal, then let’s not”?

The progressive left has spent decades attributing unequal outcomes to systemic oppression. What happens when the right stops arguing about the fairness of the system altogether and instead attributes those same unequal outcomes to inherent differences?

I fear the left may one day soon come to regret ever abandoning the principle that all of us, without exception, are created equal.

A few years ago, Joseph Henrich’s book _The WEIRDest People in the World_ made a compelling case that Western exceptionalism is real. Westerners, he argued, are genuinely psychological outliers: markedly more individualistic, analytical, guilt-oriented, and trusting of strangers than the rest of humanity. These peculiar traits, Henrich contends, are what turned the West into the primary engine of modern science, innovation, and prosperity.

I happen to agree with much of Henrich’s analysis, although I am not convinced of his explanation.

The danger is that if the universalist view of human nature is abandoned - if the left’s hierarchy of victimhood is answered by a right-wing hierarchy - much of the traditional conservative narrative collapses with it.

We conservatives must be more ruthless in policing our own boundaries. We cannot flirt with ideas that are as big a threat to conservatism as socialism, and pretend they are our ideas.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=010aed3ca1&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Onward,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Speaker Johnson: Denounce Trump’s Death Threats Against Dems
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Speaker Johnson to Denounce Trump’s Death Threats Against Dems](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73b5d88d-51b6-47d3-bb35-676e59f8116f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37c34461-ca26-4afb-8f07-053037282a38/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This really isn't hard -- when a wacko threatens to execute the people you work with every day, you denounce it, at the very least. But Speaker Mike Johnson, the biggest wuss to ever serve in Congress, is making excuses for it. Donald Trump’s rhetoric toward Democrats has long been nuts, but is becoming increasingly unhinged and dangerously violent — [**and now it has crossed a line no president in modern American history has crossed.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T702d26bc-735b-4351-8d3f-cca641d84b16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) First, Democrats released a video warning U.S. troops to resist illegal orders from Donald Trump — a constitutional safeguard rooted in the duty to refuse unlawful commands. Then, Trump escalated by calling for Democrats to be executed for “sedition,” openly demanding the death penalty for his political opponents. Now, Speaker Mike Johnson is making excuses for Trump’s rhetoric and shifting the blame onto Democrats instead of condemning a sitting president’s threats of political violence. [**Tell Speaker Mike Johnson: Denounce Trump’s death threats against Democrats. Reject political violence. Stand up for democracy before it is too late.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef3205b4-bf70-4836-aaf3-8fbebb9fa6a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump’s call for the death penalty is a direct threat against elected officials and millions of Americans who support them — something no prominent Democrat has ever come close to endorsing in the modern era. And the timing could not be more dangerous. In the wake of Charlie Kirk’s assassination, Republican leaders have been warning about the consequences of incendiary rhetoric. Yet Trump — the President of the United States — is now promoting far more extreme, explicit, and authoritarian violence than anything Democrats have said. Political violence cannot be condemned on Monday and excused on Tuesday. If Speaker Johnson refuses to denounce Trump’s statements, he is telling the country that threats of execution are acceptable political discourse. He is signaling to extremists that violence is permissible. And he is abandoning his responsibility to protect Congress, safeguard democracy, and defend the rule of law. [**Tell Speaker Johnson to choose country over Trump. Condemn these death threats now — before Trump’s words become someone else’s actions.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd5253cf-e569-4828-a7a8-d6a78bfe6ac5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: If I was trans everyone would pause and listen...
body:
Kathy, in a secular space, highlights how people are often open to discussing other faiths or identities but react negatively when Jesus and the Bible are mentioned, and she emphasizes the importance of remembering faith, wins, and joys, even in politics.

* * *
Well, this wasn’t on our 2025 bingo card, Peter:
After the shutdown revealed they have NO plan, **Republicans worried about next year’s elections have suddenly realized they need to address America’s health care crisis.**
While they figure that out...here’s what Democrats have done on health care:
✅ Brought America's uninsured rate to a historic low through the ACA
✅ Created enhanced subsidies that helped 24.3 million Americans afford coverage
✅ Reduced medical debt through Medicaid expansion
✅ Fighting _right now_ to extend subsidies and keep premiums affordable
And the Republicans who are under pressure and now scrambling to put together proposals:
❌ Let enhanced subsidies expire, doubling or tripling premiums for millions of families
❌ Have no Obamacare alternative despite Trump promising one for over a year
❌ Blocked every Democratic effort to extend affordable coverage during the shutdown
❌ Want to replace Obamacare subsidies with Health Savings Accounts that only benefit wealthy Americans
**So, we’ll ask again, Peter: Who do YOU trust more to make health care affordable?**

name: KMR HQ
subject: Major update (re: the Cook Political Report)
body:
|
#
We have a major update, friend. Election experts at the _Cook Political Report_ just determined that MI-08 is the “**tipping point** ” seat that could decide control of the House next year. **It’s no exaggeration to say that if Democrats want to win the majority, this is the race that gets us there.** **But here’s the reality:** MAGA has continued to pummel us with attacks. As of today, they’ve put nearly $1 million behind ads smearing Kristen – and as we get closer to Election Day, we expect them to keep flooding the airwaves. This doesn’t come as a surprise. Last cycle, Republicans poured more than $12.5 million into this district. They’ll stop at nothing to overwhelm us. [**We need your support now. Can you rush in a donation of $3 or more to help us fight back and keep this seat blue? body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23650%2E4449941%2EGABXoz) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23650%2E4449941%2EGABXoz) [ **URGENT FROM _NBC:_
“TRUMP JUST REALIGNED THE ENTIRE POLITICAL MAP. DEMOCRATS HAVE ‘NO EASY PATH’ TO FIX IT” **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70143?t=3&akid=23650%2E4449941%2EGABXoz) For too long, we thought our democracy was beyond saving – but now, brave Democrats like Elizabeth Warren are working around the clock to ABOLISH the Electoral College once and for all!! []() So we’re launching a NATIONWIDE petition, and our goal is to gather 100,000 signatures by midnight to show Congress there’s a critical mass in favor of abolishing the Electoral College. [ **Will you sign onto our petition right now if you support ABOLISHING the Electoral College?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70143?t=4&akid=23650%2E4449941%2EGABXoz) | [SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70143?t=5&akid=23650%2E4449941%2EGABXoz)
---
Listen,

**Donald Trump only became President in 2016 because of the Electoral College.**

Remember, Hillary Clinton won the election by 2.9 million votes! _But the outdated Electoral College handed the White House to Trump._

That’s why Elizabeth Warren is speaking out in favor of abolishing the Electoral College:
[]()
She couldn’t be more right, team!! But Trump and his MAGA cronies are going to throw everything they have at her and any other Democrats working to get rid of this unfair and outdated system.

[**We need to show massive support to help Senator Warren abolish the Electoral College – before another CORRUPT, UNPOPULAR, DANGEROUS candidate becomes President _ever again._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70143?t=6&akid=23650%2E4449941%2EGABXoz)
[ **If we can get 10,000 supporters from your area to sign on, we’ll build MASSIVE momentum to hit our critical signature goal before midnight. PLEASE team, will you sign on if you support finally ABOLISHING the Electoral College? >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70143?t=7&akid=23650%2E4449941%2EGABXoz)
[SIGN NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70143?t=8&akid=23650%2E4449941%2EGABXoz)

subject: What the 2026 map could look like

body:
What could the 2026 midterm map look like if Donald Trump gets his way?
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119766917/584165689/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0MDMzMTkxLWFiYzctZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k2rsinR8o19JTJXX0bj9g4mr1mT2KOmH-1SB7mvPWOE=&emci=e5b2189c-19c7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=64033191-abc7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, What could the 2026 midterm map look like if Donald Trump gets his way? Let’s recap what’s happened so far:
* The Texas GOP forced through a mid-decade gerrymander that they believe could pick up as many as **five** seats.
* North Carolina pushed through an even more gerrymandered map than it already had, hoping to gain **one** extra seat for Republicans.
* Missouri rushed through a redraw that could allow the GOP to steal **one more** seat.

Meanwhile:
* California voters overwhelmingly approved a map that could help level the playing field following Texas’s gerrymander, which might flip as many as **five** seats for Democrats.
* A Utah court struck down a GOP-gerrymandered map and approved a new one that could give Democrats a competitive chance at picking up **one** seat.

This is all theoretical, and the voters still get to weigh in next year, but right now, this redistricting crisis hasn’t led to the outcome the White House wants. That’s why states like Florida are preparing to try to steal more seats for Donald Trump ahead of the 2026 midterms. Just last week, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis tweeted “Stay tuned...” in response to reports about the Florida legislature pushing through a mid-decade map redraw. And many states are watching the Supreme Court closely, hoping they’ll strike down a part of the Voting Rights Act that could give several states a chance to pass racial gerrymanders. **Americans have been rising up against these craven power grabs. Our movement is fighting back against Trump’s bullying and bribing by organizing, advocating, and voting to preserve our democracy. But we know that our opponents are doubling down — and so we can’t afford to let up.** [**Your donation to the NDRC will allow us to fight for maps that truly reflect the voters’ will — not Donald Trump’s whims. As map manipulators gear up for their biggest push yet, will you support our work to make sure we have the resources to hold the line and fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119766923/584165705/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_2026Map_email_20251122-NDRC-Tier1-2026Map_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251122-NDRC-Tier1-2026Map_&utm_campaign=2026Map&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0MDMzMTkxLWFiYzctZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k2rsinR8o19JTJXX0bj9g4mr1mT2KOmH-1SB7mvPWOE=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Amid the GOP’s cynical power grabs, something else is happening. Voters can see right through their attempts to hoard power.
Their stranglehold in Indiana is starting to crack as Indiana voters rise up to reject map meddling. Donald Trump even threatened to endorse the opponents of any Republican lawmakers who refuse to go along with his redistricting schemes.
And in the Show Me State, where voters overwhelmingly oppose the mid-decade power grab, Missouri voters may have the final say on their gerrymandered congressional map at the ballot box through referendum. Weeks ahead of their deadline, more than 150,000 people signed the petition to send the new map to a vote where it could be vetoed by the people.
**We have to be laser-focused on ensuring that these Republican gerrymandering attempts badly backfire. We have to be ready for whatever they are planning to throw at us next. And with your support, the NDRC won’t let up.**
[**Donate today to fund our work fighting for a fair democracy in 2026 and beyond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119767017/584165893/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_2026Map_email_20251122-NDRC-Tier1-2026Map_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251122-NDRC-Tier1-2026Map_&utm_campaign=2026Map&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0MDMzMTkxLWFiYzctZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k2rsinR8o19JTJXX0bj9g4mr1mT2KOmH-1SB7mvPWOE=)

clean_body: What could the 2026 midterm map look like if Donald Trump gets his way? | Peter, What could the 2026 midterm map look like if Donald Trump gets his way? Let’s recap what’s happened so far: The Texas GOP forced through a mid-decade gerrymander that they believe could pick up as many as five seats. North Carolina pushed through an even more gerrymandered map than it already had, hoping to gain one extra seat for Republicans. Missouri rushed through a redraw that could allow the GOP to steal one more seat. Meanwhile: California voters overwhelmingly approved a map that could help level the playing field following Texas’s gerrymander, which might flip as many as five seats for Democrats. A Utah court struck down a GOP-gerrymandered map and approved a new one that could give Democrats a competitive chance at picking up one seat. This is all theoretical, and the voters still get to weigh in next year, but right now, this redistricting crisis hasn’t led to the outcome the White House wants. That’s why states like Florida are preparing to try to steal more seats for Donald Trump ahead of the 2026 midterms. Just last week, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis tweeted “Stay tuned...” in response to reports about the Florida legislature pushing through a mid-decade map redraw. And many states are watching the Supreme Court closely, hoping they’ll strike down a part of the Voting Rights Act that could give several states a chance to pass racial gerrymanders. Americans have been rising up against these craven power grabs. Our movement is fighting back against Trump’s bullying and bribing by organizing, advocating, and voting to preserve our democracy. But we know that our opponents are doubling down — and so we can’t afford to let up. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Amid the GOP’s cynical power grabs, something else is happening. Voters can see right through their attempts to hoard power. Their stranglehold in Indiana is starting to crack as Indiana voters rise up to reject map meddling. Donald Trump even threatened to endorse the opponents of any Republican lawmakers who refuse to go along with his redistricting schemes. And in the Show Me State, where voters overwhelmingly oppose the mid-decade power grab, Missouri voters may have the final say on their gerrymandered congressional map at the ballot box through referendum. Weeks ahead of their deadline, more than 150,000 people signed the petition to send the new map to a vote where it could be vetoed by the people. We have to be laser-focused on ensuring that these Republican gerrymandering attempts badly backfire. We have to be ready for whatever they are planning to throw at us next. And with your support, the NDRC won’t let up. = — Team NDRC = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |

name: Team Shontel Brown
subject: He withdrew a plan to require airlines to compensate passengers for delays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Trump has only worked to make life more difficult for the American people.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119776083/584193154/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251121Plane_N_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzJiOTFjMi1hZmM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K53djLsO7fhCqxUGlNV_khTUZLzdXfnGnMB4n3z1RsA=) Peter – need more proof that Trump values corporations and billionaires over the hardworking people of our nation?

**Days before one of the biggest travel days of the year, Trump announced that he was withdrawing a plan requiring airlines to compensate passengers when US flights are disrupted at the fault of carriers – up to $775 for longer delays – because it was an “unnecessary regulatory burden.”**

This rule was proposed under President Biden, after Southwest Airlines canceled nearly 17,000 flights around the year-end holidays in 2022, leaving two million passengers stranded. The U.S. Department of Transportation announced a $140 million civil penalty against the airline, with the majority of the penalty going to compensate passengers affected by cancellations or delays.

As reported by _CNN_ , Trump is also working to rescind regulations that airlines must disclose service fees, make it harder for consumers to get ticket refunds when a flight is cancelled, and revisit rules on ticket pricing and advertising.

**Trump has _only_ worked to make life more difficult for the American people. When he’s not building multi-billion dollar ballrooms, he’s attacking food assistance, enacting tariffs to increase the price of everyday goods, making healthcare premiums skyrocket, and now this. We must fight back.**

[**That is the difference between Democratic and Republican leadership. Help us fight back by taking back control of the House by rushing $5 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119776088/584193185/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251121Plane_N_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzJiOTFjMi1hZmM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K53djLsO7fhCqxUGlNV_khTUZLzdXfnGnMB4n3z1RsA=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately:_ | | [$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119776092/584193215/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251121Plane_N_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzJiOTFjMi1hZmM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K53djLsO7fhCqxUGlNV_khTUZLzdXfnGnMB4n3z1RsA=)

| _**LISTEN! LISTEN! LISTEN!**_ Democrats are gaining momentum to REMOVE Trump from office via the 25th Amendment!

Thank you,
The Voter Protection Project

**UPDATE: SCRUTINY GROWS OVER TRUMP COMPETENCE AS DEMOCRATS CALL FOR REMOVAL >>**
[**_We need to know if Democrats in your state agree: Should Congress invoke the 25th amendment to REMOVE Donald Trump from office? »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20251122_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=21965%2E878179%2EB3p8Bz)

Donald Trump is STEALING House seats in Louisiana, Utah, Texas, North Carolina, and more...

He’s trying to RIP the Voting Rights Act to shreds...

_He even posted pictures of himself as a KING!_

The Voter Protection Project

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21965%2E878179%2EB3p8Bz). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21965%2E878179%2EB3p8Bz).**

| INSIDER ALERT: Massive Survival Food Overstock - Shocking Discounts Inside! | **INSIDER ALERT:** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b9c6fe8006faa166f61d3f239f815fefefadd4b805b837b5925f9af63278f183b24eafdd080f7eb4f6a63d4385a70060e7bfa7f8721821a63cfe6bc9a093e173) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b9c6fe8006faa166f61d3f239f815fefefadd4b805b837b5925f9af63278f183b24eafdd080f7eb4f6a63d4385a70060e7bfa7f8721821a63cfe6bc9a093e173) **This RED HOT deal is vanishing by the minute. ACT FAST and grab yours now before it's gone:** [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these 4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b9c6fe8006faa166f61d3f239f815fefefadd4b805b837b5925f9af63278f183b24eafdd080f7eb4f6a63d4385a70060e7bfa7f8721821a63cfe6bc9a093e173) If you've been watching the headlines, you already know - the threat of food shortages, blackouts, and supply chain failures is more real than ever. Our 4Patriots **4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE Survival Food Kits** have been flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. Why? Because people are waking up to the truth - you can't count on the system anymore. So we gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: **produce as many kits as humanly possible.** And wow... did he ever deliver. The result? **A tidal wave of inventory just crashed into our warehouse - more kits than we have space for.** Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your help. **This is your chance to take advantage of our mistake.** We're slashing prices and practically *giving away* these premium survival food kits - just to move them fast. When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for your family... **you're helping an American-owned company stay afloat through a supply chain nightmare.** And yes - **you'll get a 2 additional FREE BONUSES** as our thank you. [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these 4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b9c6fe8006faa166f61d3f239f815fefefadd4b805b837b5925f9af63278f183b24eafdd080f7eb4f6a63d4385a70060e7bfa7f8721821a63cfe6bc9a093e173) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b9c6fe8006faa166f61d3f239f815fefefadd4b805b837b5925f9af63278f183b24eafdd080f7eb4f6a63d4385a70060e7bfa7f8721821a63cfe6bc9a093e173) **2 Months Of Food, Security & Peace Of Mind - All In One Kit** This is more than just food. It's **freedom in a box.** These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. [**Click here now to stock up before our warehouse clears out.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b9c6fe8006faa166f61d3f239f815fefefadd4b805b837b5925f9af63278f183b24eafdd080f7eb4f6a63d4385a70060e7bfa7f8721821a63cfe6bc9a093e173) That's right - **no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients** - just real food, crafted for real emergencies. Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, **these kits contain more food than ever.** It's a massive value - and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared. Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these 4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b9c6fe8006faa166f61d3f239f815fefefadd4b805b837b5925f9af63278f183b24eafdd080f7eb4f6a63d4385a70060e7bfa7f8721821a63cfe6bc9a093e173) Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b9c6fe8006faa166f61d3f239f815fefefadd4b805b837b5925f9af63278f183b24eafdd080f7eb4f6a63d4385a70060e7bfa7f8721821a63cfe6bc9a093e173) **Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude.** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b9c6fe8006faa166f61d3f239f815fefefadd4b805b837b5925f9af63278f183b24eafdd080f7eb4f6a63d4385a70060e7bfa7f8721821a63cfe6bc9a093e173) **_Rory H._**_
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these 4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b9c6fe8006faa166f61d3f239f815fefefadd4b805b837b5925f9af63278f183b24eafdd080f7eb4f6a63d4385a70060e7bfa7f8721821a63cfe6bc9a093e173)

name: Team Elissa Slotkin
subject: Elissa Slotkin responds to President Trump’s death threats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| President Trump's threats have real world consequences
Derek —
We're writing to share a short clip from Elissa Slotkin on Chris Hayes' show Thursday night, discussing President Trump's threats to arrest, prosecute, and hang her.
But before we do we're asking all supporters if they are able to make a small but meaningful donation to stand with Elissa and Adam Schiff today.
President Trump's threats have real world consequences. Immediately after his tweetstorm, Elissa received a tidal wave of death threats, and she is now under 24 hour security protection.
But, to Elissa, this story isn't about her — it's about all of us. It's about America. President Trump wants to use fear as a weapon to silence those who disagree with him. But we know that's contrary to what's made America an exceptional nation. And nothing will stop Elissa from standing up and speaking out to protect the country we all love.
**[So, your split contribution to Adam Schiff and Elissa Slotkin will help Elissa support candidates in Michigan and across America who will also stand up for our country, for our Constitution, and our way of life.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs_em_tan_slotkin.inwVhp&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251122_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=9214%2E5257348%2E-BF9ib)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=abs_em_tan_slotkin.us3bdU&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251122_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9214%2E5257348%2E-BF9ib)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=abs_em_tan_slotkin.Y9GvEA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251122_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=9214%2E5257348%2E-BF9ib)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=abs_em_tan_slotkin.IWadV2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251122_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=9214%2E5257348%2E-BF9ib)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=abs_em_tan_slotkin.qtfcMI&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251122_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=9214%2E5257348%2E-BF9ib)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=abs_em_tan_slotkin.4LTVfL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251122_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=9214%2E5257348%2E-BF9ib)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=abs_em_tan_slotkin.eRv8JF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251122_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=9214%2E5257348%2E-BF9ib)
---
Now...
Thursday night, Elissa went on Chris Hayes to talk about President Trump's threats against her. She knows America is better than this, and we think you'll be interested in watching this clip.
When you're done, please share it with your friends.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5537?t=10&akid=9214%2E5257348%2E-BF9ib)
The United States of America gave Elissa everything she has. She's not going to shut up just because Donald Trump is threatened by her.

name: Letitia James
subject: I was arraigned on baseless charges, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
Donate now to help me keep fighting for our shared values. |
Recently, I walked into court to be arraigned for a baseless indictment – driven by politics, not justice or facts. **Let me be clear: these charges are baseless.** I am being targeted by Donald Trump and his allies for one simple reason – because I had the courage to hold him accountable for fraud, and for standing up to his destructive MAGA policies. And while they think this will stop me, I refuse to back down. **[They’re trying to silence me with this politically motivated indictment. I am fearless in this moment, but I need you to stand with me _now_ to defend the truth and continue our fight for New York. Will you donate to my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s Off the Sidelines PAC so I can keep fighting as your attorney general?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119780677/584206775/-620011193?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.22_OTS-Letitia-James-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWMwNDJmNC1iM2M3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yx5gRjPJ9VnT2Ta05oMMlsKB5o8XeY-By26U_b-aGN4=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Letitia James and Off the Sidelines PAC will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119780679/584206776/-620011193?express_lane=true&amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.22_OTS-Letitia-James-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWMwNDJmNC1iM2M3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yx5gRjPJ9VnT2Ta05oMMlsKB5o8XeY-By26U_b-aGN4=)

This isn’t just about me. It’s about whether or not we are going to accept a corrupt president like Trump weaponizing our justice system to silence anyone who dares to stand up to them. But I will not be intimidated – not by Trump, not by his enablers, not by anyone.
I’ve spent my entire career protecting the vulnerable, defending the voiceless, and standing up to corporate greed and political corruption. Now, he’s trying to discredit me and distract from his own wrongdoing. But I will not bow and I will not break.
**This fight is about the rule of law. It’s about truth. About democracy itself. And I need you standing with me.**

name: Team Warner
subject: Trump and his administration are abusing the system for their own personal benefit.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
They’re getting rich while Americans pay the price.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119781181/584208436/-165121341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_PatelJet_251122_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmMyZWUwZS1iNWM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eLrf2W_TabDfDgT64kQ7BJcPllE4ei8hILTjP_UlPJQ=) Derek,

The American people voted for Donald Trump to lower the cost of living and make our communities safer.

But 10 months into his second term? Seemingly every day we learn of new ways the Trump administration is using their power and access for their own personal benefit while their policies raise prices for hardworking Americans:
* We just learned that FBI Director Kash Patel took a $60 million government jet to visit his girlfriend.

* Trump family businesses have added billions to their wealth in just six months.

* And let’s not forget the fact that Trump has asked his Justice Department for $230 million for compensation for previous investigations, that he accepted a jet as a gift from Qatar, and that while running DOGE, Elon Musk used his access to the White House to promote his own businesses.

Unfortunately, the Republican Senate majority has been nothing but a rubber stamp for this unhinged administration.

We frankly cannot trust Senate Republicans to do the right thing when it comes to standing up to Donald Trump. We need to take back the Senate for Democrats so that we can finally put some guardrails on this president.

And we simply cannot lose Virginia if we want any chance of flipping the balance of power in Washington.

[_**That’s why we’re reaching out to ask you to chip in to Senator Warner’s reelection campaign. If we want to end this corruption, graft, and chaos, we need to protect this seat and flip the Senate. clean_body: They’re getting rich while Americans pay the price. | | | = Derek, The American people voted for Donald Trump to lower the cost of living and make our communities safer. But 10 months into his second term? Seemingly every day we learn of new ways the Trump administration is using their power and access for their own personal benefit while their policies raise prices for hardworking Americans: We just learned that FBI Director Kash Patel took a $60 million government jet to visit his girlfriend. Trump family businesses have added billions to their wealth in just six months. And let’s not forget the fact that Trump has asked his Justice Department for $230 million for compensation for previous investigations, that he accepted a jet as a gift from Qatar, and that while running DOGE, Elon Musk used his access to the White House to promote his own businesses. Unfortunately, the Republican Senate majority has been nothing but a rubber stamp for this unhinged administration. We frankly cannot trust Senate Republicans to do the right thing when it comes to standing up to Donald Trump. We need to take back the Senate for Democrats so that we can finally put some guardrails on this president. And we simply cannot lose Virginia if we want any chance of flipping the balance of power in Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Warner = | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Zohran showed us New Yorkers are ready for change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In case you missed it, we just made our latest 2026 Democratic Primaries
endorsement: Darializa Avila Chevalier in NY-13.

Darializa is running to defeat Rep. Adriano Espaillat — an out-of-touch
incumbent who personifies establishment machine politics.

Espaillat’s top campaign donors? AIPAC and the real estate industry.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251122-dac.SM__9E&refcode=ema20251122-37211&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37211%2E1203867%2ETKuuLQ ]Adriano Espaillat campaign donor record: Top Industry 2011-2014, Real
Estate, $410,387. Top Contributor 2011-2024, AIPAC, $186,010.

When New Yorkers like Darializa were organizing and protesting an end to
Israel’s unfettered genocide in Gaza, Espaillat was busy listening to his
largest donor — the pro-Israel lobby — and voting to send billions of
dollars of US-supplied bombs and other weapons for Israel to use against
Palestinians.

And while 88% of residents in Espaillat’s district are renters, their
Congressman is also in the pocket of developers who are actively raising
rents and pushing working-class people out of the city.

He even received an ethics complaint for rigging a bid and violating
Federal bribery laws, favoring a development firm that donated
substantially to his campaign.

Heading into his reelection race, Espaillat has a war chest of hundreds of
thousands of dollars of corporate PAC money from the same corporations
price-gouging the working people of NY-13.

Darializa is different. She’s a working-class New Yorker who knows what
it’s like to struggle with the very issues the establishment ignores.
Unlike Espaillat, she’s rejecting campaign contributions from AIPAC and
corporate PACs, and is ready to fight for her neighbors in Congress.

With your help, we’ve beaten the establishment before. But in this uphill
fight, we need your support early on to power the early stages of
Darializa’s campaign.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251122-dac.SM__9E&refcode=em20251122-37211&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37211%2E1203867%2ETKuuLQ ]Can we count on you to split a donation of any amount between Darializa
and Justice Democrats today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251122-dac.SM__9E&refcode=em20251122-37211&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37211%2E1203867%2ETKuuLQ ]Contribute $5

Zohran showed us New Yorkers are ready for change. Now let’s show AIPAC,
corporations, and the establishment that NY-13 is ready for real
representation in Washington.

Thank you,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251122-37211-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37211_1203867_TKuuLQ&akid=37211%2E1203867%2ETKuuLQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37211%2E1203867%2ETKuuLQ

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: This is not supposed to happen here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Democratic members of Congress, elected by their constituents, received death threats from the sitting President of the United States.
#
Peter —
It’s hard to believe what happened this week.
Donald Trump publicly called for the arrest and execution of his political opponents. Democratic members of Congress, elected by their constituents, received death threats from the sitting President of the United States.
It’s fair to say we’ve never seen anything like it here at home, maybe ever.
But we have seen this before. We saw it in the Soviet Union, in Nazi Germany, and under Mao Zedong. We saw it while we served in Iraq and Afghanistan where Saddam Hussein and the Taliban tortured and killed thousands of their opponents.
The things we signed up to fight against over there are now what Trump is threatening to do here, and that is why the work we are doing is more important than ever. Just three weeks ago, this country showed Trump and the GOP what they thought about their leadership. Their days in power are numbered.
But the leaders we elect in 2026 and 2028 have to be strong enough to bring our country back from the brink and rebuild everything Trump has destroyed.
We need to defeat MAGA up and down the ballot to do that. VoteVets is more dedicated to that mission than ever before, and we need you with us.
[**Please, make a $5 donation to VoteVets. We’ll put it to work defending our democracy and electing principled leaders at every level of government.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-nov25.pScLIv&refcode=em251122-1-120&t=1&akid=34779%2E3013755%2Ed10RdR)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: President Trump just called for several members of Congress — including my husband Mark — to be hanged.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
A stunning sentence, but it’s true.
#

Team,
The President of the United States just called for several members of Congress — including my husband, Captain Mark Kelly — to be hanged. A stunning sentence, but it’s true.
Mark released a video alongside military veterans and former members of the intelligence committee. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders. This is something that members of the military are routinely trained on.
The President then went on social media — accusing them of sedition, calling for their arrest, and suggested they be executed. It is dangerous and wrong.
This is unacceptable. These leaders have dedicated their careers to protecting us and upholding our Constitution. There is no question about their patriotism and love of our country.
But we know the attacks will not stop — unless Americans of all political beliefs stand up and say so.
**GIFFORDS will continue pushing back against this dangerous rhetoric and fighting for stronger laws.**
[**If you’re able, please make a donation to GIFFORDS PAC today. We must continue raising our voices and standing up against the calls for violence — including threats from President Trump himself.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251122-1-b&t=1&akid=11062%2E3935704%2EvoHjpZ)
