clean_body: A stunning sentence, but it’s true. Team, The President of the United States just called for several members of Congress — including my husband, Captain Mark Kelly — to be hanged. A stunning sentence, but it’s true. Mark released a video alongside military veterans and former members of the intelligence committee. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders. This is something that members of the military are routinely trained on. The President then went on social media — accusing them of sedition, calling for their arrest, and suggested they be executed. It is dangerous and wrong. This is unacceptable. These leaders have dedicated their careers to protecting us and upholding our Constitution. There is no question about their patriotism and love of our country. But we know the attacks will not stop — unless Americans of all political beliefs stand up and say so. GIFFORDS will continue pushing back against this dangerous rhetoric and fighting for stronger laws. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you. — Gabby Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Jon Ossoff via Heartland Patriots
subject: Why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97845?refcode=em20251122-9743&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9743%2E614464%2EuDFoZd)
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024.
This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight — **[please split $5 between my reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97845?refcode=em20251122-9743&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9743%2E614464%2EuDFoZd)**
**[SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97845?refcode=em20251122-9743&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9743%2E614464%2EuDFoZd)**
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the _Dobbs_ decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
**[Please split a contribution between my reelection campaign and Heartland Patriots today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97845?refcode=em20251122-9743&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9743%2E614464%2EuDFoZd)**
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97845?refcode=em20251122-9743&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9743%2E614464%2EuDFoZd)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=6&akid=9743%2E614464%2EuDFoZd). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Dr. Shea discusses her recent trip to Argentina and meeting with
Argentina’s Vice President and the Senate.

Shea Bradley-Farrell, Ph.D. is a strategist in national security and
foreign policy and president of Counterpoint Institute for Policy,
Research, and Education in Washington, D.C. Dr. Shea Bradley-Farrell
is the author of Last Warning to the West: Hungary’s Triumph Over
Communism and the Woke Agenda (Dec. 2023), endorsed by multiple
high-level conservative leaders.

Dr. Shea Bradley-Farrell worked directly with the Trump
administration (2016-2020) at the highest levels, including at the
White House, U.S. Department of State, and Senior Advisor Ivanka
Trump, on multiple issues while serving as VP of International Affairs
for Concerned Women for America. Shea also served as Professor and
Subject Matter Expert (SME) for the Defense Security Cooperation
University (DSCU) of the U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) for a Trump
administration national security mandate; she possesses an active U.S.
security clearance and executive-level certifications.

Dr. Shea Bradley-Farrell works with multiple nations around the
world at the highest senior levels of government to build U.S.
relations and promote U.S. interests and security. Previously, she
worked in international development, focusing on economic development
and research in the Middle East, Africa, and South America, with
donors including the U.S. Department of Labor, World Bank, Exxon,
FedEx, and Kuwait Foundation for Advancement of Science.

Dr. Shea Bradley-Farrell regularly publishes Op-eds in outlets such as
RealClear Politics, Human Events, NewsMax, National Review, Daily
Signal, The Washington Times, The European Conservative, Daily Caller,
the Federalist, and many others. She is a weekly guest on TV news and
radio and presents to venues all around the world such as Wilson
Center for International Scholars, Foreign Services Institute, the
U.S. Dept of State, the Heritage Foundation, CPAC Hungary and the Gulf
Studies Symposium.

Dr. Shea Bradley-Farrell holds a Ph.D. and M.S. in International
Development from Tulane University, where she was Adjunct Lecturer in
the International Development Studies Program in 2015. She has served
in a variety of other academic positions, including at the American
University of Kuwait and George Mason University.

name: The Democrats
subject: fwd: Reserve your 2026 Member Card →
body:
---
Derek, we just wanted to make sure you saw this message: **2026 Official Democratic Member Cards are on their way, and we need your help choosing a design.** Make sure to pick your favorite design today, and we’ll get to work printing the design with the most votes! **[VOTE](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251122_5345_fr&akid=5345%2E22930333%2EMwb_yW)** After you’ve picked the design you like best, make sure to [**make a donation of $7 or whatever makes sense for you to reserve your 2026 Member Card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?amount=7&refcode=em_20251122_5345_fr&refcode2=5345_22930333_Mwb_yW&akid=5345%2E22930333%2EMwb_yW) Thank you, The Democrats

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Team DNC** <[feedback@act.democrats.org](mailto:feedback@act.democrats.org)>
Date: Sun. Nov 16, 2025
Subject: Help us pick a winner → Derek, as we prepare to close the books on 2025 and gear up for 2026, we’re requesting input from dedicated supporters like you: **We’re getting ready to release our Official 2026 Democratic Member Card, but we need your input on which design you’d like to see.** [**Can you take a few seconds to vote on your favorite member card design? Your input will help inform what this year’s member cards look like:**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251122_5345_fr&akid=5345%2E22930333%2EMwb_yW) [](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251122_5345_fr&amount=7&akid=5345%2E22930333%2EMwb_yW)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251122_5345_fr&amount=7&akid=5345%2E22930333%2EMwb_yW)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251122_5345_fr&amount=7&akid=5345%2E22930333%2EMwb_yW)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251122_5345_fr&amount=7&akid=5345%2E22930333%2EMwb_yW)
Democrats in every corner of the country will carry their official DNC Member Card with them into the 2026 midterm elections — a reminder that there are millions of us who didn’t vote for Trump’s agenda and aren’t standing idly by while it’s enacted.
This year, we’ve held town halls in all 50 states. We’ve invested in every single Democratic state party. We turned out millions of voters to support Democratic candidates and ballot initiatives, sweeping races nationwide. **And in 2026, we’ll continue building on that momentum as we take back Congress.**
[**So, Derek, as an invaluable part of this team, we know your input is critical. Will you be one of the first supporters to select your favorite member card design?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251122_5345_fr&akid=5345%2E22930333%2EMwb_yW)
**[VOTE](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/2026-member-card-design-voter-em?refcode=em_20251122_5345_fr&akid=5345%2E22930333%2EMwb_yW)**
Thank you for your continued support,
The Democrats
P.S. [**After you cast a vote on your favorite design, consider making a donation of whatever you can afford to reserve your 2026 Member Card ahead of time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?amount=7&refcode=em_20251122_5345_fr&refcode2=5345_22930333_Mwb_yW&akid=5345%2E22930333%2EMwb_yW)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025-member-card?amount=7&refcode=em_20251122_5345_fr&refcode2=5345_22930333_Mwb_yW&akid=5345%2E22930333%2EMwb_yW)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Don Jr.
subject: A special thank you for you,Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
My father and I couldn’t do this without patriots like you. Open this note of gratitude. |
Fellow American, it's Don Jr. I wanted to take a moment to **express my heartfelt gratitude** for **your unwavering support**. My father and I know that this fight **isn't possible without patriots like you** who are willing to stand up for what's right.

We're honored to have you on our team, **Fellow American.**

**[As a small token of our appreciation, I'd like to share a special message with you. name: Stop ICE via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Tell Google to stop helping ICE target immigrants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Right now, Google is making it easier for ICE to target and harass our
communities – while silencing technology designed to keep our friends and
neighbors safe. And we are NOT going to stand for it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34700?source=email-20251122m&t=1011&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]Headline: Google has chosen a side in Trump's mass deportation effort

Here’s what you need to know: Google is hosting a Customs and Border
Protection (CBP) app that uses facial recognition to identify immigrants.
The app tells local cops whether to contact ICE about the person –
essentially putting people directly in the crosshairs of deportation.

Meanwhile, Google has removed apps and tools built by activists and
advocates to alert neighborhoods when ICE agents are nearby, protecting
families from sudden raids. Google has chosen a side: they’re helping
Trump’s mass deportation machine while erasing the tools that would help
immigrants stay safe and informed.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34700?source=email-20251122m&t=1012&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]Add your name now and demand Google STOP hosting CBP’s harmful app and
restore the apps that keep our communities safe.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34700?source=email-20251122m&t=1013&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]ADD YOUR NAME

Let’s be clear: by hosting an ICE tool and removing community protection
apps, Google is putting profits and politics over people’s lives. And when
Big Tech sides with Big Government’s anti-immigrant agenda, it’s up to us
– organizers, immigrants, and allies – to fight back together.

We can’t let Google’s decisions go unchallenged. For every person scanned
and flagged by the CBP app, for every family that loses its warning
system, we need a thousand more voices demanding justice.

We’ve fought – and won – against big companies profiting off of evil
before. Because the fact is grassroots pushback works, but only when we
raise our voices together.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34700?source=email-20251122m&t=1014&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]Will you sign the petition today and tell Google: Stop enabling mass
deportation and restore the apps that help immigrants stay safe?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34700?source=email-20251122m&t=1015&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251122m.9rNtPM&t=1007&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251122m.HaMv-X&t=1008&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251122m.ONvSBo&t=1009&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251122m.YqpKC1&t=1010&akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9882%2E5885482%2EGaUnwX

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Why I’m running for U.S. Senate
body:
Hear me out. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119784570/584217722/1573338254?refcode=ea.e586a7a8-bac7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.e586a7a8-bac7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg2YTdhOC1iYWM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkeRY_PoCqKhuJFkM9LH44kbMBojgjMma7ME2MynpD8=) Peter, **[I love North Carolina and I’ve served the people here for most of my life. I would like to tell you a bit about why it’s time for me to serve in Washington, but first, I have to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for Senate by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119784571/584217723/1573338254?refcode=ea.e586a7a8-bac7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.e586a7a8-bac7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg2YTdhOC1iYWM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkeRY_PoCqKhuJFkM9LH44kbMBojgjMma7ME2MynpD8=)** I was born and raised right here in North Carolina. I’ve worked to give back to the home that gave me so much. Together, we achieved a lot of good: bringing thousands of jobs to NC, boosting our economy by investing in clean energy, giving public school teachers a raise, and — in what may have been our most impactful achievement as Governor — expanding Medicaid to more than 650,000 people. **I never really wanted to go to Washington, but so much progress is in danger now, and not just for North Carolinians._That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate._** I’m running because **every American deserves access to health care** — and that means we need to preserve Medicaid, not slash it to give billionaires a handout. I’m running because the **right to reproductive freedom is fundamental** — and we need to fight to restore abortion access nationwide. I’m running because **our planet is in jeopardy** — and right now the people in power would rather allow companies to pollute our air and water than find new directions. **Peter, I’m running for U.S. Senate because I still believe that our best days are in our future — not our past. But only if we fix what’s broken in Washington now. I can’t do that without your support.** **We know that Republicans are going to target our race. They’re ready to go to any lengths to defeat us. But together, we can take them on.** **[Will you join our fight with a donation of any size today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119784572/584217724/1573338254?refcode=ea.e586a7a8-bac7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.e586a7a8-bac7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg2YTdhOC1iYWM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkeRY_PoCqKhuJFkM9LH44kbMBojgjMma7ME2MynpD8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119784573/584217725/1573338254?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.e586a7a8-bac7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.e586a7a8-bac7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg2YTdhOC1iYWM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkeRY_PoCqKhuJFkM9LH44kbMBojgjMma7ME2MynpD8=)**
---
**[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119784574/584217726/1573338254?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.e586a7a8-bac7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.e586a7a8-bac7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTg2YTdhOC1iYWM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkeRY_PoCqKhuJFkM9LH44kbMBojgjMma7ME2MynpD8=)**

clean_body: Hear me out. | = Peter, = I was born and raised right here in North Carolina. I’ve worked to give back to the home that gave me so much. Together, we achieved a lot of good: bringing thousands of jobs to NC, boosting our economy by investing in clean energy, giving public school teachers a raise, and — in what may have been our most impactful achievement as Governor — expanding Medicaid to more than 650,000 people. I never really wanted to go to Washington, but so much progress is in danger now, and not just for North Carolinians.That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’m running because every American deserves access to health care — and that means we need to preserve Medicaid, not slash it to give billionaires a handout. I’m running because the right to reproductive freedom is fundamental — and we need to fight to restore abortion access nationwide. I’m running because our planet is in jeopardy — and right now the people in power would rather allow companies to pollute our air and water than find new directions. Peter, I’m running for U.S. Senate because I still believe that our best days are in our future — not our past. But only if we fix what’s broken in Washington now. I can’t do that without your support. We know that Republicans are going to target our race. They’re ready to go to any lengths to defeat us. But together, we can take them on. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = I know that we can do this together. name: Wes Moore
subject: Making every day count
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=960%2E1086043%2ES6MGsJ)
Can I show you something, Peter? I have a clock that sits on my desk that counts back the amount of days I have left until my first term is up. Seriously!
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251122-1.KPgRsZ&refcode=wes-em-20251122-1%3Frefcode%3Dem-20251122-1&t=2&akid=960%2E1086043%2ES6MGsJ)
It reminds me that I have to use every single minute of every single day I have left in office to deliver results for the people who elected me.
**Every second that I spend focused on fundraising is a minute taken away from the fights that matter the most.**
That’s why I need the help of this grassroots team. **[Will you pitch in $5 today? Any amount contributed will power our campaign and keep me on track to focus on delivering the important results Marylanders deserve.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251122-1.KPgRsZ&refcode=em-20251122-1&t=3&akid=960%2E1086043%2ES6MGsJ)**
The more grassroots supporters like you who step up in response to emails like this one, the more time I can spend working to improve the lives of Marylanders.
The work we’re doing right now — _creating new jobs, providing emergency assistance to food banks, and making sure our veterans are supported_ — is all possible because of you.
**[Please, Peter, donate $5, $10, or any amount that you are able to so we can continue keeping Maryland on the right track.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251122-1.KPgRsZ&refcode=em-20251122-1&t=4&akid=960%2E1086043%2ES6MGsJ)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251122-1.KPgRsZ&amount=5&refcode=em-20251122-1&t=23&akid=960%2E1086043%2ES6MGsJ)**
Every day that we have is another chance to build the future we believe in. Thanks for making this one count.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251122-1.KPgRsZ&refcode=em-20251122-1&t=24&akid=960%2E1086043%2ES6MGsJ)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251122-1&t=25&refcode2=960_1086043_S6MGsJ&akid=960%2E1086043%2ES6MGsJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=960%2E1086043%2ES6MGsJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=960%2E1086043%2ES6MGsJ)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

Team, Retaking a Democratic Senate majority is crucial to fighting Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda. It’s how we’ll push back against harmful cuts to Medicaid, clean energy solutions, and more. But winning competitive races looks different from state to state — **that’s where Martin Heinrich’s Lobo Leadership Fund comes in.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119786123/584223035/944546612?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjJmNjM3OC1iY2M3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G9m92lLA_6t3ae0XUa9je4Ic23knvtf9B-_sCe5zcQM=) Now more than ever, the American people need proven leaders who will fight and deliver for _them_ , not billionaires or special interests. That’s why Martin is endorsing and supporting strong Democratic candidates running in close races across the country, from Michigan to New Mexico to Maine. With several competitive primaries on the horizon, _now’s the time to double down on our efforts._ [_**Your donation today helps Martin uplift new leadership. name: In This Together PAC
subject: When Gov. Andy Beshear stood in front of a crowd of Democrats in Omaha, Nebraska last week, he said this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

When Gov. Andy Beshear stood in front of a crowd of Democrats in Omaha, Nebraska last week, he said something that every one of us needs to remember right now: _**"I am living, breathing proof that Democrats can and should win everywhere in the United States of America."**_
That's not just talk.

Andy has proven it time and time again in deep-red Kentucky by showing up for people, not one political party or one political agenda.

He's expanded healthcare, secured critical funding to rebuild communities after disasters, and fought to make sure every family has a fair shot. Now, he's taking his message nationwide.

The American people are tired of division and ready for leaders who actually deliver real results. **And Andy is the proof that when Democratic candidates run on decency, empathy and compassion — they can win in even the reddest states.**

This work is about changing the way we approach politics. It's about proving that compassion and commonsense can win _anywhere_ when we organize, show up, and fight together. [**If you believe in our work and agree with Andy that it's time to start meeting people where they're at and leading with integrity — _not business as usual partisan games_ — chip in $5 or anything subject: What can I say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
What if I told you this race could change everything?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1414%2E49239%2ENIOAaI)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8990?t=2&akid=1414%2E49239%2ENIOAaI)
---
Hi, null, it’s Haley.

I’m writing to ask directly: What can I say to convince you to **[chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8991?t=3&akid=1414%2E49239%2ENIOAaI)** to help me win this battleground Senate race and keep Michigan blue?
What if I told you I’m the only Democrat consistently polling ahead of Republican Mike Rogers – and even GOP strategists admitted I’d be their toughest opponent?

What if I told you this race is the tipping point for Democrats – and experts agree the path to flipping the Senate runs straight through Michigan?
What if I told you I was born and raised here and I’m in this fight for the Michiganders I know and love, not billionaire donors like the ones backing my GOP opponent?

What if I told you Donald Trump’s chaos agenda is just getting started – and the surest way to stop him is by flipping the Senate?
What if I told you Republicans spent more than $80 million last cycle trying to turn Michigan red – and they’re getting ready to do it again?
This is real, null. This is winnable. But only if we stand up and fight – together.

That’s why I’m asking: **[Will you chip in $5 to help us flip the Senate and stop Trump’s agenda in its tracks?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8991?t=4&akid=1414%2E49239%2ENIOAaI)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8992?t=5&akid=1414%2E49239%2ENIOAaI)
---
With grit and gratitude,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8993?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1414%2E49239%2ENIOAaI) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8990?t=7&akid=1414%2E49239%2ENIOAaI)
---

Thank you,
Haley

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: A blank check for Stephen Miller
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
Trump is asking the Supreme Court to give Stephen Miller a blank check under the cover of the holiday season. | |
---
Peter, **The Trump administration is trying to quietly turn our immigration asylum system upside down.** Federal law says that noncitizens who arrive in the United States or at a port of entry may apply for asylum—protection from persecution in their own country—and go straight into the asylum system. **But the Trump administration wants to turn asylum seekers away at the border—like the government did when an influx of Haitian immigrants applied for asylum.** Blocking asylum seekers at the border would be a key weapon in Trump’s anti-immigration arsenal—but a court of appeals has declared it unconstitutional. **Now Trump is running to the Supreme Court in order to secure a blank check for Kristi Noem and Stephen Miller to keep up their anti-immigrant agenda. And he’s using the holiday season as a cover in the hopes we don’t notice.** [**We can’t let Trump quietly get away with gutting immigrant rights and protections. The Supreme Court needs to know we’re watching. clean_body: Trump is asking the Supreme Court to give Stephen Miller a blank check under the cover of the holiday season. | | Peter, The Trump administration is trying to quietly turn our immigration asylum system upside down. Federal law says that noncitizens who arrive in the United States or at a port of entry may apply for asylum—protection from persecution in their own country—and go straight into the asylum system. But the Trump administration wants to turn asylum seekers away at the border—like the government did when an influx of Haitian immigrants applied for asylum. Blocking asylum seekers at the border would be a key weapon in Trump’s anti-immigration arsenal—but a court of appeals has declared it unconstitutional. Now Trump is running to the Supreme Court in order to secure a blank check for Kristi Noem and Stephen Miller to keep up their anti-immigrant agenda. And he’s using the holiday season as a cover in the hopes we don’t notice. The Trump administration is arguing that honoring asylum seekers at ports of entry hazards “untold interference with the Executive Branch’s ability to manage the southern border.” But asylum for immigrants facing persecution is what America is all about. Our constitution wasn’t created just to protect citizens, but to make it possible for anyone looking for a better future to take part in our democracy, too. But the wannabe dictator and his cronies don’t care about the law or the promise of America. They just want to stop black and brown people from entering our country. The Supreme Court has agreed to hear this case now, attempting to sneak in one more highly controversial case over the holidays. Their decision comes in June, but we can’t wait for them to mull whether to cave to Trump and rip apart immigrant rights or not. Thank you for fighting for immigrant rights, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . # [Donald Trump and Zohran Mamdani's Bromance Just Killed the GOP's Midterm Strategy](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=179649674&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5NjQ5Njc0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM4Mjk2MzgsImV4cCI6MTc2NjQyMTYzOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fPJHNQ2_NkyX5qoGIOlkIgaS0YnbmWalQz07cdWgodo)
### The GOP's boogeyman became Trump's latest crush.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Nov 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=179649674&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5NjQ5Njc0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MzgyOTYzOCwiZXhwIjoxNzY2NDIxNjM4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.X6Nk4pkdiAjaRMwfFb307nVwlJxaaO7wV16ggHknaUc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/aace2f2f-2d4a-46dd-8751-bc6180ff6ab0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/aace2f2f-2d4a-46dd-8751-bc6180ff6ab0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I haven't stopped laughing since yesterday's press conference between Donald Trump and Zohran Mamdani. It's genuinely one of the funniest things I've seen in a long time.
It was so goddamn predictable. Mamdani hops on a plane, meets with Trump, and completely charms the shit out of him. I don't know what he said behind closed doors, but in public, Trump couldn't stop gushing over the Mayor-elect of New York City. This is the same guy Republicans have been screaming about for months--calling him a radical jihadist hellbent on world destruction.
And now here's Trump in the Oval Office saying how much he likes Mamdani. How smart he is. How they agree on more than you'd think. How they both want the same things--lower crime, more affordability. Trump even says their policies aren't all that different and that conservatives would be surprised by what Mamdani wants to do. Just absolute gold.
The best part? The MAGA influencer meltdown. Full-on panic mode: _" This isn't our Donald Trump! Who is this man? What is happening? Oh my God."_
This was the most predictable shit on the planet. Trump talks tough online, but get in a room with him, be nice, flatter him a little--and boom, he's in love. That's all he wants. Validation from whoever's closest. Probably because his dad didn't hug him enough.
People have used that to great effect. Gretchen Whitmer got flak online for it, but she did the exact same thing. She went to the White House, turned on the charm, and walked out with funding to save a military base in Michigan and disaster relief for the Upper Peninsula. That's what good leaders and executives do.
* * *
_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/aace2f2f-2d4a-46dd-8751-bc6180ff6ab0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/aace2f2f-2d4a-46dd-8751-bc6180ff6ab0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Mamdani pulled a similar move--and he likely just accomplished two massive things:
First, Trump is going to think twice before attacking New York City. That'll ripple through the whole administration. Doesn't mean there won't be drama, but building that relationship matters when you're running the biggest city in America with a weirdo fascist in the White House. That ain't nothing.
Second, he completely torpedoed the GOP's midterm strategy.
I joked online yesterday that there's probably some poor Republican staffer in a dark basement who's spent months cutting ads painting Mamdani as a communist menace. The whole strategy since he beat Cuomo in the primary has been to tie every Democrat to this supposed "radical" and scare swing voters. And now? It's toast.
For the record, I never thought that was going to work anyway. It's been a desperate distraction from the real issues--the economy, Epstein, the cartoonishly obvious corruption in D.C. That's what's going to define the midterms.
Nobody outside New York actually cares who the mayor is. Sorry, New Yorkers. Your city's great. But it's not the center of the universe.
Still, Republicans were going to try. That was their Hail Mary. And now? Democrats are pulling ahead in the generic ballot--up to 14 points in one poll this week. I don't think it's that wide yet, but it's clearly trending toward a blue wave.
And now Republicans have shot themselves in the foot. How the hell are you going to sell Mamdani as the destroyer of America when Donald J. Trump is out here calling him a genius?
It guts the whole narrative.
This is what happens when you build your entire movement around one man and convince yourselves he's infallible. Eventually, he turns on you. He drags you down.
Sure, it felt great last year. You were winning. The economy wasn't great. Democrats were scrambling. You had the wind at your back.
But this is the other side of that. When your party stands for nothing beyond whatever Trump feels like saying that day--when you offer no solutions and the economy is tanking--you're completely at his mercy.
And boy, he did go off-script--because he wanted attention. He liked how Mamdani made him feel. He thought it would make for good TV. Maybe it did in the short term. But long-term? It's a disaster for Republicans.
Mamdani is politically sharp as hell. He's relentless about affordability. Doesn't matter what stupid gotcha question you throw at him or what racist bait Cuomo laid out in the race--he stayed on message. And he did the same thing in that press conference, despite all the reporter questions.
People are pissed. The middle class is in shambles. People can't afford anything--food, rent, houses, school, a damn vacation. They're looking for someone who seems like they give a shit. And Mamdani does.
So putting him in the Oval Office with a lame-duck president was a catastrophically dumb move for the GOP. They thought they could control the narrative and use it to hurt Democrats in the midterms. But Trump didn't play along--because he got charmed by Mamdani.
Republicans deserve what's coming in the midterms.
They built their whole 2026 playbook around turning Zohran Mamdani into a boogeyman instead of actually doing something that would help tens of millions of struggling Americans. And now that doomed strategy is dead on arrival.
It wasn't going to work before.
And it definitely isn't working now.

And now that doomed strategy is dead on arrival. It wasn't going to work before. And it definitely isn't working now. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Pressure Congress to stop supporting genocide and abide by international law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I introduced a new resolution in Congress to officially recognize the genocide of Palestinians in Gaza and demand the U.S. follow its binding obligations to do all it can to prevent genocide. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWn85r5temD6tHGcryn0OoyR-RT8QEeJw8020Bq0Y64kXGjopd14r0lYt-YYYaPMAMHnnBM0kK2L1uJYsV9BTI-hjzgWNEyzWMOgCmaxQzW60EuDz-DASvlA0ISmQqXGY3JmdKIbYkHLLeZ2U11ADSVTbuUfzwqEHXXVINcWr4ocAXtCWUCNC7ITrrvW_LhAt_poTNd_9ClKLwRJ011PTHcPSAnSBGOWcG0LaEoPoEsljYbv9W90E_TlVJHU543anawfSTxe7hJIkYOl0R-ZMbug/4lt/_rWXsMq8TW2MI3udlGpyGA/h0/h001.6bsNTjRQAKLgdN6Rib67_x-GrmauENjJuALx4Y4m0Wc)
---
Friend, This week, the United Nations Security Council voted to give the U.S. and Israel more control to illegally occupy Gaza, further stripping away Palestinians’ right to self-determination. This plan—which former senior UN human rights official Craig Mokhiber called a “colonial outrage”—grants Israel even more impunity to continue mass atrocities. Meanwhile, Israel’s government continues violently violating its “ceasefire” in Gaza and surrounding countries. **We can’t let this defiance of international law continue.** We have a moral and legal responsibility to reject genocide denial, call this what it is, and end our country’s complicity. So **I introduced a new resolution in Congress to officially recognize the genocide of Palestinians in Gaza** and demand the U.S. follow its binding obligations to do all it can to prevent genocide. [**Please sign on today to show your support for this much-needed resolution to recognize the genocide of the Palestinian people—and demand Congress take immediate action to abide by international law and end this genocide.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-inXg7XQKmpx2SINKyl6WQz_vkJ3ZJKcUzkkSwqwfKGU-DTKGBSUC0Zo0ncv5Ir7D2OqlrrUB3J2azuZObaLZLGo_MdnRwBJZSgn3qr1AYRv-1fvUyzGDpMQ32ycK2FVWeozd8TDHg8oUcvdYwtpDXLOhVxzpCDCY05egVoTt5BN9jHKCefLMzfAC08BTxBPYQQG9rZXJS9hBD5YRRv-TNkPBACJLsIvFOLBc_M4DyPOYoefpYpt_WmpZd0UDT6qrar0WQ3mQIVrIf1xGlwMPhc62R93qQEOy8qNwPH7W38DDQdP0TTx0adG7JDN1gN8GwxfLk52zHejQZLlM5r9kkq_3eK-NCr-k6k1uAa9OaszjT6VJ_8NaLQa9jlXD7JJYLh8c4mBSNzGKNbitHekA-/4lt/_rWXsMq8TW2MI3udlGpyGA/h1/h001.m1CvPyYKIdOYDblDxhSEpGUMHiURnyUsGszUz5Ey0jQ) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-inXg7XQKmpx2SINKyl6WQz_vkJ3ZJKcUzkkSwqwfKGU-DTKGBSUC0Zo0ncv5Ir7D2OqlrrUB3J2azuZObaLZLGo_MdnRwBJZSgn3qr1AYRv-1fvUyzGDpMQ32ycK2FVWeozd8TDHg8oUcvdYwtpDXLOhVxzpCDCY05egVoTt5BGi6ofHbWXLSUAj--ENfbWyFalLWlkTPp6n-Vix0g-SZX4OvQVrRWbs-bivB33MblIE4cJeYBuee93Uq20bHq09TdqnKeW4305yGZQdlHRemSHcjmEmSmNLnvE4J7-r_cq92GOcmBSkQyw2jpGpNEUdZ1T-rHxEvR22VFEZDMF0Q6U7WeMvtstOdHJDrElnPPeu-T_cCt9BDT7IIOn9Q4ITi4kbqqhgWQmqjuDW_xFq8/4lt/_rWXsMq8TW2MI3udlGpyGA/h2/h001.U-tXbx3_T279fU1pL3C-NnKpBma4ZTGES25C0JGxliM)
---
Joining over 100 organizations endorsing this resolution, the human rights group Amnesty International USA wrote:
> **_“Amnesty International calls on all members of Congress to urgently support this resolution and ensure the U.S. begins taking the actions necessary to prevent and punish Israel’s genocide in Gaza.”_**
Twenty of my colleagues in Congress have co-sponsored my resolution, House Resolution 876, which:
* **Documents overwhelming evidence establishing that the Israeli government has committed genocide** and lays out how its military and government have also demonstrated a clear pattern of genocidal intent at the highest levels
* **Demands the U.S. follow international law and its obligations (as a party to the Genocide Convention) to prevent and punish the crime of genocide** —including by ending weapons transfers, stopping military aid, and sanctioning Israeli officials
* **Calls for investigating and prosecuting** U.S. individuals and corporations that have participated in this genocide
* **Calls on the U.S. to cooperate with the International Criminal Court and the United Nations** to hold Israeli perpetrators accountable
* **Pushes to restore UNRWA funding** to support desperately-needed humanitarian aid for Palestinians
* Notes that in the past two years, the U.S. has sent nearly $22 billion in military aid to Israel and authorized over $30 billion in weapons deals

That’s **$52 billion American taxpayer dollars funding the slaughter of Palestinians** , while most Americans live paycheck to paycheck and struggle to pay for basic needs like housing, food, and healthcare.
After announcing that he’s forcing the 42 million Americans on SNAP to reapply for food stamps before they can get food assistance, Trump is now negotiating with Israel’s war criminal Prime Minister—who’s demanding a new weapons deal that would cost U.S. taxpayers over $76 billion.
Congress must act to stop these illegal weapons giveaways immediately.
[**Please add your name to demand Congress fulfill our country’s legal obligations to bring this genocide to an end, and hold the perpetrators accountable for their atrocities against Palestinians.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-inXg7XQKmpx2SINKyl6WQz_vkJ3ZJKcUzkkSwqwfKGU-DTKGBSUC0Zo0ncv5Ir7D2OqlrrUB3J2azuZObaLZLGo_MdnRwBJZSgn3qr1AYRv-1fvUyzGDpMQ32ycK2FVWeozd8TDHg8oUcvdYwtpDXLOhVxzpCDCY05egVoTt5BKiWacXOqZSzNdBSUgzBhg8sBZ41zdzqv63mW0UjSkFA0PVcGEoXQnq9neYr6n0Xav24Giza5mtIxOcpCMlpWoTzyjDwW5MfNSnwkeSDRSCmx5lC5YyKhbB5o16zTWgTauAzmaD_TQXu4WSBzuPlqFPBIqiQK88hY54oToGmPjWfXUj_ngehbVyfvL4r9IsItQ8rxbMaTW2nifqnQfQdH4n1p1pgOu1cWKZsU_sNLk9d/4lt/_rWXsMq8TW2MI3udlGpyGA/h3/h001.3ArwF7ztNX_4cDlVILFuEB5KniVCOk3kiID1EwS9LZs)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-inXg7XQKmpx2SINKyl6WQz_vkJ3ZJKcUzkkSwqwfKGU-DTKGBSUC0Zo0ncv5Ir7D2OqlrrUB3J2azuZObaLZLGo_MdnRwBJZSgn3qr1AYRv-1fvUyzGDpMQ32ycK2FVWeozd8TDHg8oUcvdYwtpDXLOhVxzpCDCY05egVoTt5BGHOrW6uQ0ZogWdasIh_3mdGYryMrzM5JugrtG3POXKc-N9M026Pg3hO5-W_h1YkK0W7TbcVF83cwZLQQZH28WRyUy54QGeI6q62ya2kMZ3kmmfmuVn52Yudx75kBKDfgWu_tgd5lRxNkOL9YxXxCUm-GK-yZueT_glCtlVXMEuIvMXu2m2cNRdir7r2X-0DbSbKW3Gv1o_aV3sVjl7zTgH3e0jRj-9ngr4pnFM_hSHE/4lt/_rWXsMq8TW2MI3udlGpyGA/h4/h001.jsoY4zrvu7A4U0mRSCcKAYRxGBlw2hlU_iX31kDhGRM)
---
Thank you for fighting for the rights and human dignity of Palestinians and all people.
We must keep pushing to end the violent occupation of Palestine, including the West Bank and East Jerusalem.
Last year, **the International Court of Justice ruled that Israel must end its unlawful occupation** , including illegal settlements, and withdraw from Gaza and the rest of Palestine “as rapidly as possible.”
The world’s top court added that Israel is violating the international prohibition against apartheid—and also mandated Israel to abide by international law and ensure Palestinians’ rights to reparations and return.
These rulings were unfortunately non-binding, so the United States and other governments must step in to enforce them. This is part of governments’ duty to uphold international law.
We will keep building the pressure and the power needed to change our country. I’m honored to fight alongside you for equity and liberation for all.
With you in the fight,
Rashida

name: Mark Kelly
subject: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
**President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.**

I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders.

Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection.

At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged.

It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged.

As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you.

There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome.

[**_Can you split a donation with Maggie Hassan and me to help us raise the resources we’re going to need to stand against Trump and the threats coming our way from him and his Administration?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119790264/584235036/1949054306?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.22_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmExMzhjMy1jMmM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v3pTRk_NU5220Fi69nJfitRvw8zJ-GxUIt-Wm7oTEH8=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119790265/584235037/1949054306?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.22_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmExMzhjMy1jMmM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v3pTRk_NU5220Fi69nJfitRvw8zJ-GxUIt-Wm7oTEH8=)

clean_body: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged. I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders. Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection. At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged. It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged. As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you. There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = I really appreciate this. subject: What does it mean to fight like hell?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
You have my promise.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119790880/584236924/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_FR_LikeHell_112225&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGEzYThiNi1jNGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAkk7iragBjAayoibyMIbWEe3A-DevZCVOpBEvUFAqk=&emci=037fe57e-23c7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e8a3a8b6-c4c7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=51844520) Friend, here’s the first thing you should know about this campaign: I’m running for governor to _fight like hell_ for a state where all Coloradans can thrive. **[If that already sounds like a mission you can get behind, can you chip in $25 right now? If you’d rather keep reading, I’ll explain what I mean.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119790881/584236926/109727453?amount=25&refcode=em_WEI_FR_LikeHell_112225&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGEzYThiNi1jNGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAkk7iragBjAayoibyMIbWEe3A-DevZCVOpBEvUFAqk=)** | | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119790882/584236930/109727453?amount=25&refcode=em_WEI_FR_LikeHell_112225&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGEzYThiNi1jNGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KAkk7iragBjAayoibyMIbWEe3A-DevZCVOpBEvUFAqk=)
---
"Fight like hell" could mean a lot of things, so let’s get more specific. As your attorney general, fighting like hell has meant...
... **Listening to Coloradans** when they raised real concerns about a planned grocery store merger. My office worked to block the Albertsons/Kroger mega-merger because it would have raised prices for consumers, shut down local supermarkets, created more food deserts, hurt Colorado farmers, and threatened workers’ jobs and pensions.
... **Holding corporations accountable** for overcharging and defrauding Coloradans. I’m proud that we’ve returned over $550 million to CO consumers. When irresponsible companies mistreat Coloradans, we get on the case.
... **Standing up to the Trump administration** whenever they try to bully the people of our state, attack our civil rights, or undermine the protections of our land, air, and water. Since January, we’ve sued the federal government 43 times (and counting). _And time after time, we’ve won._

As your attorney general, fighting like hell has meant... ... Listening to Coloradans when they raised real concerns about a planned grocery store merger. My office worked to block the Albertsons/Kroger mega-merger because it would have raised prices for consumers, shut down local supermarkets, created more food deserts, hurt Colorado farmers, and threatened workers’ jobs and pensions. ... Holding corporations accountable for overcharging and defrauding Coloradans. I’m proud that we’ve returned over $550 million to CO consumers. When irresponsible companies mistreat Coloradans, we get on the case. ... Standing up to the Trump administration whenever they try to bully the people of our state, attack our civil rights, or undermine the protections of our land, air, and water. name: Mark Kelly
subject: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
| | |
---
President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders.
Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection.
At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged.
It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged.
As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you.
There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome.
**[Can you split a donation between Catherine Cortez Masto and me to help us raise the resources we’re going to need to stand against Trump and the threats coming our way from him and his Administration?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119791017/584237316/1349576396?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1195-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmEzYThiNi1jNGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixJ1O0b-xz1V7f2NknxMTxGgpD2fLW4gFZEr67LjJUk=)**

Friend,

At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119790997/584237291/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.22.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDcyYzBkZi1jNGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2K5C_h_9Zq754fOk1_CloMRE2JmujclhKdI_IXPS8w=)** ahead of my end-of-month deadline. But before I do, please let me explain the increasingly high stakes in my race.

If these last several weeks have shown us anything, it’s that Republicans are simply unfit to govern. While the shutdown is over, they are still refusing to go to bat for working families who are seeing their healthcare premiums and other costs skyrocket.

**Instead of working across the aisle with us, the GOP is digging in their heels. And earlier this week, President Trump suggested that members of Congress be put to death just because he disagrees with them.**

This kind of behavior is unprecedented, dangerous, and wrong. We cannot stand for it.

Back at home in IL-13, I’m facing multiple challengers in this race who want to stick to this new status quo. Believe me when I tell you that I’ve never been more fired up to protect this seat from the GOP – and take the House majority.

These last few months before the midterm election year are critical to our progress. We’re building a campaign by and for Central and Southern Illinois – expanding our on-the-ground voter outreach and making sure folks have their voices heard.

**[It starts now, and the pressure is on. If you’re able, $3 or any amount would truly go a long way toward putting an end to the chaos.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119790998/584237293/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.22.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDcyYzBkZi1jNGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t2K5C_h_9Zq754fOk1_CloMRE2JmujclhKdI_IXPS8w=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you to = ahead of my end-of-month deadline. But before I do, please let me explain the increasingly high stakes in my race. If these last several weeks have shown us anything, it’s that Republicans are simply unfit to govern. While the shutdown is over, they are still refusing to go to bat for working families who are seeing their healthcare premiums and other costs skyrocket. Instead of working across the aisle with us, the GOP is digging in their heels. And earlier this week, President Trump suggested that members of Congress be put to death just because he disagrees with them. This kind of behavior is unprecedented, dangerous, and wrong. We cannot stand for it. Back at home in IL-13, I’m facing multiple challengers in this race who want to stick to this new status quo. Believe me when I tell you that I’ve never been more fired up to protect this seat from the GOP – and take the House majority. These last few months before the midterm election year are critical to our progress. We’re building a campaign by and for Central and Southern Illinois – expanding our on-the-ground voter outreach and making sure folks have their voices heard. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Nikki | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. name: Cole Strehlow, CEO of The Flyover
subject: Honest update: we fell short
body:
Over the last 12 days, we've been running an all-out sprint to reach **2,000 reader-investors**. Today, I want to be fully transparent with you: **we fell short**.

---
| | |
---
| |
# SATURDAY, NOVEMBER 22, 2025
---
**Dear Reader** , Over the last 12 days, we've been running an all-out sprint to reach **2,000 reader-investors**. Today, I want to be fully transparent with you: **we fell short**. As I write this to you, **we are 147 investors** short of [hitting that goal](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0T1v4zAMBuBfI28J9OH4Y9BwOMNbLssBHQXFpGK1smRYdIz--8Jtmqlj54d8wRd8OZuz9cHH2z87oSaXDCD4wRKCibjlgES4mDFFzLTOYAk3dBhCHtNCRnJ5OghxkNL87d0aQvfcFqIA7RAlqgK1qCvVKMFLWYy6aaqmlVUtXFNdLef2CgO3FlRbWTiBKrzeg4WQUtS85PzIObYOWnF1oqybkrOSI3hKy_E1-UgjuvCe7rgchzQVQY9Ec2bqD5M9k72Pd8z0w-TOql9pMjmty4BMdc_7max2mBD8OjHVXbaIcDgjePugwU6z9bfIVNd_ZX5DioSRmOqcjzbMax7l28MIlz3tf3_pzN5PnopFw7z5EHyualby22R9-OxBv_2Pu5YfAQAA__805KjD). Falling short of a business goal doesn't feel good. And yet -- I am enormously grateful. **1,853 of you** have stepped up to become owners of _The Flyover_. You've put your trust, your belief, and your investment behind what we're building together. And because of that support, we've been able to accomplish more in the last few months than at any time in our history. I won't recap everything: But this morning we delivered to an all-time high of readers: 3.7 million. And our revenue is up 24% month-over-month. That's because of you.
* * *
**The Flyover is building something different** A newsroom for common-sense Americans. A home for people who stopped watching and reading the news because they couldn't trust it anymore. A news publication committed to **unbiased facts** , not political agendas. And to build this movement -- reaching 2,000 investors was essential.
* * *
**Today, I 'm being straight with you** It's not fun to admit falling short of a goal - but we did. We missed the mark. We're 147 investors short. If you've considered investing whether **small or large -- today would be the day to help us**. Today would be the day to[ join the movement](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0T1v4zAMBuBfI28J9OH4Y9BwOMNbLssBHQXFpGK1smRYdIz--8Jtmqlj54d8wRd8OZuz9cHH2z87oSaXDCD4wRKCibjlgES4mDFFzLTOYAk3dBhCHtNCRnJ5OghxkNL87d0aQvfcFqIA7RAlqgK1qCvVKMFLWYy6aaqmlVUtXFNdLef2CgO3FlRbWTiBKrzeg4WQUtS85PzIObYOWnF1oqybkrOSI3hKy_E1-UgjuvCe7rgchzQVQY9Ec2bqD5M9k72Pd8z0w-TOql9pMjmty4BMdc_7max2mBD8OjHVXbaIcDgjePugwU6z9bfIVNd_ZX5DioSRmOqcjzbMax7l28MIlz3tf3_pzN5PnopFw7z5EHyualby22R9-OxBv_2Pu5YfAQAA__805KjD). Today would be the day to invest in the future of common-sense news. Today would be the day to help _The Flyover_ family. If _The Flyover_ has earned your trust -- if you believe America deserves an alternative to the failed legacy media, I hope you'll consider joining us and becoming an investor -- today would be a good day. [Invest in The Flyover](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0T1v4zAMBuBfI28J9OH4Y9BwOMNbLssBHQXFpGK1smRYdIz--8Jtmqlj54d8wRd8OZuz9cHH2z87oSaXDCD4wRKCibjlgES4mDFFzLTOYAk3dBhCHtNCRnJ5OghxkNL87d0aQvfcFqIA7RAlqgK1qCvVKMFLWYy6aaqmlVUtXFNdLef2CgO3FlRbWTiBKrzeg4WQUtS85PzIObYOWnF1oqybkrOSI3hKy_E1-UgjuvCe7rgchzQVQY9Ec2bqD5M9k72Pd8z0w-TOql9pMjmty4BMdc_7max2mBD8OjHVXbaIcDgjePugwU6z9bfIVNd_ZX5DioSRmOqcjzbMax7l28MIlz3tf3_pzN5PnopFw7z5EHyualby22R9-OxBv_2Pu5YfAQAA__805KjD) With gratitude,
**Cole**
CEO, _The Flyover_ | | *Own The Flyover Disclaimer

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I wanted you to hear this directly from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
| | |
---
Hi, friend, it’s Sherrod. I wanted to reach out personally and share some incredible news: **A brand-new poll shows me leading my opponent Jon Husted – 49% to 48%.**
First, I want to say _thank you_. I got back in the fight to take on a rigged system that benefits the wealthy and well-connected, while working people pay the price. And this early momentum is a strong sign that our people-powered campaign is resonating with Ohioans.
But here's the problem: The wealthy donors, the corporate special interests – they’re all panicking after seeing this poll. Last cycle, they spent more than $250 million against me, and they're gearing up to spend millions more to crush our momentum.
We can't let that happen, friend. They know as well as we do that we have what it takes to flip this seat, but it could all come down to resources.
That’s why we set a goal to raise $50,000 before midnight to keep up our momentum, and I'm personally asking you to help us reach it. [**Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can, split with Michael Bennet, to help us fight back against the corporate special interests and win this race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119791922/584240243/-487628408?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk993-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGM1NmE2Ni1jNWM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2kI63u-WsgfuIXOmqwvCys9BrIqbx7NZNGV_5syW6Q=)
I’m so proud to have you on this team, friend.
In solidarity,
Sherrod

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: A movement built on courage and solidarity
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251122-1637-foote&t=1001&akid=1637%2E342411%2E0L49d7 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

During a time when so many people are looking for hope, clarity, and
courage from our leadership, it’s more important than ever that we
reaffirm the values that guide our work every single day.

Squad Victory Fund is driven by a simple, but powerful belief: that every
person deserves dignity, opportunity, and a voice in shaping our
collective future.

And that belief demands action. It means fighting for policies that uplift
working-class families — expanding access to affordable child care so that
parents never have to choose between showing up to work and showing up for
their children, investing in affordable housing so that families can put
down roots without being priced out of their communities, and ensuring
healthcare is accessible and dependable for all so no one has to struggle
to get the care they need.

It also means fighting tooth and nail for a government that reflects the
needs of the people it serves — not the interests of the wealthy and
powerful. These are the policies that turn hope into real opportunity for
every person in every community.

Here is our commitment to you: The Squad Victory Fund will never stop
fighting for a fairer, more just future where no one is forgotten or left
behind.

We know that meaningful change doesn’t just happen overnight. It takes
sustained energy, dedication, and the determination to keep pushing
forward even when the road ahead is challenging. With supporters like you,
we’re building a people-powered movement rooted in justice, equity, and
the unshakable belief that progress is possible when we stand together.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251122-movement.uGksOL&refcode=em20251122-1637&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1637%2E342411%2E0L49d7 ]So, Peter,
can you chip in $3 — or whatever you can — today to keep
our movement strong?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251122-movement.uGksOL&refcode=em20251122-1637&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1637%2E342411%2E0L49d7 ]Contribute ››

Thank you for being a part of this movement with us.

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1637%2E342411%2E0L49d7

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

body:
This is not great news. |

Hey there, Fellow American.

We'll cut to the chase...

**Montana Senator Steve Daines is in trouble! **He was the architect behind the Republican Senate Majority that passed President Trump's America First agenda.

Leftist megadonors from CA and NY are lining up to defeat him and turn Montana blue!

The wave of attack ads and lies will leave Senator Daines bruised, but he's ready for a fight because he knows losing this seat and the Republican Senate Majority isn't an option.

To keep up with the wave of Leftist activists and paid ads, Steve needs an immediate surge of contributions from Republican supporters like you.

name: Nancy Mace for Governor
subject: From Nancy Mace: High Costs, High Taxes, We’re Fixing Both
body:
Representative Nancy Mace unveils her plan to address the high cost of living in South Carolina, inflation and high taxes...

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us14.campaign-archive.com/?e=ddc57b5ede&i=*|ITERATION_UNIQUE_ID|*&u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=c043ff8e66)
---
[|
---](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=b72bddc827&e=ddc57b5ede&i=bfd5ba7d70)
[|
---](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=a28ea1c29c&e=ddc57b5ede&i=bfd5ba7d70)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
# Cost of Living. Inflation. Roads. Bridges. Illegals. Crime. Education. Healthcare.
We’re were the first campaign for Governor to unveil our infrastructure plans for roads, bridges, potholes, traffic, you name it!
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | **South Carolina is the 10th fastest growing state in the nation - our roads need work!**

I was the first candidate for Governor to unveil a plan to address South Carolina’s infrastructure, roads and bridges. I learned a lot as a state lawmaker in 2018 when the Wando Bridge shut down. I had to work with the SC Department of Transportation (SCDOT) and keep my constituents updated on its progress to reopen. I also had to hold SCDOT’s feet to the fire and ensure there was transparency and accountability during a time when the roads in our district were literally shut down.

Then, in my first term in Congress, I sat on the Transportation and Infrastructure committee and learned about the federal resources available to states like ours. I applied for more authorizations than most any other Member of Congress when it came to the Water Resources Development Act (WRDA).
I also supported and helped our state the largest EVER federal infrastructure grant in South Carolina history - $195 million dollars - earlier this year.
We are supporting another federal grant - that will likely be another record maker for South Carolina (announcement soon!).
Here are some of the plans we shared on our first day on our run for Governor.
**Audit SCDOT spending.**
Launch a comprehensive audit to evaluate cost efficiency, project prioritization, and outcomes at the South Carolina Department of Transportation (SCDOT). Findings will be published on a regular schedule to inform future allocations.
**Aggressive federal grant applications.**
Establish a dedicated team to identify, prepare, and submit competitive applications for federal infrastructure funding, with a public tracker showing opportunities pursued and awards received.
**Support for shovel-ready local projects.**
Provide technical assistance to counties and municipalities to develop **shovel-ready** plans - so projects can move quickly when funding is available.
**Bridge for federal, state, and local partners.**
Formalize a coordination hub to align timelines, share data, and resolve conflicts across agencies and departments, ensuring projects move from design to delivery without avoidable delay. You would never believe the lack of communication at the federal, state and local level on some of these projects (well, I bet you would!). I’ve learned being the glue, being the communicator, bringing every stakeholder in a room to hash it out - has the best, fastest, most cost effective and most efficient outcome.
**Close collaboration with the Congressional delegation.**
Work hand-in-glove with members of Congress on authorizations, appropriations, and grant programs to maximize South Carolina’s access to federal infrastructure resources.
**Permitting reform with expedited reviews.**
Implement process improvements and vastly better timelines for permit reviews and approvals, with clear accountability metrics and public dashboards.
**Enhanced engagement with the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers.**
Increase communication and planning to accelerate Corps-related permits and projects, reducing bottlenecks while maintaining safety and environmental standards.
Thank you for your attention to this matter.
Sincerely,
[](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=dce1f2b0c1&e=ddc57b5ede&i=bfd5ba7d70)

name: James Carville
subject: If I had any hair, I’d be ripping it out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss the Senate majority goodbye.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98053?refcode=em20251122-9751&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9751%2E614464%2E0P3RQy)
Folks, it’s James Carville.
I’ve been around the block a few times and worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. So believe me when I tell you: **This ain’t good.**
John Sununu — yeah, _those Sununus_ — just jumped into the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire. And now the political eggheads have DOWNGRADED Democrats’ chances of winning there.
**[💥Before you read another word, split $10 or whatever you can between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee to help Chris fight back right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98053?refcode=em20251122-9751&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9751%2E614464%2E0P3RQy)**
Let me tell you what this means: **If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss our chances of winning back the Senate majority goodbye.**
This isn’t some back-bench, no-name guy we’re up against. **Sununu’s won a Senate seat before.**
He’s got name ID, deep pockets, and Wall Street’s dark money machine ready to drown us in attack ads. This is the far-right’s big play, y’all — they know if they take New Hampshire, Democrats have _no viable path_ to flipping the Senate.
Chris Pappas is the real deal. I mean it. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four damn times, and he knows how to bring folks together. But he cannot — **_cannot_** — do this alone.
So here’s what I need from you:
**[Split a contribution between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare. Because if we let the GOP buy this seat for Sununu, we’re gonna be stuck with Republican control for years to come.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98053?refcode=em20251122-9751&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9751%2E614464%2E0P3RQy)**
**[Split a donation now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98053?refcode=em20251122-9751&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9751%2E614464%2E0P3RQy)**
I’m mad as HELL that this race just shifted in the wrong direction — but that means it’s time to get serious. Chris is the only one who can hold this seat, but he needs a hell of a lot more firepower to fend off what’s coming.
Let’s show these Republican bigshots that we’re not scared — and we sure as hell ain’t backing down.
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98053?refcode=em20251122-9751&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9751%2E614464%2E0P3RQy)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip control of the Senate.
— James Carville
