name: Mark Kelly
subject: A few thoughts for you, if you have a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
In 1990, during Desert Storm, I was stationed on the USS Midway. I flew 39 combat missions over Iraq and Kuwait. I had a missile blow up next to my airplane, I was shot at dozens of times by anti-aircraft fire.
#

Peter, it’s been a weird few days.
In 1990, during Desert Storm, I was stationed on the USS Midway. I flew 39 combat missions over Iraq and Kuwait. I had a missile blow up next to my airplane, I was shot at dozens of times by anti-aircraft fire. If you had told me before one of those missions that 25 years later the President of the United States would call for me to be hanged, I would have said you were crazy.
But that’s exactly what happened this Wednesday.
Sadly, this is the kind of thing we’ve come to expect from this president. He’s a person who can live through the same year we have — rising political violence, escalating tensions, assassinations — and go on to wish death upon sitting members of Congress.
Yes, it was concerning, but more than anything, it’s incredibly sad. I served 25 years in the Navy, launched into orbit 4 times, and ran for Senate because I love this country. To me, there is nothing more American than standing up for our Constitution.
Donald Trump will never understand that. He’ll never understand putting service to this country before yourself. He’s made billions of dollars off his presidency while millions of people are wondering how they’ll afford their health care, or how to feed their kids.
He just doesn’t get it, and he never will. But that makes it even more important that people who do get it — people like you — stick together. That’s how we’ll get through this.
There’s no telling what’s ahead of us. This is uncharted territory for me, for my family, for my team, and we have to be ready for anything.
[**Can you make a donation to help us raise the resources we’ll need to stand against Trump and anything he throws at us?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-mek-em-mar25.qIyu4X&refcode=em251122-1-160&t=1&akid=4039%2E734936%2Eb22SKL)

He’s a person who can live through the same year we have — rising political violence, escalating tensions, assassinations — and go on to wish death upon sitting members of Congress. Yes, it was concerning, but more than anything, it’s incredibly sad. I served 25 years in the Navy, launched into orbit 4 times, and ran for Senate because I love this country. To me, there is nothing more American than standing up for our Constitution. Donald Trump will never understand that. He’ll never understand putting service to this country before yourself. He’s made billions of dollars off his presidency while millions of people are wondering how they’ll afford their health care, or how to feed their kids. He just doesn’t get it, and he never will. But that makes it even more important that people who do get it — people like you — stick together. That’s how we’ll get through this. There’s no telling what’s ahead of us. This is uncharted territory for me, for my family, for my team, and we have to be ready for anything. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Again, I can’t thank you enough. It really means the world to me. Mark Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Before I came to Congress, I was running an auto repair and machine shop. I was raising my family, making payroll, and doing the hard work that so many Americans do every day. **That’s why I’m proud to be a Blue Dog. We’re not party insiders. We’re not rubber-stamp politicians. We’re normal people who understand what it means to fight for our communities — because we’ve lived it.** _But that’s also why we’re under attack._ **Dark money groups and GOP super PACs have already labeled my race a toss-up, and they’re pouring millions into smear campaigns to knock me out of Congress. If they succeed, Democrats lose our path to the majority — and extremists keep control of the House. clean_body: | | = Hi Peter, it’s Marie Gluesenkamp Perez. Before I came to Congress, I was running an auto repair and machine shop. I was raising my family, making payroll, and doing the hard work that so many Americans do every day. That’s why I’m proud to be a Blue Dog. We’re not party insiders. We’re not rubber-stamp politicians. We’re normal people who understand what it means to fight for our communities — because we’ve lived it. But that’s also why we’re under attack. Dark money groups and GOP super PACs have already labeled my race a toss-up, and they’re pouring millions into smear campaigns to knock me out of Congress. If they succeed, Democrats lose our path to the majority — and extremists keep control of the House. That’s a future we cannot afford. = = Your donation today isn’t just about supporting my race. It’s about protecting every vulnerable Blue Dog seat, flipping the districts that will give us the Speaker’s gavel, and proving that working people can still beat billionaire-backed super PACs. #
Peter --
Earlier this month, Roll Call ranked John Cornyn as the third most vulnerable Senator in the country.
It came just days after polling showed James statistically tied in head-to-head matchups with both Cornyn and Ken Paxton.
Without airing a single TV ad, James is already running in the margin of error with them. That’s despite both of them having won statewide multiple times before.
It’s a remarkable feat, and we know National Republicans are worried. They are rushing in to try to keep Texas rigged.
Right-wing super PACs have pledged at least $10 million already to try to buy this seat.
No matter who Republicans nominate, billionaires and corporate mega-donors are going to line up to fill their war chest in a desperate attempt to smear James and defeat our movement.

body:
Would you rather fly to Mar-a-Lago or take a motorcade to Trump Tower?
| | | |
# **_[THIS IS A MESSAGE FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP’S MOTORCADE](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
MAGA Patriots,
You’ve stood with me every step of the way, and I think it could be time to bring a few of you even closer.
I’m thinking of putting together an exclusive day with me in person, and I want YOUR input on how we make it legendary:

| Should I fly you out on Trump Force One and host you at Mar-a-Lago...
**OR**
Roll up in the full Presidential motorcade and bring you straight to the top of Trump Tower?

Tap your choice — I need you to let me know which one is better before 10:30pm tonight!
Thank you for your attention to this matter,
President Trump

I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=59848ca1abf5422a80e1c2d459d8bce1&_e=GCuIHeud_PRfaqSQqNmRvwK_yrlSVmfJ35FBu016_nnDjDy3cvWH7UyECjVCk7tCjtnlgxFNIOPVo9Arimq060vDt2kbX_21XbPkJFfW4RzWKIJ5lUIpVEnc3nFmbzZP-YahjnjrdWeFFe0o5X36JzHrTiFbafaAn6QSNHvj52wwcUGcLMMH-UMWkMQ3wlzwYayo4lEi1pgD8d2Vk1i_IL4V3biNTLev3z9kc_Kn8jFYgPpymduuSgnfMOSwck0GeVNn5_4rUBzzFm7CVYWbkwkRoUvYbSNPFjpd_wUiqvf6dHiEuIOIXEeR6o7H6uBCssF-KPeVPBO-nCs7bqq5Hynk1OuFY_vMik1TWeMBEOm32cTDHs8Hk1U-G9jGu4S1_5xeY4R20OsXUXl600jxK2eNU7gRzezN6qFLIFMk0t65j1_R3ULVzva4CfQeQYABU7iThA5OSWvstb41bCIi8szdnO79n7TxckmhXSMIt67aledBtn2ZA_OuZhVHx7LIi7sSc1REcUC3e8WIncqgAE40d5sFz9tONP6N711BFg0UvN2zYpSII4CeLYdjSQ1Z2S5Lt02qv-_60UU6fO2RkhGfhNyhpmhHWQtyA6J1VMywvwQpnhzuyMVXotrpWVFiNDWGn-_yyJHrWSaQr-_D3EFlWwPz-ypqcepk6FBhgNSjWo7Jtv45Fv308o7ieGd4KwlNXmYEBVwm1CaN_bsLoEnwZKw2CkzoMrWivq_HwdyfPLYp7rLInhzvurypFY4Qb0Ywjjfa688_r6Vn7vFC4Ft2i2SyG_4cHo_3lG9YLlA%3D)

---
Peter,

Last week, Bernie Sanders—the self-proclaimed democratic socialist—threw his full weight behind my opponent in the United States Senate contest in which we’re candidates.

In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ _**stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests.**_ ”

**Translation:** She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash.

That’s not leadership.

**That’s the socialism I fought against overseas.**

I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea.

_**I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach.**_

As a _**Navy SEAL Officer**_ , I deployed _**nine times**_ across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa.

I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security.

That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth.

Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in _**DECADES.**_

What I don’t have right now is money. _**[If you still believe capitalism is worth fighting for, would you please consider a small investment in my campaign today? $5 or even $10 will do if you can spare it.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=59848ca1abf5422a80e1c2d459d8bce1&_e=GCuIHeud_PRfaqSQqNmRvwK_yrlSVmfJ35FBu016_nnDjDy3cvWH7UyECjVCk7tCjtnlgxFNIOPVo9Arimq060vDt2kbX_21XbPkJFfW4RzWKIJ5lUIpVEnc3nFmbzZP-YahjnjrdWeFFe0o5X36JzHrTiFbafaAn6QSNHvj52wwcUGcLMMH-UMWkMQ3wlzwYayo4lEi1pgD8d2Vk1i_IL4V3biNTLev3z9kc_Kn8jFYgPpymduuSgnfMOSwck0GeVNn5_4rUBzzFm7CVYWbkwkRoUvYbSNPFjpd_wUiqvf2k3PVf06gwi-6Wp4stJj_B5POpxX85pVR3o5lwDumv2a54r7vw5UUjxKGIZdACVUVKel68cFN8AS2wQwhbs-nJmGY4mZyGoMIjlhhwlkcUAKXTRkiHq4N24LvR_uL51DrNt4puhUMtibfJchCwyfl7TQdGIVb2h6kGXjB4XAylmAs1G3el5O8FO3uDXtifk0NZ-6Fu1Xvm5Ay7HL0FAPZXj39byDcRTORM2FjdgO7zg53YguoOuZVuRhC-0Dwdri0DXSvA9cEkzy1eBA8KhtInZ6g52Yje_Dpu-b7FBPVLgw0aYmofxDER2g3qYVxcCuUm2fMErNWaS-GTHMAQCTlGpE2HJUhAlxpYkivlFFHeJalDQYl8iT4Hh_4XRCDQblxseHzg705toauzxfijY5XLHSPkhuhg1twcqSESPBlmv4Cn2zIY4Rt7znN7Gz4G6RxszVcVEo8QjpYWu_vRhzCNcYs4S1rzFO-6UXxJQOEVEpdxuduvTZaBuCdR3pFYPk%3D)**_

\- As Tim Walz’s right hand, she sued to defund ICE detention, letting illegals with records roam free—while fentanyl from cartel labs (_**fueled by open borders**_) kills 1,200 Minnesotans a year.

\- Now, with Bernie’s blessing, she’s eyeing the Senate to nationalize healthcare and tax away innovation.

President Trump is already restoring deterrence—tariffs on China, sealed borders, and energy independence.

He needs allies like me: a SEAL who’s deterred real enemies in war zones, not dreamed them up in committee rooms.

My opponent’s Bernie-backed vision? It’s the same failed playbook I’ve seen abroad—quietly obedient societies, where the human spirit withers.

_**he left’s poll shows a Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat. **_

We need _**FINANCIAL FIREPOWER**_ to counter Bernie’s political machine, which is equipped with hundreds of millions of dollars and an email fundraising list 10 miles long.

clean_body: I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. | Peter, Last week, Bernie Sanders—the self-proclaimed democratic socialist—threw his full weight behind my opponent in the United States Senate contest in which we’re candidates. In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests. ” Translation: She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash. That’s not leadership. That’s the socialism I fought against overseas. I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea. I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach. As a Navy SEAL Officer , I deployed nine times across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa. I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth. Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in DECADES. What I don’t have right now is money. My socialist opponent’s record? \- As Tim Walz’s right hand, she sued to defund ICE detention, letting illegals with records roam free—while fentanyl from cartel labs (fueled by open borders) kills 1,200 Minnesotans a year. \- Now, with Bernie’s blessing, she’s eyeing the Senate to nationalize healthcare and tax away innovation. President Trump is already restoring deterrence—tariffs on China, sealed borders, and energy independence. He needs allies like me: a SEAL who’s deterred real enemies in war zones, not dreamed them up in committee rooms. My opponent’s Bernie-backed vision? It’s the same failed playbook I’ve seen abroad—quietly obedient societies, where the human spirit withers. he left’s poll shows a Republican within 2 points of flipping this seat. We need FINANCIAL FIREPOWER to counter Bernie’s political machine, which is equipped with hundreds of millions of dollars and an email fundraising list 10 miles long. Every dollar arms the next generation of American strength—and will help us bury Bernie’s agenda in Minnesota. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: Deterrence works when your adversary believes you’ll act. China believes me. Bernie fears me. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Thomas
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40461%2E3422442%2EHVl2Xi)
Hi Peter, I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself.
My name’s Thomas and I’m Katie’s Finance Director.
**It’s my job to keep track of our bottom line** and make sure we have the resources to land in the top two in June’s primary election—and then win in November to elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor.
In a state this big, running a truly competitive campaign costs a lot—we’re talking millions of dollars to reach voters across California.
As of this morning, we’re tracking slightly behind on our November fundraising projections—**[can you chip in right now to help us catch up?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251122_1_ak.Ng_hvU&refcode=em20251122-40461&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40461%2E3422442%2EHVl2Xi)**
Some of our opponents are billionaires who can write themselves massive checks. Katie is a single mom who understands the pinch of rising costs, and she doesn’t take money from corporations or lobbyists.
We’re building this campaign the right way—with grassroots donations from people who believe California deserves a governor who will fight for working families and make this state more affordable for everyone.
**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 or whatever makes sense to you today? Every donation will help us reach voters across California and build a winning campaign.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251122_1_ak.Ng_hvU&refcode=em20251122-40461&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40461%2E3422442%2EHVl2Xi)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251122_1_ak.Ng_hvU&refcode=em20251122-40461&t=23&akid=40461%2E3422442%2EHVl2Xi)
Thank you for everything you do to power this campaign. I’m grateful to be in this fight with you.
More soon,
Thomas

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251122-40461&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40461_3422442_HVl2Xi&akid=40461%2E3422442%2EHVl2Xi)**

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: building a more affordable future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119798918/584263521/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20251122_FR_Costofliving_0_6MD_Jimmypanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzMyNzI5Yi1kY2M3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IayZ2txXJZ_Tu5V5A9Txf1yuuzjd9rWHazcNyp2V0No=&emci=4f1c56ee-32c6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3732729b-dcc7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6108787) | **The cost of living, including the costs of housing, healthcare, food, and fuel** , is not just a challenge, it's an urgent issue that demands immediate attention. It's one of the biggest hurdles for families all across our nation:
* **Housing** costs continue to remain too high
* **Healthcare** costs are hurting working families and small businesses
* **Food** prices are increasing due to the Administration’s senseless tariff policy
* **Fuel** and utilities continue to be costly

Working families are not just trying to make ends meet, they are struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads. Increased healthcare insurance costs will not just strain, but devastate many families’ finances. And gas and energy prices continue to remain high.

The brutal consequences? Families will be forced to make hard choices, to make difficult decisions. People across our congressional district will be impacted: our teachers, small business owners and their staff, our local contractors and restaurateurs, police officers, fire fighters, and everyday, hardworking Californians.

That’s why addressing the high cost-of-living is not just a priority, it's a commitment.

I will not stop fighting to find federal solutions to reduce the financial burden that our local families are experiencing. Together we can work to build an affordable future where all Californians can thrive.

**_[Can you make a donation of any amount, no matter how small, today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119798920/584263523/636563605?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20251122_FR_Costofliving_0_6MD_Jimmypanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzMyNzI5Yi1kY2M3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IayZ2txXJZ_Tu5V5A9Txf1yuuzjd9rWHazcNyp2V0No=)_**

Together we can continue our fight.

Jimmy

name: Seth for Massachusetts
subject: Tariffs don’t put food on the table — they make it harder
body:
Families are paying more while Trump’s tariffs and dysfunction drive prices higher.

| |
---
Hi friend, This Thanksgiving, families across Massachusetts are feeling it every time they swipe their card. Groceries cost more. Heating costs more. Even the drive to see family costs more. And now, Trump’s new tariffs are making it worse, hitting farmers, manufacturers, and consumers alike. They’re not punishing foreign governments; they’re punishing the families trying to get by. Washington’s dysfunction has real consequences. While politicians bicker, families are stretching every dollar just to make it through the holidays. name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: Help me embarrass Bernie Sanders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cbe8abc26e724a9e90d76fc445fad79b&_e=ragGyzg8setqo8f-zZLFi9Aj5wjpygl0r0Jt1gF3lC-Zt7_O7Ah7yK7Qcxk1cHrr-QZ9gR-4bVQUWtZDjZpVJ1ncVMgKoZrxuDqcVMLcSnCSrZUw2WrXhIfPENhq4gfbnA5b3nKQ85SGdPMqKW5bLh3741ZIdQNkpoBlBFVCN8qKDgqwN2b0mrIgsX-8oET15YB-NS7oU1EJriIhGYoMo7pxwGD_6M4wO9qXdUkEJiHWbOklODLsf1QX_ybrSBreqCMFRQ49ArREDyE6Ebcc9EhgT2c4RbIHlns-ij3iR7Qgam5GznSBlcHL97jtkb94sdfDfQSqvqizik9PZH9s3dSIbZbugYSThCEdxbBQhTjbOnl0yPIzYCXK3ydm7QXzilYlt7HFwiHXS-xSMBcy_rtcEkAso5jdyRnryFKSFk7n3Gc-PIzmoVSiifbZuMmGYNj7UF8rqmwct4erfC455iNPEkS5vFomhMZItF5noj1UdfSVTI-1m4_aeZr8KLE96jFQcsV3aP4YgDFeBDH58OsPOOc3v-79gjgA-2KEC_-Vv3_nNS6FwvcRgYOlIitpEMul-DkY6hfzysLdjFMJ5mqn75rrHzMaEE5ygeufVfMGsLgwLsVqRHP6ARaitsVKjREVvC4QYAF0anc_pKtTRhrxBqfvKQEXWdTycJzM6L16Pdj9iMQuzepuFQ-zccOPEKjCOsHuvOhdeevoEWyef8NzYl1cHaqxaViQ7qChf5flj-QVRzeg2xZfShAORKbYopE3zpbprb4-4DsWPM4UsA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Last week, Bernie Sanders—the self-proclaimed democratic socialist—threw his full weight behind my opponent in the United States Senate contest in which we’re candidates.

In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ _**stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests.**_ ”

**Translation:** She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash.

That’s not leadership.

**That’s the socialism I fought against overseas.**

I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea.

_**I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach.**_

As a _**Navy SEAL Officer**_ , I deployed _**nine times**_ across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa.

I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security.

That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth.

Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in _**DECADES.**_

What I don’t have right now is money. _**[If you still believe capitalism is worth fighting for, would you please consider a small investment in my campaign today? $5 or even $10 will do if you can spare it.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=cbe8abc26e724a9e90d76fc445fad79b&_e=ragGyzg8setqo8f-zZLFi9Aj5wjpygl0r0Jt1gF3lC-Zt7_O7Ah7yK7Qcxk1cHrr-QZ9gR-4bVQUWtZDjZpVJ1ncVMgKoZrxuDqcVMLcSnCSrZUw2WrXhIfPENhq4gfbnA5b3nKQ85SGdPMqKW5bLh3741ZIdQNkpoBlBFVCN8qKDgqwN2b0mrIgsX-8oET15YB-NS7oU1EJriIhGYoMo7pxwGD_6M4wO9qXdUkEJiHWbOklODLsf1QX_ybrSBreqCMFRQ49ArREDyE6Ebcc9J2cva6ZZyq9oJ1oznG61KDFGeVWVJ_fULM70gTv4fBq0IF6Gk-QGSVvOykQ_V7fXGJjZ4GMtzv9arb6YUQ_PGv7Z-TCrMIErwkrX7ZzLle_pJqiXaCSsJw7jDhzqriWVpO0CqGskQeBgM1MF7h_dFWubvEJz5j7HoIvitRXOjZjnq8MnFl2gCKzkK-Zy9ga9ES1jpBqEbRZL0SZHdf-RIDAeHQkAL97yTC8e6KemCyU-azGU1IxneZ-QNN3OcOFu_Ss_lyXHx8r0JafmxnxS4FsVVwhawJtEcFyN9oeD5GM0v6d4MaFZK9ITr5Q4FS62SgQGnC2M_hV_pdhBNDTYFAEV8PuZuXWDWb9lstsQElXgfeAld3laYjDcoTsAq0dgTvdFZ7I2y_oh6q0HtnKJ2ycRBaGTlzVo1WTsvfJxLDBzZQKZ6QGHh3dDJLIhcas6FNoxtzdZ_Qmr5tSdYRM6KCqzZjXZQ4uA9OMAjP2fcWLEvaJRf9xXdo6R5rXBWvYvg%3D%3D)**_

In his endorsement of Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, Sanders called her the fighter we need to “ stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests. ” Translation: She’s his pick to push for socialized, government-run healthcare, $17 minimum wage, higher taxes on job creators, and overturning Citizens United to flood D.C. with more big-government cash. That’s not leadership. That’s the socialism I fought against overseas. I’ve trained allied navies in the South China Sea. I’m Adam Schwarze—Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, capitalist warrior. I’ve deterred real enemies to protect free enterprise. Now I’ll deter D.C. weakness and socialist overreach. As a Navy SEAL Officer , I deployed nine times across 70+ countries—from three combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman, to commanding a Crisis Alert Force in the Middle East, to humanitarian missions in Africa. I’ve seen socialism crush economies firsthand: families starving under state control, initiative erased by endless mandates, freedom traded for false security. That’s why I risked my life—to defend American capitalism, the engine that built the greatest nation on earth. Now, I’m risking my career and professional reputation to run for the United States Senate in Minnesota. I’m the underdog, but Republicans have a very real shot at flipping this Senate seat for the first time in DECADES. What I don’t have right now is money. **More than 47 percent of the district will be new voters.** I’ll need to introduce myself to thousands of new voters, which means TV ads, mail pieces, digital ads, door knocking and phone calls, events, and more. This all adds up to be really expensive.

While my opponent may be able to raise money outside our district and give his own campaign almost $150,000, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to fuel our campaign. Two-thirds of our support comes from our district and 75 percent of our donations are $250 or less.

**_[That’s why we’ll need to hit the ground running right away. We don’t have a moment to lose. name: Sarah McBride
subject: A painful truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Today in America, trans people are targeted by hate that lives in both laws and hearts.
#
This Transgender Awareness Week, we celebrated, honored, and uplifted our trans community — but we also confronted a painful truth: it’s a frightening time for so many in our country.
Today in America, trans people are targeted by hate that lives in laws and hearts. This year, more than 1,000 anti-trans bills have been introduced across the country. We’re seeing a continued rise in violent and dehumanizing rhetoric from elected officials. And earlier this year, Donald Trump banned trans service members from serving in our military _again._
**It’s cruelty for cruelty’s sake, and it’s a reminder that progress isn’t always linear.**
But we must remain firm in our values and our vision in this moment – and, just as importantly, we should never give up on our ability to win over more people to more fully see our humanity and support our rights. It’s not always fair work, and it’s certainly not always easy work, but through the power of our proximity, we can still open the hearts and change the minds of imperfect or unlikely allies.
Growing up, I never imagined that I would one day serve in public office — let alone Congress — as my authentic self. But last November, because of hundreds of thousands of voters and supporters in Delaware and across the country, **we shattered the national lavender glass ceiling and proved that our democracy can be big enough for all of us.**
That’s what we celebrated this Trans Awareness Week. Our visibility in public life and stories of trans joy not only have the ability to inspire one another. They also have the capacity to push past the caricatures to invite more people in, to grow the tent of allies, to defeat the hateful attacks, and to lay the foundation for freedom and safety for trans people in every corner of our country and every part of our globe.
And as the first trans member of Congress to be elected, the way I can _guarantee_ I’m not the last is to quite simply be the best member of Congress that I can be. To continue to fight for what’s right and for those who need it most. And to show that trans people are multi-dimensional human beings.
That’s exactly what I will continue to do — and I’m going to need your help every step of the way.
[**Will you pitch in $5 to my campaign to keep my voice in Congress? Every donation is a signal of your support and helps me continue to defend our trans community in the halls of power.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251122-1.ShfjiP&refcode=em20251122-2525&amount=5&t=1&akid=2525%2E21716%2EB8xS8O)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251122-1.ShfjiP&amount=5&refcode=em20251122-2525&t=20&akid=2525%2E21716%2EB8xS8O)**
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251122-1&t=21&refcode2=2525_21716_B8xS8O&akid=2525%2E21716%2EB8xS8O)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=22&akid=2525%2E21716%2EB8xS8O)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=23&akid=2525%2E21716%2EB8xS8O)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2525%2E21716%2EB8xS8O)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

---
| [RSVP HERE](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=afa9be8e8a&e=292fde286a)
---
| | This past year has been a chaotic and confusing time for so many communities. The painful and damaging actions coming out of the White House on an almost daily basis are meant to divide us. But in CA-15, our unity is our greatest strength.When I fly back home to my district at the end of each week, there’s nothing I look forward to more than engaging with our community. For many of us, this time of year represents a homecoming for family, friends, and neighbors. These annual reunions can give us the strength to weather any storm that may come the next year. I hope you’ll join me and many of our friends, neighbors, and supporters for a special holiday themed fundraiser. Together, we can take back the House in 2026 and continue to fight for our collective future. I’ll see you on December 8th.

name: War coming home
subject: MAGA pushes for predawn special forces raid on Dem candidate
body:
MAGA pundit and pardoned January 6th insurrectionist Ryan Nichols called me a terrorist and demanded a special forces style pre-dawn raid against my home and that I be deprived of all rights as a US
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uIuFSr2tkHoEjGHuApF3j_NANszHTFg5aR6PBhWsYOW4sWCYNuWEHJEDMCa6X9It-HQ0RDbba-e62O04_yDCV1o_b1g2VyRIVqa2-MHw-qmORo61X18V6zvkijWSkSvEk-nHHD-Gq5amWJg5CG5zRDokNAR9LufMZuZF0FrtVR3TclAsh29VMXOojpbPMKts2w4M09RuQZ30lpI-d3pRJPg-Mp23M0K9&c=bLiToquwYm6IWfKmys0xbDQ-w3IBvS1esObej03n01lwba8xOrh4GQ==&ch=SedSSkWE6-RuU3WExpkxgq0c6IIs5zbGHERiZx_6_DgCdYSyoAVBng==)
---
|
Peter,
The notorious Chicago area Broadview ICE facility is a blacksite that has served as the beating heart of Trump's Operation Midway Blitz which saw a national guard deployment to the city, the shooting down of innocent civilians, and a dragnet roundup that saw arrests of undocumented Chicagoans and black and brown US citizens alike.
Migrants are being tortured, deprived of food and water, and disappeared from this facility.
This is why this fall myself and hundreds of my peers gathered in front of the facility to protest against ICE and the Trump administration's fascist crackdown. In response ICE rammed a car through the crowd of protestors and tear gassed us. I was hit by the car as well as teargassed.
In response to the video I shared of ICE's crackdown against protestors, MAGA pundit and pardoned January 6th insurrectionist Ryan Nichols called me a terrorist and demanded a special forces style pre-dawn raid against my home and that I be deprived of all rights as a US citizen.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uIuFSr2tkHoEjGHuApF3j_NANszHTFg5aR6PBhWsYOW4sWCYNuWEHJEDMCa6X9It-HQ0RDbba-e62O04_yDCV1o_b1g2VyRIVqa2-MHw-qmORo61X18V6zvkijWSkSvEk-nHHD-Gq5amWJg5CG5zRDokNAR9LufMZuZF0FrtVR3TclAsh29VMXOojpbPMKts2w4M09RuQZ0iJjmfixOzKpLxPa9WUZIv&c=bLiToquwYm6IWfKmys0xbDQ-w3IBvS1esObej03n01lwba8xOrh4GQ==&ch=SedSSkWE6-RuU3WExpkxgq0c6IIs5zbGHERiZx_6_DgCdYSyoAVBng==)
---
What he called for is disgusting, unAmerican, and evidence of our gruesome foreign wars coming home to American soil.
The War on Terror has conditioned millions of Americans to think of Muslims as terrorists. And the answers to terrorists: solutions like pre-dawn special forces raids and Guantanamo style solitary confinement and suspension of habeas corpus.
I am fighting to end America's blood soaked foreign policy. The uptick in violence in our country, the militarization of our police, the dehumanization of non-white Americans, all of it can be traced back to what we've done abroad and now we are witnessing what happens when that violence inevitably comes home.
Because IL-09 is a deep blue seat MAGA knows that they can't win here with a GOP candidate. Instead, ultra-MAGA donors and donors to the Trump aligned AIPAC organization are pumping hundreds of thousands of dollars into my primary opponents campaign coffers in the hopes of having a Democrat in Congress who will collaborate, support Trump's wars, and do MAGA's bidding.
[We can't let MAGA neutralize this seat, we need to make sure Chicago elects a real Democrat who will fight the administration tooth and nail. Please can you rush a donation of $25, $10, or even $5 to ensure the real Democrat comes out on top in this primary?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uIuFSr2tkHoEjGHuApF3j_NANszHTFg5aR6PBhWsYOW4sWCYNuWEHJEDMCa6X9ItQhx0Kw78bHPcqLzu32cjT17HwVm9WvkiI6Tzb1IQ9Rt-I_IMDTaagqEx4bgGB1io189xtwae9SjGb8urgylrHnDqlFK_KjQ-PjaFQB8vSTeA6w12_VXNYKmlmYWgOAy-5XwcOcWFUsXfVd4DQMyURarVA51ZDiytV60OrC9hTPY=&c=bLiToquwYm6IWfKmys0xbDQ-w3IBvS1esObej03n01lwba8xOrh4GQ==&ch=SedSSkWE6-RuU3WExpkxgq0c6IIs5zbGHERiZx_6_DgCdYSyoAVBng==)

clean_body: MAGA pundit and pardoned January 6th insurrectionist Ryan Nichols called me a terrorist and demanded a special forces style pre-dawn raid against my home and that I be deprived of all rights as a US | | | | | == | Peter, The notorious Chicago area Broadview ICE facility is a blacksite that has served as the beating heart of Trump's Operation Midway Blitz which saw a national guard deployment to the city, the shooting down of innocent civilians, and a dragnet roundup that saw arrests of undocumented Chicagoans and black and brown US citizens alike. Migrants are being tortured, deprived of food and water, and disappeared from this facility. This is why this fall myself and hundreds of my peers gathered in front of the facility to protest against ICE and the Trump administration's fascist crackdown. In response ICE rammed a car through the crowd of protestors and tear gassed us. I was hit by the car as well as teargassed. In response to the video I shared of ICE's crackdown against protestors, MAGA pundit and pardoned January 6th insurrectionist Ryan Nichols called me a terrorist and demanded a special forces style pre-dawn raid against my home and that I be deprived of all rights as a US citizen. | == What he called for is disgusting, unAmerican, and evidence of our gruesome foreign wars coming home to American soil. The War on Terror has conditioned millions of Americans to think of Muslims as terrorists. And the answers to terrorists: solutions like pre-dawn special forces raids and Guantanamo style solitary confinement and suspension of habeas corpus. I am fighting to end America's blood soaked foreign policy. The uptick in violence in our country, the militarization of our police, the dehumanization of non-white Americans, all of it can be traced back to what we've done abroad and now we are witnessing what happens when that violence inevitably comes home. Because IL-09 is a deep blue seat MAGA knows that they can't win here with a GOP candidate. Instead, ultra-MAGA donors and donors to the Trump aligned AIPAC organization are pumping hundreds of thousands of dollars into my primary opponents campaign coffers in the hopes of having a Democrat in Congress who will collaborate, support Trump's wars, and do MAGA's bidding. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Ending the American empire is the only way we save the American republic. | == Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-9 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Ro Khanna
subject: I couldn’t have done it without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
We achieved a monumental victory for the victims of Jeffrey Epstein and a crushing defeat for Donald Trump. I couldn’t have done it without your support and activism. Thank you!
Trump just signed my Epstein Files Transparency Act into law after a landslide 474-1 vote in the House and a unanimous vote in the Senate sent it to his desk.
Isaac Dovere has called this “the biggest defeat of Trump’s second term.”
Here’s the backstory of how I helped engineer the vote that "ripped MAGA apart."
Up to 40 MAGA Republicans were ready to support my Epstein Files Transparency Act, even though Trump publicly told them not to. Some were prepared to lose his endorsement over it. Then Trump folded .
This didn’t happen by accident.
It happened because I’ve spent months:
* going on MAGA-aligned podcasts
* holding town halls in deep-red districts
* building personal relationships with Rep. Massie and even MTG
* treating MAGA voters with respect — not mockery
* making the case for transparency and economic patriotism
Washington didn’t believe this strategy would work. Washington was wrong.
For the first time since Trump came down his golden escalator and announced his candidacy for President, we saw a major breach in the MAGA coalition. And if we can break Trump’s coalition on transparency, we can break it on other issues too and build a broad, durable, cross-partisan governing majority.
I hope you take a moment to read and share the in-depth story of how we did it.
* The New York Times: The Democrat Who Split MAGA Over the Epstein Files [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/11/18/opinion/ro-khanna-epstein-files-trump.html]
* NBC: Rep. Ro Khanna cracks the MAGA coalition over the Epstein files [https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/rep-ro-khanna-cracks-maga-coalition-epstein-files-rcna244375]
* CNN: Ro Khanna explains how he helped engineer the vote that ‘ripped MAGA apart’ [https://www.cnn.com/2025/11/19/politics/epstein-files-ro-khanna]
* Washington Post: Inside the effort to force Trump’s hand on Epstein [https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2025/11/19/trump-epstein-files-decision/]
As you know, I don’t take PAC money. I don’t take lobbyist money. I don’t take corporate money.
My campaign is powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you. Your contribution funds:
* Travel and event logistics to reach communities that beltway insiders ignore.
* Promotion and organizing to bring new people into the movement.
* Security and operations so we can keep doing this safely and sustainably.
Together, we can reshape the political landscape in ways Washington still doesn’t understand.
If you can help, please chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help me keep going on conservative podcasts, holding town halls in Republican districts, and building the coalition we need to defeat extremism? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2026-house-fundraiser?refcode=20251122MS]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2026-house-fundraiser?refcode=20251122MS]
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro Khanna
PS: Text me at (650) 999-9610 and let me know what you think.
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20251104-crypto-resolution&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20251104-crypto-resolution]
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] https://www.tiktok.com/@rokhannausa [https://www.tiktok.com/@rokhannausa] https://www.instagram.com/rokhannausa/ [https://www.instagram.com/rokhannausa/] https://bsky.app/profile/rokhanna.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/rokhanna.bsky.social] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]
Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States
Paid for by Ro for Congress

name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: Absolutely pummeled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Derek,
As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely pummeled by attack ads in Georgia. Republicans have spent more than _$10 million_ on TV and online already. It’s ridiculous.
Why so much money, this far from Election Day?
Because Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state won by Trump. _That_ is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign.
_And it’s why we’re coming to you with this request to help fight back._
If Jon is going to defend this seat, we _really_ need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and donations to emails like this are a huge part of how it happens.
_**[Can Jon Ossoff count on you to contribute $5, $50 or whatever you can afford to help him lay the foundation for a winning Senate reelection campaign here in Georgia? Your donation will be split between his reelection campaign and Senator John Fetterman.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52343?t=1&akid=10440%2E434096%2EHsuGNR)**_
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52343?t=2&akid=10440%2E434096%2EHsuGNR)
---
We wish we didn’t have to ask at all, but _Citizens United_ opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into our elections.
_That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections._
And also it’s why campaigns like ours have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations _from the very start._
Because if we don’t, we run the risk of our message getting drowned out by a flood of Super PAC spending.
So here’s the truth:
**Jon needs our help today, Derek.**
_He is literally MAGA’s #1 target._
They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book.
So yes, this election will be tough.
But this team knows how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.
Let’s do it again.
**_[Please, use this link to support Jon’s reelection campaign and Senator John Fetterman. Every donation counts. Every donation sends a powerful message to MAGA that we’re ready to fight and win. ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52343?t=3&akid=10440%2E434096%2EHsuGNR)_**
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Ossoff and John Fetterman will go through immediately:

__ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52344?t=4&akid=10440%2E434096%2EHsuGNR)
---
| | [DONATE $25 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52345?t=5&akid=10440%2E434096%2EHsuGNR)
---
| | [DONATE $50 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52346?t=6&akid=10440%2E434096%2EHsuGNR)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52343?t=7&akid=10440%2E434096%2EHsuGNR)
---
Thank you!
– Team Ossoff
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk338-bu-fl-footer&t=8&refcode2=10440_434096_HsuGNR&akid=10440%2E434096%2EHsuGNR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://X.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

This is Donald J. Trump. I just stepped out of a meeting with my top political team, and I’ll tell you straight: what I heard is not good.
The Radical Left is pouring money and resources into these midterms. They want to take back control and destroy everything we’ve accomplished.

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I should know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3640%2E582294%2EL3JgiW)
Take it from me: Because of New Hampshire’s proximity to Boston, the Granite State has one of the most expensive media markets in the entire country.
**I should know:** I’ve lived here all my life, I’ve run here, and I’ve seen the millions spent on political ads in some of the closest elections in the country.
**But here’s what I also know:** I’ve been elected to Congress in one of the “swingiest” districts _four_ times thanks to the _power_ of grassroots support.
That’s why I’m relying on grassroots donations from folks like you to win here in New Hampshire and stop Republicans from flipping this seat red.
[**Will you chip in $5 today to help send me to the Senate and give Democrats a chance at flipping it next year?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251122_2_expensive.QzLo67&refcode=em20251122-2&t=2&akid=3640%2E582294%2EL3JgiW)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251122_2_expensive.QzLo67&amount=5&refcode=em20251122-2&t=21&akid=3640%2E582294%2EL3JgiW)**
Recent polling shows me neck-and-neck with former senator John Sununu. This seat is the GOP’s best chance to grow their majority next year, so we can expect millions of dollars in spending in our race to narrow that lead or even get him ahead.
**I’m relying on this team to help me fight back.** I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs — instead I’m relying on $15 here or $35 there from folks who believe in our New Hampshire values and want to power our campaign.
[**If you’re able, I would appreciate a contribution of $5 or any amount today. We’ll put it directly to work in one of the most competitive Senate races in the country.**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251122_2_expensive.QzLo67&refcode=em20251122-2&t=22&akid=3640%2E582294%2EL3JgiW)
Thanks for all that you do,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251122-2&t=23&refcode2=3640_582294_L3JgiW&akid=3640%2E582294%2EL3JgiW)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=3640%2E582294%2EL3JgiW)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=25&akid=3640%2E582294%2EL3JgiW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3640%2E582294%2EL3JgiW)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5843%2E400544%2EHCaq8i)
A ton of campaigns _claim_ to be grassroots. But when you look a little closer, far too many are being bankrolled into office by billionaire megadonors.
**That’s not what we do here.**
Deb’s campaign has been — and will always be — powered by everyday folks just like you. Teachers, nurses, young people, retirees — all people who believe in a brighter future.
Our average donation is just **$23** , and this amount means a lot to this campaign. It tells the story of a movement that was built from the ground up, from people pitching in what they can, when they can.
Unfortunately, Deb’s opponents play by a different set of rules. They will have access to dark money networks and donors who can write a six-figure check in the blink of an eye. We can’t allow their heavy wallets to silence the voices of our grassroots supporters.
That’s why I’m asking: **[Will you match our average donation of $23 to help us stay competitive against Deb’s GOP opponents and keep this campaign powered by everyday people?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1062?c0=em_ms_dh_20251122_1_avgdonation.N4jNjr&refcode=em20251122-5843&t=2&akid=5843%2E400544%2EHCaq8i)**

— Team Deb

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: Behind major corporations, new partnerships are forming—here’s how innovation and investment intersect.| | | | November 22 | | | | | The TRUTH About Trump’s Trade War? | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. name: Mark Kelly
subject: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119800928/584270582/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEwZWRhM2UtZTZjNy1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gvnhFn1ZkCfRSHjn5mQd-2BX8YPtcJ-2oTgjcKO53OU=)
President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.

I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders.

Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection.

At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged.

It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged.

As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you.

There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome.

clean_body: | = President Trump is calling for me to be hanged. I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders. Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection. At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged. It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged. As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you. There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I really appreciate this. subject: The map manipulators aren’t taking their ball and going home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We can only fight back with grassroots support
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119801256/584271448/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMGVkYTNlLWU2YzctZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uVb4XV3mXGs3DjX3rPmmkmrQFozj6YnW5bwT_siOURg=&emci=6817bf07-ffc6-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=410eda3e-e6c7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Ohio was the only state constitutionally required to redraw its map this year. We came dangerously close to a maximally gerrymandered map. But thanks to our efforts, Ohio lawmakers from both sides of the aisle passed a map that averted the worst-case scenario. You’d think these developments would help Republicans across the country take a hint that these politically-motivated mid-decade redraws are wildly unpopular. But the map manipulators aren’t taking their ball and going home. They didn’t get their dream in Ohio — so they’re doubling down in other states, with their sights set on New Hampshire, Indiana, Kansas, and Florida. **They will stop at nothing to rig our democracy, and so we have to stop at nothing to defend it.** [**Will you please donate to fuel the NDRC’s efforts to protect fair representation across the country — and fight back against Republican attempts to suppress it?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119801257/584271449/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_RepubsArentBackingDown_email_20251122-NDRC-Tier1-RepubsArentBackingDown_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251122-NDRC-Tier1-RepubsArentBackingDown_&utm_campaign=RepubsArentBackingDown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxMGVkYTNlLWU2YzctZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uVb4XV3mXGs3DjX3rPmmkmrQFozj6YnW5bwT_siOURg=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We can only fight back with grassroots support | Peter, Ohio was the only state constitutionally required to redraw its map this year. We came dangerously close to a maximally gerrymandered map. But thanks to our efforts, Ohio lawmakers from both sides of the aisle passed a map that averted the worst-case scenario. You’d think these developments would help Republicans across the country take a hint that these politically-motivated mid-decade redraws are wildly unpopular. But the map manipulators aren’t taking their ball and going home. They didn’t get their dream in Ohio — so they’re doubling down in other states, with their sights set on New Hampshire, Indiana, Kansas, and Florida. They will stop at nothing to rig our democracy, and so we have to stop at nothing to defend it. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, The NDRC Team = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. name: Team Elissa Slotkin
subject: Elissa Slotkin responds to President Trump’s death threats
body:
President Trump's threats have real world consequences
Peter,
We're writing to share a short clip from Elissa Slotkin on Chris Hayes show last night, discussing President Trump's threats yesterday to arrest, prosecute, and hang her.
But before we do we're asking all supporters if they are able to make a small but meaningful donation to stand with Elissa and Wes Moore today.
President Trump's threats have real world consequences. Immediately after his tweetstorm, Elissa received a tidal wave of death threats, and she is now under 24 hour security protection.
But, to Elissa, this story isn't about her -- it's about all of us. It's about America. President Trump wants to use fear as a weapon to silence those who disagree with him. But we know that's contrary to what's made America an exceptional nation. And nothing will stop Elissa from standing up and speaking out to protect the country we all love.
**[So, your split contribution to Wes Moore and Elissa Slotkin will help Elissa support candidates in Michigan and across America who will also stand up for our country, for our Constitution, and our way of life.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251122-2.cio7Yy&refcode=em-20251122-2&t=1&akid=956%2E1086043%2E69QPr0)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251122-2.cio7Yy&amount=5&refcode=em-20251122-2&t=20&akid=956%2E1086043%2E69QPr0)**
Now...
Last night, Elissa went on Chris Hayes to talk about President Trump's threats against her. She knows America is better than this, and we think you'll be interested in watching this clip.
When you're done, please share it with your friends.
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251122-2.cio7Yy&refcode=em-20251122-2&t=21&akid=956%2E1086043%2E69QPr0)
The United States of America gave Elissa everything she has. She's not going to shut up just because Donald Trump is threatened by her.
Thanks for standing with Elissa over the years. We wouldn't be here without it.
Team Slotkin
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251122-2.cio7Yy&amount=5&refcode=em-20251122-2&t=22&akid=956%2E1086043%2E69QPr0)**

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251122-2&t=23&refcode2=956_1086043_69QPr0&akid=956%2E1086043%2E69QPr0)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: John Nagel
subject: It’s time to take our country back
body:
Ilhan Omar’s radical agenda ends here

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrZ/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, I never planned to run for Congress.
For three decades, I proudly served Minnesota as a Lieutenant with the State Patrol, protecting our communities and upholding the law.
But now, I’m watching everything I fought for being dismantled by radical anti-American socialists like Ilhan Omar.
Omar and her far-left allies attack our police, divide our communities, and push a socialist agenda that leaves hardworking Minnesotans behind. They are turning our state into a testing ground for their Marxist experiment - and I refuse to let that happen.********
**[That’s why I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 5th Congressional District to Fire Ilhan Omar.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrZ/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)******
**I’m John Nagel - a husband, father, man of faith, and proud Minnesotan who has spent his life serving others.**
Over 30 years in the State Patrol, I earned the Meritorious Service Award, Employee of the Year, and several community service honors - not for politics, but for service.
Now, I’m stepping up again - this time to protect our state and our country from Ilhan Omar’s dangerous vision for America.
But I can’t do it alone. Omar’s allies in Washington and the media are already mobilizing against me, and they’ll stop at nothing to keep their grip on power.
**It’s time to replace Ilhan Omar with a true America First warrior who will actually fight for Minnesota**** _[and I need your help to make it happen](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrZ/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrZ/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | [HELP DEFEAT ILHAN OMAR](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrZ/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, Chuck Schumer and the old Democrat moderates are being replaced by the literally nuts Ilhan Omar and her radical socialist cohorts.
**These aren’t Democrats anymore - they’re socialist thugs, a ball of snakes determined to rip apart the very fabric of our nation.**
But Minnesota is better than this. _America is better than this._
It’s time to get behind honest American values - faith, family, and freedom - and remind Ilhan Omar that Minnesota belongs to the people, not to the radicals in Washington.
**_[If you’re ready to take our state back from Ilhan Omar and her socialist machine, I need you in this fight with me today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrZ/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
Together, we can send a message that will echo from Minneapolis to Washington: Minnesota stands with America - not socialism.
_For Minnesota and America,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrZ/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**John Nagel**
Candidate for U.S. Congress - Minnesota’s 5th District
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrZ/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|
---
**_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bxrY/?__vbtrk=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1NDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=335414&trkid=1108440297&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

subject: BREAKING: New Polls Suggest Blue State Colorado In Play For Republicans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
We need to take immediate action

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119801685/584272753/1435897075?refcode=email_112225_poll&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTkyNWE1Ny1lOGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BBOXgbmgFYQZ6kUXz2WKIgeShVBr1i79w8jIwqMuAvk=&emci=db05c327-f8bb-f011-8194-00224823ff9b&emdi=ee925a57-e8c7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7280715) Team, we had to make sure you saw this: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119801686/584272754/910623595?amounts=3%2C15%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=3&refcode=email_112225_poll&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTkyNWE1Ny1lOGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BBOXgbmgFYQZ6kUXz2WKIgeShVBr1i79w8jIwqMuAvk=) This proves what we already knew: **We can’t take Colorado for granted just because Democrats won the last few elections here.** The _only_ reason we won those races is because a whole lot of committed supporters just like you stepped up when we needed it most and helped Democrats get across the finish line. Don’t forget, Colorado is home to some of the most extreme Republicans in Congress. And we had a Republican senator before John Hickenlooper flipped the seat blue in 2020 – even after Republicans spent nearly $50 MILLION to defeat him. Now that Republicans see a path to winning statewide again in Colorado, we’re bound to see an influx of spending against us. **Democrats have virtually no path to retaking Senate control in 2026 or in 2028 if we lose hold of John Hickenlooper’s seat in Colorado, so we can’t afford to slip up or let our opponents catch us off guard. The stakes are just too high.** [_**So please, can you make a donation of $3 or more before midnight? This month’s election results in New Jersey, Virginia, and California proved that Democrats can win. We can Flip the Senate. And _National Journal’s_ just-released top five Senate rankings for 2026 show the path:
1. Flip **North Carolina:** This open seat is one of the top pickup opportunities for Democrats in 2026 — and former governor Roy Cooper has _never_ lost an election.

2. Defend **Jon Ossoff in Georgia:** Without him winning re-election, our chances at Flipping the Senate are slim-to-none.

3. Flip **Maine:** Susan Collins has voted with Donald Trump’s agenda over 90% of the time. It’s why political experts are calling her one of the most vulnerable Republicans up for re-election.

4. Defend in **Michigan:** Republicans will pour MILLIONS into Michigan to buy this Senate seat for Trump’s hand-picked candidate, Mike Rogers.

5. Defend in **New Hampshire:** New Hampshire hasn’t had a Republican Senator since 2017, and a potentially _nasty_ primary is brewing among Republicans.

Retaking the Senate is the best way to hold Donald Trump and the GOP accountable, and these are just some of the must-win races to make it happen. This month’s elections made it clear: Americans are sick and tired of the chaos, corruption, and cruelty of this administration and of Republican leadership in Congress. **That’s why we need to get to work NOW to Flip the Senate.** **[That’s where you come in.
