name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Donald Trump called for violence against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I will not be intimidated.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97817?refcode=em20251122-9749&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9749%2E614464%2EdbzxoF)
Peter, Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest.
He not only called for my arrest—he went even further, calling for violence against me and several of my colleagues who also served the country before our time in Congress.
Why? Because we spoke a simple truth: no service member is forced to follow an illegal order. The oath to the Constitution is sacred, one that I first swore as a 17-year old at the Naval Academy, and binds us all to the rule of a law.
I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump and his calls for violence against me.
**[If you’re willing to support a Navy veteran who believes in the rule of law, in the Constitution, in the promise of democracy—then I’m asking you, right now, to step up and help me fight back by splitting a contribution between Heartland Patriots and me →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97817?refcode=em20251122-9749&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9749%2E614464%2EdbzxoF)**
**[Donate →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97817?refcode=em20251122-9749&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9749%2E614464%2EdbzxoF)**
I took the oath in the Navy—and I took it again when I was elected to Congress.
That oath doesn’t expire—and I’ll be damned if Donald Trump, a man who tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021, tells me how to serve this country.
So Trump can threaten me, call for my arrest, and even try to incite violence against me, but he can’t scare me into abandoning my oath.
**[Peter, I believe in our country and our Constitution. If you do too, chip in anything you can today to help Heartland Patriots and me defend democracy, protect our freedoms, and stand up to this insurrection president →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97817?refcode=em20251122-9749&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9749%2E614464%2EdbzxoF)**

**Due to the Trump administration reckless policies** – _cuts to food security, federal agencies, and an assault on health care and rural hospitals_ – **many rural communities are struggling.**

That’s why we’ve released our Rural Revitalization Agenda, our path forward to support the growth and prosperity of communities that are often overlooked.

We’ve mapped out a plan to **rebuild and reinvest in rural areas that includes growing farm economies, expanding access to affordable housing, and high-quality healthcare.**

But to see this fully through, we’re going to need a Democratic House Majority.

clean_body: | “New Dems Unveil Rural Revitalization Agenda to Grow Rural Economies, Lower Costs, and Improve Health Care” | = Due to the Trump administration reckless policies – cuts to food security, federal agencies, and an assault on health care and rural hospitals – many rural communities are struggling. That’s why we’ve released our Rural Revitalization Agenda, our path forward to support the growth and prosperity of communities that are often overlooked. We’ve mapped out a plan to rebuild and reinvest in rural areas that includes growing farm economies, expanding access to affordable housing, and high-quality healthcare. name: Speaker Johnson
subject: Confidential: This just landed on my desk.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/6a652cd878d242549fcc30cee5c58f67-0b78437ffab34d5db7a14bb2fa636144/63)
---
Friend,
I don’t reach out like this unless it’s urgent.
Moments ago, my team and I obtained a confidential memo — direct from the Democrats’ own playbook.

| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/2Iyrf00eiGG6nuQVp0Fqyg~~/AAPPABA~/5MSjgY0dL64_ANhE3Tge90YtokwpMdjdq4gUDsRr0asR3kS1kYPjxjPHcfWMgddNKcne9pHNdK1lIxXbYWNZ4Ct13yB9-o3N0pc8iUXePXkaOFJN8QiCFhEOfBhM14Ce85gHPEeFpL8qHRqpJVz6zmtb0NAUQDnFrvBcwFwNrzOnZ7WFwT4s1qAwk8xpvPiabu34ZMfZdG5sldgAmrh-2_BExea1buX8MCNIEu5WJaCrqYsUB9CoqazuKq6BCp1a4bY2VE-7LAuAIiGBpErHYSe9-BD889e2ij7N3PVxW5YuIYSYKgqkdqakUXDx0oPPbLPfKmhuMftvxReu0-P-P0S2vw6cuFzEaZ3m-7JAy0E~)

| Peter, I’m Manuel Oliver. Seven years ago, my son Joaquin was killed in the Parkland school shooting. Since then, I’ve dedicated my life to ending gun violence.

I’ve met countless politicians who’ve made empty promises or flat-out refused to take action.

But I’ve met even more young people – like my friend, Rep. Maxwell Frost – who’ve made bigger impacts on this fight than almost every long-serving elected official out there.

**Maxwell is changing the organizing game by finding new ways to mobilize his generation, like his annual music festival, MadSoul Fest.

But he needs your grassroots support to fund his youth engagement and year-round organizing work.** [**_Can you donate $27 to Maxwell's MadSoul Victory Fund so he can keep building this youth-powered movement for change? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/2Iyrf00eiGG6nuQVp0Fqyg~~/AAPPABA~/5MSjgY0dL64_ANhE3Tge90YtokwpMdjdq4gUDsRr0asR3kS1kYPjxjPHcfWMgddNKcne9pHNdK1lIxXbYWNZ4Ct13yB9-o3N0pc8iUXePXkaOFJN8QiCFhEOfBhM14Ce85gHPEeFpL8qHRqpJVz6zmtb0NAUQDnFrvBcwFwNrzOnZ7WFwT4s1qAwk8xpvPiabu34ZMfZdG5sldgAmrh-2_BExea1buX8MCNIEu5WJaCrqYsUB9CoqazuKq6BCp1a4bY2VE-7LAuAIiGBpErHYSe9-BD889e2ij7N3PVxW5YuIYSYKgqkdqakUXDx0oPPbLPfKmhuMftvxReu0-P-P0S2vw6cuFzEaZ3m-7JAy0E~)

As the March for our Lives Organizing Director and the first Gen Z’er in Congress, Maxwell mobilized a youth movement into a powerful force for change. He knows firsthand that you can’t engage a new generation of voters with the same old organizing.

So Maxwell has been doing things differently with MadSoul Fest. He’s engaging youth with music, food, and fun, all while registering new voters.

**I’m honored to join MadSoul Fest this year, but I’m even more excited about all the young people who will show up to the polls in 2026 because of this event and because of Maxwell’s youth organizing across Florida.**

But the far right will do anything to keep young people from voting, so Maxwell needs grassroots support to keep his youth engagement efforts stronger than ever.

[**_That’s why I'm helping Maxwell raise $50,000 today toward his MadSoul Victory Fund, to fuel his team’s organizing work so he can mobilize the next generation. Can you donate $27 today and strengthen this youth-powered movement? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/2Iyrf00eiGG6nuQVp0Fqyg~~/AAPPABA~/5MSjgY0dL64_ANhE3Tge90YtokwpMdjdq4gUDsRr0asR3kS1kYPjxjPHcfWMgddNKcne9pHNdK1lIxXbYWNZ4Ct13yB9-o3N0pc8iUXePXkaOFJN8QiCFhEOfBhM14Ce85gHPEeFpL8qHRqpJVz6zmtb0NAUQDnFrvBcwFwNrzOnZ7WFwT4s1qAwk8xpvPiabu34ZMfZdG5sldgAmrh-2_BExea1buX8MCNIEu5WJaCrqYsUB9CoqazuKq6BCp1a4bY2VE-7LAuAIiGBpErHYSe9-BD889e2ij7N3PVxW5YuIYSYKgqkdqakUXDx0oPPbLPfKmhuMftvxReu0-P-P0S2vw6cuFzEaZ3m-7JAy0E~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/LswnIquabMpMUuXQH3yIkw~~/AAPPABA~/uKzK6_Rvd--V4wscphmzfm0XP7YfQQM4zmYUigpW0z9LuIzqiNU41zp3_hnKqMQzq8RMIjw7H6-21TXhD70TgdmWKCuc-bWt78YQHKRtkYNZqheZ__4xy2He9yKx2bGWhj2cud3AecED0GO1SOi13pThYq6AF61fT9XWTMTKwZ2t6EkDs59UAzmtMj-S0xGL96wT5vctdeMIBbWh_nY--wRhAAwKhpSAf_-2BEiRUAsiwKZr2Fo9JcsN0PZLElrbI2CWOtM26SbujP7CVHsYKsZIFtgSRu82U05BoU-omtOvSjtdHA3WmeO7i9WNyjUtY7zVEYAAywqaiwvx2p-wcJdEq_IW62kRDpu869XwXiWvmCpQh0-fH3ytpe5SFbd9)

This dangerous bill needs to be stopped before bad actors are empowered to weaponize the tax code against organizations they don't agree with. = | | | = We've got to let you know, Team, that a bill that would give President Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes passed in the U.S. House of Representatives last Congress and is sure to come up again. The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons. “ Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in ,” Rep. If you knew that by giving $10 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $10 you ever spent?

I know that $10 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts.

**But by the time you get to this point in the email, thousands of folks have already given their $10 – and now, they’re counting on you to do the same.**

With a new poll showing me 1 point ahead of my opponent, we can flip this seat – but not unless we capitalize on our momentum and hit our critical grassroots fundraising goals.

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I owe you big time, Peter!
body:
I know my team and I have been reaching out a lot lately.

| | | | Peter, it’s Marsha Blackburn!
I know my team and I have been reaching out a lot lately, but your support truly means more than you know. To show just how much it means to me, I am coming just to you with an exciting opportunity today.
My team has been hard at work creating a brand-new merch item to celebrate our great nation, show our patriotism off with pride, stand strong for FAITH and FREEDOM, and show the Left that we are “ONE NATION UNDER GOD.”
[As a small token of my appreciation, I have put the very first one on hold for you in our Merch Store and attached your confirmation below:](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-iv_xIyFekQ)MERCH STORE ITEM HOLD CONFIRMATION
Hold Status: ConfirmedID Code: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)-25-908[CLAIM YOUR EXCLUSIVE ITEM NOW >>
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._hEasdGMegY-uES7CQ)I don’t expect you to read your email every second of every day, so I’m giving you a window to see this and claim your item.
Your hold reservation expires at 11:59 PM tonight.
But, Peter, I wouldn’t wait too long to claim your exclusive item. We are going to open these up to the rest of our file very soon, and I have a feeling they will go quickly!
Thank you again for all of your support and for EVERYTHING you do!
\- Marsha Blackburn| | |

name: Rubicon moment
subject: Trump calls for mass executions of congressional Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Earlier this week, six Democrats all of whom are former military or intelligence officers, including Colorado Congressman Jason Crow.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SbyCfamcP1r1GjWuxp-rQl_SBqUlQQ-z2lTq4aR_GiXqs29nboDg5gqKVemtDJPsBDIH89f-50iCtC3mnKxNvAtez8EtlQrfAzgR5nCcxCtqxVKG2TWnSlGRrrnnAw5dHDbh-eiL8PzdeBjI6siQCEEXPGLYjmLrE1rXIjX1xleSFLlT-u65E7cRuQDta4IX6-RTuWtNJmTBGKKmDFtIq9eB6jGbAfOC&c=bSmWD3U7iQ35jiSfExq85_EgrU82nf3IHmxEDkIG6o9262nEuzXsMw==&ch=sOx9-ICsqtRuqxBxdTcpIU4SbRzIBRMZEsRCgeJDy7EHA31dMModFg==)
---
|

Peter,
Earlier this week, six Democrats all of whom are former military or intelligence officers, including Colorado Congressman Jason Crow, appeared in a video urging military members to disobey illegal and unconstitutional orders.
In response Trump took to Truth Social calling for their mass execution, stating that they "were guilty of 'SEDITIOUS BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!'"

---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SbyCfamcP1r1GjWuxp-rQl_SBqUlQQ-z2lTq4aR_GiXqs29nboDg5gqKVemtDJPsBDIH89f-50iCtC3mnKxNvAtez8EtlQrfAzgR5nCcxCtqxVKG2TWnSlGRrrnnAw5dHDbh-eiL8PzdeBjI6siQCEEXPGLYjmLrE1rXIjX1xleSFLlT-u65E7cRuQDta4IX6-RTuWtNJmTBGKKmDFtIq5U2p2cWqMqp&c=bSmWD3U7iQ35jiSfExq85_EgrU82nf3IHmxEDkIG6o9262nEuzXsMw==&ch=sOx9-ICsqtRuqxBxdTcpIU4SbRzIBRMZEsRCgeJDy7EHA31dMModFg==)
---

Less than an hour after Trump's call to execute these Democrats, it was announced that the Coast Guard, which operates under the Department of Homeland Security, would no longer classify the swastika as a hate symbol.
Besides Trump, responsibility for this dark moment rests with Lauren Boebert.
She once tweeted "I am the militia," vowed to bring a gun to work in Congress, lead insurrectionists on reconnaissance tours of the Capitol prior to January 6th and during the Capitol riot she tweeted the location of the US Speaker to the bloodthirsty mob.
She supports the notion that MAGA has a divine right for fascist rule and last year she called for the creation of a Taliban-like "holy army" to "save Colorado from the left."
MAGA has already arrested members of the Congress and the Senate. How long until they kill one of them. If Boebert stays in office for another term and retains the pulpit she uses to call for violence, we could soon find out.
Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese and Lauren Boebert faced off, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county. Boebert is beyond vulnerable and Trisha is back to finish the job.
[We have a narrow window to stop Boebert and MAGA before they can usher in their darkest fantasies like executing Democratic members of Congress. Please can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help Trisha beat Boebert, flip this seat, and take back the House?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SbyCfamcP1r1GjWuxp-rQl_SBqUlQQ-z2lTq4aR_GiXqs29nboDg5gqKVemtDJPsi2yKoOziQjehhMonru9Okt4honA3Xmt-1XwHl-pfywogDDIjdP9viX7GGj8mL1mPJoN73ovlX_VvtdV3PPObelvY-4ZthwxTPmfNAIlvW_dvPxu4zLBXilnBUnPW5-bX90Rx_NIApJGF0W79KVjH_Od6_Ua8uGQWz-mcEvxY6z3nkC9FbDN7Vg==&c=bSmWD3U7iQ35jiSfExq85_EgrU82nf3IHmxEDkIG6o9262nEuzXsMw==&ch=sOx9-ICsqtRuqxBxdTcpIU4SbRzIBRMZEsRCgeJDy7EHA31dMModFg==)

In response Trump took to Truth Social calling for their mass execution, stating that they "were guilty of 'SEDITIOUS BEHAVIOR, punishable by DEATH!'" | == Less than an hour after Trump's call to execute these Democrats, it was announced that the Coast Guard, which operates under the Department of Homeland Security, would no longer classify the swastika as a hate symbol. Besides Trump, responsibility for this dark moment rests with Lauren Boebert. She once tweeted "I am the militia," vowed to bring a gun to work in Congress, lead insurrectionists on reconnaissance tours of the Capitol prior to January 6th and during the Capitol riot she tweeted the location of the US Speaker to the bloodthirsty mob. She supports the notion that MAGA has a divine right for fascist rule and last year she called for the creation of a Taliban-like "holy army" to "save Colorado from the left." MAGA has already arrested members of the Congress and the Senate. How long until they kill one of them. If Boebert stays in office for another term and retains the pulpit she uses to call for violence, we could soon find out. Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese and Lauren Boebert faced off, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The healthcare crisis is far from over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9218%2E5257348%2EmgSp8K ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

The GOP’s government shutdown may be over, but the healthcare system is
still in crisis. Healthcare costs are skyrocketing, and Republicans have
refused to do a damn thing about it.

Derek, I’m hearing
from people all over California that health care is too expensive. People
with pre-existing conditions or people whose premiums are going to go up
$1,000 a month and will likely have to drop their coverage.

We need to come together to find a real solution to this crisis.

But if you were to ask the president or Senate Republicans, they seem just
fine with the way things are. That’s why their government funding bill
didn’t include any provisions to drive down healthcare costs. Quite the
opposite.

Here’s a simple truth Trump and Republicans don’t want you to know:

They think it’s a good thing fewer people will have health care. They
think if you can't afford it — no matter how hard you work and how many
jobs you hold down — you don’t deserve health care. And they simply don’t
care about you.

And Trump? Trump is too busy golfing and redecorating to pay any mind to
the very real, very serious, very costly crisis on our country’s doorstep.

We need more than “concepts of a plan,” as the president once so
eloquently stated.

And the dam might be breaking soon. A few House Republicans have come
forward saying they want to build upon the Affordable Care Act. And after
their embarrassing losses at the ballot box earlier this month,
Republicans might finally recognize that they have a responsibility to
govern.

But Derek,
that’s not going to happen until the
president gets off the golf course, gets out of his ballroom planning
meetings, sits down, and negotiates.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251122_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=9218%2E5257348%2EmgSp8K ]I’m committed to fighting every day for you and the millions of
Americans who are about to be priced out of their healthcare plans. Will
you join me by pitching in to my campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q42025_abs_em.jZ5GRf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251122_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=9218%2E5257348%2EmgSp8K ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

name: Graham Platner
subject: Susan Collins, Chuck Schumer, and AIPAC are trying to bury us before we even get started...
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
Peter,
Janet Mills just entered the race against Susan Collins. So you’re about to get a million fundraising texts and emails from Mills and her campaign (if you haven’t already).
I’m new to this whole politics thing, but I’ve begun to learn how this works: After you donate to any establishment Democrat, Chuck Schumer and the DNC turn around and use your email address and phone number to put their thumbs on the scale – propping up their choice, even when that person is not the strongest candidate in the race.
It’s all part of the corrupt system in Washington. Corporations buy candidates through corporate PAC checks. Special interest groups like AIPAC pour millions into Super PACs. And Chuck Schumer and the DNC buy loyalty by sending millions of texts and emails to funnel money to milquetoast candidates, even when they don’t have the best chance to win.
I’m not the choice of corporations, AIPAC, Chuck Schumer, or the DNC. And that’s exactly why I’m the Democrat who is finally going to actually defeat Susan Collins and turn Maine blue.
Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country. We have an opportunity to replace her with a Democrat who will actually support Medicare for All and call what’s happened in Gaza a genocide.
But I’m going up against Susan Collins, AIPAC, and the entire DC establishment. If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I am counting on folks like you to chip in now to our campaign.
Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate for Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Graham Platner and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?express_lane=true&refcode=112225_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3&amount=25]
This is a pretty pivotal moment in our campaign, so no amount you can afford is too small. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=112225_3]
In solidarity,
Graham Platner

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Can I get your input on this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Friend, My job has always been to fight for the people – to make government fairer, more accountable and more compassionate – _but that fight only means something when I’m listening to you._ Every conversation, every survey and every bit of feedback you share helps me understand what’s most important to Democrats across the country. Whether it’s protecting reproductive rights, making health care affordable or standing up for our democracy, your perspective drives our mission forward. **[**_So before we begin reviewing responses tomorrow morning, I’d love to know what you think. Please take a moment to complete our November Priorities Survey and tell me what issues you want to see front and center:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119802683/584276016/1489380384?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.11.22_Priorities-Survey_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRjYmJlOS1mNGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHxm66sNUSaOeVSFJZmc8cwnmbpfRK8DV_vaBuvRzok=&emci=bb83ab92-2bc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b54cbbe9-f4c7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)** | | [November Priorities Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119802684/584276017/1489380384?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.11.22_Priorities-Survey_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRjYmJlOS1mNGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHxm66sNUSaOeVSFJZmc8cwnmbpfRK8DV_vaBuvRzok=&emci=bb83ab92-2bc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b54cbbe9-f4c7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029) Conducted by Kirsten Gillibrand for U.S. Senate | SUPPORTER ID: 108267856

Republican extremists continue to push a dangerous agenda — threatening our reproductive rights, our access to affordable health care, our democracy and everything we care about.
That means it’s more important than ever to defend our Democrats, elect candidates in key battleground states and flip the Senate blue.
**To do that, we need all the help we can get, and that includes leaning on supporters like you. Your input informs our strategy, and it could be the difference between winning and losing next year.**
**[**_So please, can we count on you to share your thoughts in our November Priorities Survey?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119802686/584276019/1489380384?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.11.22_Priorities-Survey_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRjYmJlOS1mNGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHxm66sNUSaOeVSFJZmc8cwnmbpfRK8DV_vaBuvRzok=&emci=bb83ab92-2bc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b54cbbe9-f4c7-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)**

name: George Whitesides
subject: Before the year ends, I need your help

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119803188/584277909/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTlmODQ4Yi1mOGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XazyYnrGXcg98do47e1zn4F0IC63o5rsXWj-KV9CL-I=)
Friends, it’s Robert Garcia.
California just stepped up to stop the GOP’s attempt to rig the Congressional map in order to secure another term in power.
_We rejected the old playbook that lets billionaires and power brokers dictate everything — including congressional maps and election rules — to benefit themselves._
And now, with the election year just around the corner, the fight is on. This new landscape is our chance to show what democracy should actually look like. **But it also means I’m running in an entirely new and more competitive district and launching a brand new campaign.**
[**That’s why I’m asking you to spare just 30 seconds to watch my launch video below — and then chip in $5, $10, or more to help our campaign hit the ground running and raise the resources we need to keep fighting for Californians in Congress. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119803189/584277910/789508428?refcode=251122_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTlmODQ4Yi1mOGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XazyYnrGXcg98do47e1zn4F0IC63o5rsXWj-KV9CL-I=)

[WATCH NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119803191/584277912/-309737922?refcode=251122_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTlmODQ4Yi1mOGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XazyYnrGXcg98do47e1zn4F0IC63o5rsXWj-KV9CL-I=)
I’m running for Congress because I’ve lived the dream this country promises.
My mom brought me here, took every risk so I could succeed, and I saw firsthand how hard work and hope should matter more than who you know or how much money you have in the bank.
This race is about more than one seat. It’s about saying loud and clear that working people should come first, not billionaires who already own the game or lobbyists writing laws behind closed doors.
**And in the face of intense change, in this competitive new district, we aren’t shrinking. We’re showing up. We’re organizing. And we’re winning.**
[**But we can’t do it without you. Your support today means we can build the campaign that matches the moment. If you believe in a district where your vote counts and your voice matters, then stand with me by chipping in $5, $10, or more right away. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119803192/584277913/789508428?refcode=251122_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTlmODQ4Yi1mOGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XazyYnrGXcg98do47e1zn4F0IC63o5rsXWj-KV9CL-I=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119803193/584277914/-309737922?refcode=251122_RG_campaign-launch2-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTlmODQ4Yi1mOGM3LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XazyYnrGXcg98do47e1zn4F0IC63o5rsXWj-KV9CL-I=)

**WASHINGTON** — A bipartisan vote of 427-1 in Congress has received support from Alabama's leaders, including Sen. Katie Britt and Rep. Barry Moore, to release files related to the investigation into Jeffrey Epstein.

Sen. Katie Britt said, "It's unthinkable what many of these victims have been through and we want to make sure that they don't have to relive that experience in any way, so we want to make sure we keep that in front of mind. But, certainly we want to make sure that there is justice for these individuals and that there is absolute accountability. So hopeful that we can get this to the president's desk and get that moving."

Alabama Sen. Katie Britt said a trip home for her 25th high school reunion underlined the looming perils for working Alabamians if the government shutdown continued.
Britt spoke to Todd Stacy on “Capital Journal” about the experience after receiving accolades for her role in bringing the shutdown - the longest in the nation’s history - to an end.

State Rep. Rhett Marques' (R-Enterprise) campaign for Congress is getting a significant shot in the arm, as U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) will join the lawmaker for an event in Orange Beach on Friday.

Britt and Marques will hold a roundtable with local leaders about community and regional priorities at The Wharf at 2:30 p.m.

I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. **I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come.** Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. **This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.** Will you stand with me?

clean_body: | | | | | | | WASHINGTON — A bipartisan vote of 427-1 in Congress has received support from Alabama's leaders, including Sen. Katie Britt and Rep. Barry Moore, to release files related to the investigation into Jeffrey Epstein. Sen. Katie Britt said, "It's unthinkable what many of these victims have been through and we want to make sure that they don't have to relive that experience in any way, so we want to make sure we keep that in front of mind. But, certainly we want to make sure that there is justice for these individuals and that there is absolute accountability. So hopeful that we can get this to the president's desk and get that moving." | | Alabama Sen. Katie Britt said a trip home for her 25th high school reunion underlined the looming perils for working Alabamians if the government shutdown continued. Britt spoke to Todd Stacy on “Capital Journal” about the experience after receiving accolades for her role in bringing the shutdown - the longest in the nation’s history - to an end. | | State Rep. Rhett Marques' (R-Enterprise) campaign for Congress is getting a significant shot in the arm, as U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) will join the lawmaker for an event in Orange Beach on Friday. Britt and Marques will hold a roundtable with local leaders about community and regional priorities at The Wharf at 2:30 p.m. | | | | | | | I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come. Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere. name: Adam Schiff
subject: There’s no limit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

Peter, it’s Adam Schiff.
We all know how important it is to flip control of the Senate next year. And it starts by holding onto Democratic-held seats, _including my friend Jon Ossoff’s race in Georgia._
Right now, Jon is facing the full force of MAGA attacks and needs our help to protect his critical Senate seat. I will explain more in a moment, [**but if you are in a rush and are already ready to do what it takes to protect this seat, you can give $5 here.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251122-1-subs&t=1&akid=1132%2E5691347%2E0lrLnQ)
Recently, Donald Trump personally attacked Jon live on the air. I am no stranger to these kinds of attacks — on the airwaves, on social media, and even in the Oval Office.
There is _no limit_ to what Donald Trump is willing to do to go after his perceived rivals. _He’s even called for me to be held accountable for treason._
**Jon and I know just how dangerous this behavior is.**
Before he ran for office, Jon exposed corruption around the world as an investigative journalist. And before I got to the Senate, I led Trump’s first impeachment and served on the January 6 Committee in the House.
We both continue this work every day, fighting to hold Trump and his administration to account. Jon and I are continuing the struggle to reclaim our democracy and stop the rampant corruption going on.
There’s a reason corrupt billionaires and GOP Super PACs are doing everything they can to take back Jon’s seat and replace him with a MAGA lackey who will rubber stamp Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. **Because they know Jon will continue to stand up to Trump — and they want to silence him.**
Here’s the good news: **Jon knows how to win.**
In 2021, Georgia defied the odds and built a record-breaking grassroots movement — thanks to people like you stepping up.
_Peter, I know we can do it again._
By working together, we can protect this seat and make sure Jon is able to keep fighting against Donald Trump’s extreme agenda.
[**So, will you join me in supporting Jon Ossoff by making a donation to his reelection campaign today? Winning the midterms will be essential to stopping Donald Trump, and we can’t do it without you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251122-1-subs&t=2&akid=1132%2E5691347%2E0lrLnQ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.yIRGRt&refcode=em251122-1-subs&t=21&akid=1132%2E5691347%2E0lrLnQ)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://act.electjon.com/go/1526?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.BLoU2S&refcode=em251122-1-subs&t=22&akid=1132%2E5691347%2E0lrLnQ)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://act.electjon.com/go/1520?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.J64VtC&refcode=em251122-1-subs&t=23&akid=1132%2E5691347%2E0lrLnQ)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://act.electjon.com/go/1521?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.W_itv2&refcode=em251122-1-subs&t=24&akid=1132%2E5691347%2E0lrLnQ)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://act.electjon.com/go/1522?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.uHqGmT&refcode=em251122-1-subs&t=25&akid=1132%2E5691347%2E0lrLnQ)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.OIdw5j&refcode=em251122-1-subs&t=26&akid=1132%2E5691347%2E0lrLnQ)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for your support.
Adam

name: Mark Kelly
subject: President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friends —

President Trump is calling for me to be hanged.

I put out a video, alongside veterans of the military and former members of the intelligence community. It had a simple message: If you are serving in the military, you have an obligation to refuse illegal orders.

Trump’s friends in the White House didn’t like that. They accused us of insurrection.

At some point, the President heard about it, and he hasn’t stopped posting and reposting about us since — accusing us of sedition, calling for our arrest, calling for us to be hanged.

It is no small thing for the President of the United States to call for your execution. Elon Musk called me a traitor. Trump’s advisor, Roger Stone, called for me to be executed. And now Trump himself has called for me to be hanged.

As someone whose family has faced political violence before, I know you have to take words like this seriously, and that’s why I’m writing to you.

There’s no telling what kind of storm we’re heading into right now. Unfortunately, we need to be prepared for any outcome.

Can you split a donation with Jason Crow and I to help us raise the resources we’re going to need to stand against Trump and the threats coming our way from him and his Administration? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-kelly]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-kelly?amount=10&express_lane=true]
DONATE $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-kelly?amount=25&express_lane=true]

DONATE $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-kelly?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-kelly?amount=100&express_lane=true]

DONATE $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-kelly?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-split-kelly]

I really appreciate this.

Thank you,

Mark
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress

name: Team Cooper for Senate HQ
subject: 3 reasons to give $3
body:
Can’t win without your support.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=62%2E124072%2EAlNF0_)
Peter, in just a moment, we’ll share 3 reasons to give $3 to Roy Cooper’s campaign for the U.S. Senate. **[If you’re already excited to pitch in, we’d be thrilled to have your support>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2045?t=6&akid=62%2E124072%2EAlNF0_)** If you’d rather keep reading, here are just three reasons why now is the time to show Roy he’s got your support: 1️⃣ Roy is running with our nation’s needs front and center: Affordable health care. Reproductive freedom. A vibrant clean energy economy. Thriving public schools. And so, so much more. 2️⃣ Our opponent, Big Oil darling Michael Whatley, has already shown he’s ready and willing to be the extreme GOP’s puppet — not a true leader who’s accountable to his constituents. 3️⃣ National Republicans have been throwing money at this race, because they know it’s our best chance at flipping the whole Senate blue. _In fact, it’s on track to be the first billion-dollar Senate race ever._ **[The stakes are clear, Peter — our people-powered movement can’t win a race as competitive as this without you. So we’re asking: Please give $3 or any amount that fits your budget today>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2045?t=7&akid=62%2E124072%2EAlNF0_)** Thank you, Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=62%2E124072%2EAlNF0_)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=62%2E124072%2EAlNF0_)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Have you seen the polls?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Let us tell you why this is a serious warning sign.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40464%2E3422442%2EqQyba6)
Have you seen that a Republican took the lead in the California governor’s race, Peter?
That’s right—A Republican. In first place. _In California._
In a recent poll, Republican Steve Hilton led Katie Porter by one point. And when you average out public polling, Katie is in first with _two Republicans_ close behind.
Let us tell you why this is a serious warning sign:
**1\. Democrats could get locked out of the November election.**
If Republicans rally around their candidates and we don’t unite behind Katie, Democrats risk being shut out of the top-two primary altogether. Californians would choose between two Republicans for governor.
**2\. Another billionaire just jumped into this race.**
Katie now faces multiple opponents with nearly unlimited cash who can flood the airwaves with ads. They can write themselves massive campaign checks to splinter Democratic support even more.
**3\. There are still lots of undecided voters.**
Katie wins when voters hear her plan to lower costs and protect our rights. But we have to reach undecided voters before other candidates do. That will take serious resources, but it’s the only way we’ll win this race.
**[So we’ll ask directly: Can you donate $5 to help us run ads, travel the state, reach undecided voters, and elect Katie as California’s next governor?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251122_2_ak.9CRd0t&refcode=em20251122-40464&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40464%2E3422442%2EqQyba6)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251122_2_ak.9CRd0t&refcode=em20251122-40464&t=22&akid=40464%2E3422442%2EqQyba6)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251122-40464&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40464_3422442_qQyba6&akid=40464%2E3422442%2EqQyba6)**

name: America First War Room
subject: The Low-Trust Economy Is Here... Are You Ready?
body:
When confidence disappears, wealth follows. Find out how to protect yours before the next shock hits.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e27339492/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvWkVScnRYOUpxcA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjI/LbmNsWWxxU21ncg/qP2hpZHM9bmNMRVlJWFF4VGw2cHlscw/gaSJM-g/sfsef30cab7)

The signs are everywhere... _yet most people aren’t paying attention_.
Dear Reader,
Trust — in government, in the dollar, in the markets — is disappearing.
We’re not just watching a crisis of confidence..._we’re living through it_.
In fact, I believe, we’ve entered a _Low-Trust Economy_... where promises mean less, and tangible assets mean everything.
You won’t hear this story on the news — not yet. But this is your window of opportunity to protect yourself and your family before confidence completely collapses.
From my experience, when trust disappears, one asset always rises.
**[Get Your Free Wealth Protection Kit](lp.noblegoldinvestments.com/trust/?affiliate_source=warroom&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1122)**
This may be the single most important step you can take to protect your wealth.
Remember, confidence is fragile... once it’s gone, it never returns the same way.
Best,
Collin Plume
CEO Noble Gold Investments
P.S. The confidence crisis has already begun. Don’t wait for the headlines — protect your wealth today. → **[Claim Your Wealth Protection Kit](lp.noblegoldinvestments.com/trust/?affiliate_source=warroom&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email1122)**
